## COMPREHENSIVE ICON USAGE INVENTORY FOR SHIROI PROJECT

### 1. ICON LIBRARIES CURRENTLY USED

**Dependencies in `apps/web/package.json`:**
- `@egoist/tailwindcss-icons@1.9.2` — Main Tailwind CSS icon plugin (enabled in tailwindcss.css via `@plugin "@egoist/tailwindcss-icons"`)
- `@iconify-json/mingcute@1.2.7` — Mingcute icon set (devDependency)
- `@iconify-json/material-symbols@1.2.61` — Material Symbols icon set (devDependency)

**Tailwind CSS Configuration:**
- Located in: `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/styles/tailwindcss.css`
- Icon plugin configured via `@plugin "@egoist/tailwindcss-icons"`
- Provides dynamic icon class generation from Iconify collections

---

### 6. ICON COMPONENT USAGE PATTERNS

**Pattern 1: Direct Mingcute CSS Class**
```tsx
<i className="i-mingcute-github-line" />
```
Files: 87+ component files across the codebase

**Pattern 2: Mingcute Wrapped in Component**
```tsx
export function ThumbsupIcon() {
  return <i className="i-mingcute-thumb-up-line" />
}
```
Files: `thumbs-up.tsx`, `TiltedSendIcon.tsx`, `XIcon.tsx`

**Pattern 3: SVG Component with Props**
```tsx
export function CloseIcon({ className }) {
  return <svg className={className} .../>
}
```
Files: `close.tsx`, `comment.tsx`, emoji icons, platform icons

**Pattern 4: Arbitrary Icon Value (Tailwind)**
```tsx
<i className="icon-[mingcute--comment-line]" />
```
Location: `CommentBlockButton.tsx`

**Pattern 5: Icon in Toast/Notification**
```tsx
success: jsx('i', { className: 'i-mingcute-check-fill' })
```
Location: `lib/toast.ts`

### 7. ICON USAGE BY FEATURE/CONTEXT

**Navigation & UI Controls:**
- Menu: `i-mingcute-menu-line`
- Dashboard: `i-mingcute-dashboard-line`, `i-mingcute-dashboard-2-line`, `i-mingcute-dashboard-3-line`
- Settings: `i-mingcute-settings-5-line`, `i-mingcute-settings-6-line`
- Language: `i-mingcute-translate-2-line`
- Theme: `i-mingcute-sun-line`, `i-mingcute-moon-line`, `i-mingcute-computer-line`

**Content Actions:**
- Add: `i-mingcute-add-line`, `i-mingcute-add-circle-line`
- Edit: `i-mingcute-pen-line`, `i-mingcute-edit-line`, `i-mingcute-quill-pen-line`
- Delete: `i-mingcute-delete-line`, `i-mingcute-delete-2-line`
- Copy: `i-mingcute-copy-line`, `i-mingcute-copy-2-fill`
- Share: `i-mingcute-share-forward-line`
- Pin: `i-mingcute-pin-line`

**Feedback & Status:**
- Success: `i-mingcute-check-fill`, `i-mingcute-check-circle-line`, `i-mingcute-check-line`
- Error: `i-mingcute-close-fill`, `i-mingcute-close-circle-line`, `i-mingcute-close-line`
- Warning: `i-mingcute-warning-line`, `i-mingcute-alert-line`, `i-mingcute-alert-fill`
- Info: `i-mingcute-information-line`, `i-mingcute-information-fill`
- Loading: `i-mingcute-loading-line`, `i-mingcute-loading-3-line`, `i-mingcute-loading-3-fill`

**Media & Display:**
- Play: `i-mingcute-play-fill`
- Pause: `i-mingcute-pause-fill`
- Fullscreen: `i-mingcute-fullscreen-2-line`, `i-mingcute-fullscreen-exit-fill`
- Download: `i-mingcute-download-2-fill`, `i-mingcute-download-2-line`
- Volume: `i-mingcute-volume-fill`, `i-mingcute-volume-mute-fill`
- Image: `i-mingcute-image-line`, `i-mingcute-camera-line`
- Gallery: `i-mingcute-left-fill`, `i-mingcute-right-fill`

**Engagement:**
- Like/Heart: `i-mingcute-heart-line`, `i-mingcute-heart-fill`, `i-mingcute-heart-crack-line`
- Comment: `i-mingcute-comment-line`, `i-mingcute-comment-2-line`, `icon-[mingcute--comment-line]`
- Star: `i-mingcute-star-line`
- Thumbs up: `i-mingcute-thumb-up-line`

**Social & Communication:**
- GitHub: `i-mingcute-github-line`
- Twitter: `i-mingcute-twitter-line`
- X (social): `i-mingcute-social-x-line`
- Telegram: `i-mingcute-telegram-line`
- Email: `i-mingcute-mail-line`
- RSS: `i-mingcute-rss-line`, `i-mingcute-rss-fill`
- Discord: `i-mingcute-discord-fill`
- QQ: `i-mingcute-qq-fill`
- WeChat: `i-mingcute-wechat-fill`
- Weibo: `i-mingcute-weibo-line`

**Navigation:**
- Up: `i-mingcute-up-line`, `i-mingcute-arow-to-up-line`, `i-mingcute-arrow-up-circle-line`
- Down: `i-mingcute-down-line`, `i-mingcute-arrow-to-down-line`
- Left: `i-mingcute-arrow-left-line`, `i-mingcute-arrow-left-circle-line`
- Right: `i-mingcute-arrow-right-line`, `i-mingcute-arrow-right-circle-line`, `i-mingcute-arrow-right-up-line`
- Back/Return: `i-mingcute-arrow-left-circle-line`

**Content Types:**
- Code: `i-mingcute-code-line`
- Document: `i-mingcute-document-line`, `i-mingcute-file-line`
- Table/List: `i-mingcute-table-2-line`, `i-mingcute-list-collapse-line`, `i-mingcute-list-expansion-line`
- Category: `i-mingcute-cat-line`
- Topic: `i-mingcute-table-2-line` (notes topics)
- Book: `i-mingcute-book-6-line`
- Chat: `i-mingcute-chat-3-line`

**Miscellaneous:**
- Eye: `i-mingcute-eye-line`, `i-mingcute-eye-close-line`, `i-mingcute-eye-2-line`
- External link: `i-mingcute-external-link-line`
- Link: `i-mingcute-link-3-line`
- Question/Help: `i-mingcute-question-line`
- Emoji: `i-mingcute-emoji-line`, `i-mingcute-emoji-2-line`
- Refresh: `i-mingcute-refresh-2-line`
- Sparkles: `i-mingcute-sparkles-line`
- Time: `i-mingcute-time-line`
- Translate: `i-mingcute-translate-2-line`
- Font/Typography: `i-mingcute-font-line`
- User visibility: `i-mingcute-user-visible-line`
- Exit: `i-mingcute-exit-line`
- Send/Plane: `i-mingcute-send-plane-line`
- Hashtag: `i-mingcute-hashtag-line`
- AI: `i-mingcute-ai-fill`
- Key: `i-mingcute-key-1-line`
- Collapse/Expand: `i-mingcute-align-arrow-down-line`

**Material Symbols (3 icons):**

    18→  --font-sans:

    20→    'Microsoft YaHei', 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, 'noto sans sc',

    25→    'Source Han Serif SC', 'Source Han Serif', source-han-serif-sc, SongTi SC,
    26→    SimSum, 'Hiragino Sans GB', system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto,
    27→    Helvetica, 'Microsoft YaHei', 'WenQuanYi Micro Hei', sans-serif;
    28→  --font-mono:
    29→    'OperatorMonoSSmLig Nerd Font', 'Cascadia Code PL',
    30→    'FantasqueSansMono Nerd Font', 'operator mono', JetBrainsMono,
    31→    'Fira code Retina', 'Fira code', 'Consolas', Monaco, 'Hannotate SC',
    32→    monospace, -apple-system;
    33→}
    34→
    35→@theme {
    36→  --color-accent: #33a6b8;
    37→
    38→  /* Neutral 色阶 — 素 Pure (三档分治, dark mode 自动反转)
    39→     Tier 1 (1-4): 背景/填充    Tier 2 (5-7): 边框/图标/辅助文字    Tier 3 (8-10): 正文/标题 */
    40→  --color-neutral-1: #f8f8f8;
    41→  --color-neutral-2: #f0f0f0;
    42→  --color-neutral-3: #e3e3e3;
    43→  --color-neutral-4: #d0d0d0;
    44→  --color-neutral-5: #a8a8a8;
    45→  --color-neutral-6: #787878;
    46→  --color-neutral-7: #5c5c5c;
    47→  --color-neutral-8: #404040;
    48→  --color-neutral-9: #242424;
    49→  --color-neutral-10: #141414;
    50→
    51→  --color-info: #007aff;
    52→  --color-success: #34c759;
    53→  --color-warning: #ff9500;
    54→  --color-error: #ff3b30;
    55→
    56→  /* border-border utility - 值在 variables.css 中被 :root/[data-theme='dark'] 覆盖 */
    57→  --color-border: rgba(24, 24, 27, 0.1);
    58→
    59→  --color-muted-1: var(--color-neutral-1);
    60→  --color-muted-2: var(--color-neutral-2);
    61→  --color-muted-3: var(--color-neutral-3);
    62→  --color-muted-4: var(--color-neutral-4);
    63→  --color-muted-5: var(--color-neutral-5);
    64→  --color-muted-6: var(--color-neutral-6);
    65→  --color-muted-7: var(--color-neutral-7);
    66→  --color-muted-8: var(--color-neutral-8);
    67→  --color-muted-9: var(--color-neutral-9);
    68→  --color-muted-10: var(--color-neutral-10);
    69→
    70→  --color-themed-bg_opacity: var(--bg-opacity);
    71→}
    72→
    73→@custom-variant dark (&:where(.dark, .dark *, [data-theme="dark"], [data-theme="dark"] *));
    74→
    75→html {
    76→  font-size: 14px;
    77→  line-height: 1.5;
    78→}
    79→
    80→html body {
    81→  @apply max-w-screen overflow-x-hidden;
    82→}
    83→
    84→@media print {
    85→  html {
    86→    font-size: 12px;
    87→  }
    88→}
    89→
    90→/* @media (min-width: 2160px) {
    91→  html {
    92→    font-size: 15px;
    93→  }
    94→} */
    95→
    96→.rich-content {
    97→  text-autospace: normal;
    98→}
    99→
   100→.prose {
   101→  @apply dark:prose-invert;
   102→
   103→  max-width: 100% !important;
   104→  font-size: 1.1rem;
   105→  text-autospace: normal;
   106→
   107→  p {
   108→    @apply break-words;
   109→  }
   110→
   111→  figure img {
   112→    @apply mb-0 mt-0;
   113→  }
   114→}
   115→
   116→@layer utilities {
   117→  *:focus {
   118→    outline: none;
   119→  }
   120→
   121→  * {
   122→    tab-size: 2;
   123→
   124→    @apply border-neutral-9/10;
   125→    &:hover {
   126→      scrollbar-color: auto;
   127→    }
   128→  }
   129→}
   130→
   131→.animate-ping {
   132→  animation: ping 2s cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1) infinite;
   133→}
   134→
   135→@keyframes ping {
   136→  75%,
   137→  100% {
   138→    transform: scale(1.4);
   139→    opacity: 0;
   140→  }
   141→}
   142→
   143→/* input,
   144→textarea {
   145→  font-size: max(16px, 1rem);
   146→} */
   147→
   148→a {
   149→  @apply break-all;
   150→}
   151→
   152→@media (width >= 1024px) {
   153→  input,
   154→  textarea {
   155→    font-size: 1rem;
   156→  }
   157→}
   158→
   159→.prose p:last-child {
   160→  margin-bottom: 0;
   161→}
   162→
   163→.prose
   164→  :where(blockquote):not(:where([class~='not-prose'], [class~='not-prose'] *)) {
   165→  @apply relative border-0;
   166→
   167→  &::before {
   168→    content: '';
   169→    display: block;
   170→    width: 3px;
   171→    height: 100%;
   172→    position: absolute;
   173→    left: 0;
   174→    top: 0;
   175→    border-radius: 1em;
   176→    background-color: var(--color-accent);
   177→  }
   178→}
   179→
   180→@utility radio {
   181→  --size: calc(var(--size-selector, 0.25rem) * 6);
   182→  --input-color: currentColor;
   183→
   184→  cursor: pointer;
   185→  appearance: none;
   186→  vertical-align: middle;
   187→  border: var(--border, 1px) solid
   188→    color-mix(in srgb, var(--input-color) 20%, transparent);
   189→  box-shadow: 0 1px oklch(0% 0 0 / calc(var(--depth, 1) * 0.1)) inset;
   190→  width: var(--size);
   191→  height: var(--size);
   192→  color: var(--input-color);
   193→  border-radius: 9999px;
   194→  flex-shrink: 0;
   195→  padding: 0.25rem;
   196→  display: inline-block;
   197→  position: relative;
   198→
   199→  &::before {
   200→    content: '';
   201→    width: 100%;
   202→    height: 100%;
   203→    display: block;
   204→    border-radius: 9999px;
   205→    background-size: auto, calc(var(--noise, 0) * 100%);
   206→    background-image: none, var(--fx-noise, none);
   207→  }
   208→
   209→  &:focus-visible {
   210→    outline: 2px solid var(--input-color);
   211→    outline-offset: 2px;
   212→  }
   213→
   214→  &:checked,
   215→  &[aria-checked='true'] {
   216→    background-color: var(--color-neutral-1);
   217→    border-color: currentColor;
   218→    animation: radio-pop 0.2s ease-out;
   219→
   220→    &::before {
   221→      box-shadow:
   222→        0 -1px oklch(0% 0 0 / calc(var(--depth, 1) * 0.1)) inset,
   223→        0 8px 0 -4px oklch(100% 0 0 / calc(var(--depth, 1) * 0.1)) inset,
   224→        0 1px oklch(0% 0 0 / calc(var(--depth, 1) * 0.1));
   225→      background-color: currentColor;
   226→    }
   227→  }
   228→
   229→  &:disabled {
   230→    cursor: not-allowed;
   231→    opacity: 0.2;
   232→  }
   233→}
   234→
   235→@utility radio-xs {
   236→  --size: calc(var(--size-selector, 0.25rem) * 4);
   237→  padding: 0.125rem;
   238→}
   239→
   240→@utility radio-sm {
   241→  --size: calc(var(--size-selector, 0.25rem) * 5);
   242→  padding: 0.1875rem;
   243→}
   244→
   245→@utility radio-md {
   246→  --size: calc(var(--size-selector, 0.25rem) * 6);
   247→  padding: 0.25rem;
   248→}

   254→
   255→@utility radio-xl {
   256→  --size: calc(var(--size-selector, 0.25rem) * 8);
   257→  padding: 0.375rem;
   258→}
   259→
   260→@utility radio-accent {
   261→  --input-color: var(--color-accent);
   262→}
   263→
   264→@utility radio-neutral {

   266→}
   267→

   271→
   272→@utility radio-success {

   274→}
   275→
   276→@utility radio-warning {
   277→  --input-color: var(--color-warning);
   278→}
   279→
   280→@utility radio-error {
   281→  --input-color: var(--color-error);
   282→}
   283→
   284→@keyframes radio-pop {
   285→  0% {
   286→    padding: 5px;
   287→  }
   288→  50% {
   289→    padding: 3px;
   290→  }
   291→}

    50→  },

    53→  },

    55→  bilibili: [
    56→    '哔哩哔哩',

    66→  ],
    67→  qq: [

    69→    <i className="i-mingcute-qq-fill" />,
    70→    '#1e6fff',
    71→    (id) => `https://wpa.qq.com/msgrd?v=3&uin=${id}&site=qq&menu=yes`,
    72→  ],
    73→  wechat: [
    74→    '微信',
    75→    <i className="i-mingcute-wechat-fill" />,

    78→  ],

    81→    <i className="i-mingcute-weibo-line" />,

    85→  discord: [
    86→    'Discord',

    90→  ],
    91→  bluesky: [

    97→  steam: [

   102→  ],
   103→}
   104→const icons = Object.keys(iconSet)
   105→
   106→export const isSupportIcon = (icon: string) => icons.includes(icon)
   107→export const SocialIcon = memo((props: SocialIconProps) => {
   108→  const { id, type, variant = 'default' } = props
   109→
   110→  const [name, Icon, iconBg, hrefFn] = useMemo(() => {
   111→    const [name, Icon, iconBg, hrefFn] = (iconSet as any)[type as any] || []
   112→    return [name, Icon, iconBg, hrefFn]
   113→  }, [type])
   114→
   115→  if (!name) return null
   116→  const href = hrefFn(id)
   117→
   118→  if (variant === 'mono') {
   119→    return (
   120→      <FloatPopover
   121→        type="tooltip"
   122→        triggerElement={
   123→          <a
   124→            aria-label={name}
   125→            className="center flex size-9 rounded-full border border-neutral-4 text-neutral-6 transition-colors duration-300"
   126→            href={href}
   127→            rel="noreferrer"
   128→            target="_blank"
   129→            style={
   130→              {
   131→                '--hover-color': iconBg,
   132→              } as React.CSSProperties
   133→            }
   134→            onMouseEnter={(e) => {
   135→              e.currentTarget.style.borderColor = iconBg
   136→              e.currentTarget.style.color = iconBg
   137→            }}
   138→            onMouseLeave={(e) => {
   139→              e.currentTarget.style.borderColor = ''
   140→              e.currentTarget.style.color = ''
   141→            }}
   142→          >
   143→            <span className="flex items-center justify-center [&_svg]:size-4 [&_i]:text-base">
   144→              {Icon}
   145→            </span>
   146→          </a>
   147→        }
   148→      >
   149→        {name}
   150→      </FloatPopover>
   151→    )
   152→  }
   153→
   154→  return (
   155→    <FloatPopover
   156→      type="tooltip"
   157→      triggerElement={
   158→        <MotionButtonBase
   159→          className="center flex aspect-square size-10 rounded-full text-2xl text-white"
   160→          style={{
   161→            background: iconBg,
   162→          }}
   163→        >
   164→          <a
   165→            className="center flex"
   166→            href={href}
   167→            rel="noreferrer"
   168→            target="_blank"
   169→          >
   170→            {Icon}
   171→          </a>
   172→        </MotionButtonBase>
   173→      }
   174→    >
   175→      {name}
   176→    </FloatPopover>
   177→  )
   178→})
   179→SocialIcon.displayName = 'SocialIcon'

    30→  )

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 2026-03-15 11:41:40Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentBlockButton.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
     4→import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react'
     5→
     6→import { useModalStack } from '~/components/ui/modal'
     7→
     8→import { CommentModal } from '../shared/CommentModal'
     9→import type { BlockInfo } from './anchor-utils'
    10→import { buildBlockAnchorFromIndex } from './anchor-utils'
    11→import { useRichContentElement } from './RichContentElementContext'
    12→
    13→export function CommentBlockButton({
    14→  containerRef,
    15→  blockInfos,
    16→  refId,
    17→  title,
    18→}: {
    19→  containerRef: React.RefObject<HTMLElement | null>
    20→  blockInfos: BlockInfo[]
    21→  refId: string
    22→  title: string
    23→}) {
    24→  const contentEl = useRichContentElement()
    25→  const [hoverIndex, setHoverIndex] = useState(-1)
    26→  const [btnPos, setBtnPos] = useState({ top: 0, right: 0 })
    27→  const btnRef = useRef<HTMLButtonElement>(null)
    28→  const { present } = useModalStack()
    29→  const t = useTranslations('common')
    30→
    31→  const handleMouseMove = useCallback(
    32→    (e: MouseEvent) => {
    33→      const container = containerRef.current
    34→      if (!container || !contentEl) return
    35→
    36→      const { children } = contentEl
    37→      const containerRect = container.getBoundingClientRect()
    38→
    39→      for (let i = 0; i < children.length; i++) {
    40→        const child = children[i] as HTMLElement
    41→        const rect = child.getBoundingClientRect()
    42→        if (e.clientY >= rect.top && e.clientY <= rect.bottom) {
    43→          setHoverIndex(i)
    44→          setBtnPos({
    45→            top: rect.top - containerRect.top + 4,
    46→            right: 0,
    47→          })
    48→          return
    49→        }
    50→      }
    51→      setHoverIndex(-1)
    52→    },
    53→    [containerRef],
    54→  )
    55→
    56→  const handleMouseLeave = useCallback(() => {
    57→    setHoverIndex(-1)
    58→  }, [])
    59→
    60→  useEffect(() => {
    61→    const container = containerRef.current
    62→    if (!container) return
    63→
    64→    container.addEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove)
    65→    container.addEventListener('mouseleave', handleMouseLeave)
    66→    return () => {
    67→      container.removeEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove)
    68→      container.removeEventListener('mouseleave', handleMouseLeave)
    69→    }
    70→  }, [containerRef, handleMouseMove, handleMouseLeave])
    71→
    72→  if (hoverIndex < 0) return null
    73→
    74→  return (
    75→    <button
    76→      className="absolute z-10 flex size-6 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-neutral-3/80 text-neutral-7 opacity-0 transition-opacity hover:bg-accent/20 hover:text-accent group-hover/comment-block:opacity-100"
    77→      ref={btnRef}
    78→      type="button"
    79→      style={{
    80→        top: btnPos.top,
    81→        right: btnPos.right,
    82→      }}
    83→      onClick={() => {
    84→        const anchor = buildBlockAnchorFromIndex(blockInfos, hoverIndex)
    85→        present({
    86→          title: t('selection_comment'),
    87→          content: (rest) => (
    88→            <CommentModal
    89→              anchor={anchor}
    90→              refId={refId}
    91→              title={title}
    92→              {...rest}
    93→            />
    94→          ),
    95→        })
    96→      }}
    97→    >
    98→      <i className="icon-[mingcute--comment-line] text-sm" />
    99→    </button>
   100→  )
   101→}
   102→
```
</details></tool-use>

    23→  isWikipediaUrl,
    24→  isXiaoHongShuUrl,
    25→  isZhihuUrl,
    26→} from '~/lib/link-parser'
    27→
    28→const platformMap = [
    29→  {
    30→    type: 'GH',
    31→    icon: <GitHubBrandIcon className="text-[#1D2127] dark:text-[#FFFFFF]" />,
    32→    test: isGithubUrl,
    33→  },
    34→  { type: 'TW', icon: <TwitterIcon />, test: isTwitterUrl },
    35→  {
    36→    type: 'TG',
    37→    icon: <IcBaselineTelegram className="text-[#2AABEE]" />,
    38→    test: isTelegramUrl,
    39→  },
    40→  {
    41→    type: 'BL',
    42→    icon: <BilibiliIcon className="text-[#469ECF]" />,
    43→    test: isBilibiliUrl,
    44→  },
    45→  {
    46→    type: 'ZH',
    47→    icon: <SimpleIconsZhihu className="text-[#0084FF]" />,
    48→    test: isZhihuUrl,
    49→  },
    50→  {
    51→    type: 'WI',
    52→    icon: <WikipediaIcon className="text-current" />,
    53→    test: isWikipediaUrl,
    54→  },
    55→  {
    56→    type: 'TMDB',
    57→    icon: (
    58→      <SimpleIconsThemoviedatabase className="text-[#0D243F] dark:text-[#5CB7D2]" />
    59→    ),
    60→    test: isTMDBUrl,
    61→  },
    62→  {
    63→    type: 'Moz',
    64→    icon: <CibMozilla className="text-[#8cb4ff]" />,
    65→    test: isMozillaUrl,
    66→  },
    67→  { type: 'Npm', icon: <VscodeIconsFileTypeNpm />, test: isNpmUrl },
    68→  {
    69→    type: 'Figma',
    70→    icon: <SimpleIconsFigma className="text-[#A259FF]" />,
    71→    test: isFigmaUrl,
    72→  },
    73→  {
    74→    type: 'XHS',
    75→    icon: <SimpleIconsXiaohongshu className="text-[#FE2442]" />,
    76→    test: isXiaoHongShuUrl,
    77→  },
    78→] as const
    79→
    80→export type PlatformType = (typeof platformMap)[number]['type']
    81→
    82→export const platformIconMap = Object.fromEntries(
    83→  platformMap.map((item) => [item.type, item.icon]),
    84→) as Record<PlatformType, React.ReactNode>
    85→
    86→export function getPlatformFromUrl(url: URL): PlatformType | null {
    87→  return platformMap.find((item) => item.test(url))?.type ?? null
    88→}
    89→
```

     1→import type { SVGProps } from 'react'

### 6. ICON COMPONENT USAGE PATTERNS

**Pattern 1: Direct Mingcute CSS Class**
```tsx
<i className="i-mingcute-github-line" />
```
Files: 87+ component files across the codebase

**Pattern 2: Mingcute Wrapped in Component**
```tsx
export function ThumbsupIcon() {
  return <i className="i-mingcute-thumb-up-line" />
}
```
Files: `thumbs-up.tsx`, `TiltedSendIcon.tsx`, `XIcon.tsx`

**Pattern 3: SVG Component with Props**
```tsx
export function CloseIcon({ className }) {
  return <svg className={className} .../>
}
```
Files: `close.tsx`, `comment.tsx`, emoji icons, platform icons

**Pattern 4: Arbitrary Icon Value (Tailwind)**
```tsx
<i className="icon-[mingcute--comment-line]" />
```
Location: `CommentBlockButton.tsx`

**Pattern 5: Icon in Toast/Notification**
```tsx
success: jsx('i', { className: 'i-mingcute-check-fill' })
```
Location: `lib/toast.ts`

### 7. ICON USAGE BY FEATURE/CONTEXT

**Navigation & UI Controls:**
- Menu: `i-mingcute-menu-line`
- Dashboard: `i-mingcute-dashboard-line`, `i-mingcute-dashboard-2-line`, `i-mingcute-dashboard-3-line`
- Settings: `i-mingcute-settings-5-line`, `i-mingcute-settings-6-line`
- Language: `i-mingcute-translate-2-line`
- Theme: `i-mingcute-sun-line`, `i-mingcute-moon-line`, `i-mingcute-computer-line`

**Content Actions:**
- Add: `i-mingcute-add-line`, `i-mingcute-add-circle-line`
- Edit: `i-mingcute-pen-line`, `i-mingcute-edit-line`, `i-mingcute-quill-pen-line`
- Delete: `i-mingcute-delete-line`, `i-mingcute-delete-2-line`
- Copy: `i-mingcute-copy-line`, `i-mingcute-copy-2-fill`
- Share: `i-mingcute-share-forward-line`
- Pin: `i-mingcute-pin-line`

**Feedback & Status:**
- Success: `i-mingcute-check-fill`, `i-mingcute-check-circle-line`, `i-mingcute-check-line`
- Error: `i-mingcute-close-fill`, `i-mingcute-close-circle-line`, `i-mingcute-close-line`
- Warning: `i-mingcute-warning-line`, `i-mingcute-alert-line`, `i-mingcute-alert-fill`
- Info: `i-mingcute-information-line`, `i-mingcute-information-fill`
- Loading: `i-mingcute-loading-line`, `i-mingcute-loading-3-line`, `i-mingcute-loading-3-fill`

**Media & Display:**
- Play: `i-mingcute-play-fill`
- Pause: `i-mingcute-pause-fill`
- Fullscreen: `i-mingcute-fullscreen-2-line`, `i-mingcute-fullscreen-exit-fill`
- Download: `i-mingcute-download-2-fill`, `i-mingcute-download-2-line`
- Volume: `i-mingcute-volume-fill`, `i-mingcute-volume-mute-fill`
- Image: `i-mingcute-image-line`, `i-mingcute-camera-line`
- Gallery: `i-mingcute-left-fill`, `i-mingcute-right-fill`

**Engagement:**
- Like/Heart: `i-mingcute-heart-line`, `i-mingcute-heart-fill`, `i-mingcute-heart-crack-line`
- Comment: `i-mingcute-comment-line`, `i-mingcute-comment-2-line`, `icon-[mingcute--comment-line]`
- Star: `i-mingcute-star-line`
- Thumbs up: `i-mingcute-thumb-up-line`

**Social & Communication:**
- GitHub: `i-mingcute-github-line`
- Twitter: `i-mingcute-twitter-line`
- X (social): `i-mingcute-social-x-line`
- Telegram: `i-mingcute-telegram-line`
- Email: `i-mingcute-mail-line`
- RSS: `i-mingcute-rss-line`, `i-mingcute-rss-fill`
- Discord: `i-mingcute-discord-fill`
- QQ: `i-mingcute-qq-fill`
- WeChat: `i-mingcute-wechat-fill`
- Weibo: `i-mingcute-weibo-line`

**Navigation:**
- Up: `i-mingcute-up-line`, `i-mingcute-arow-to-up-line`, `i-mingcute-arrow-up-circle-line`
- Down: `i-mingcute-down-line`, `i-mingcute-arrow-to-down-line`

- Back/Return: `i-mingcute-arrow-left-circle-line`

**Content Types:**
- Code: `i-mingcute-code-line`
- Document: `i-mingcute-document-line`, `i-mingcute-file-line`
- Table/List: `i-mingcute-table-2-line`, `i-mingcute-list-collapse-line`, `i-mingcute-list-expansion-line`

- Topic: `i-mingcute-table-2-line` (notes topics)

**Miscellaneous:**
- Eye: `i-mingcute-eye-line`, `i-mingcute-eye-close-line`, `i-mingcute-eye-2-line`
- External link: `i-mingcute-external-link-line`

- Emoji: `i-mingcute-emoji-line`, `i-mingcute-emoji-2-line`
- Refresh: `i-mingcute-refresh-2-line`
- Sparkles: `i-mingcute-sparkles-line`

- Translate: `i-mingcute-translate-2-line`
- Font/Typography: `i-mingcute-font-line`
- User visibility: `i-mingcute-user-visible-line`
- Exit: `i-mingcute-exit-line`
- Send/Plane: `i-mingcute-send-plane-line`

| 自定义 SVG 组件 (icons/) | ~30 | 手写 SVG |
| Platform SVG 组件 (icons/platform/) | 22 | 手写 SVG |

---

## 迁移映射表

### 一、通用 UI 图标 → Lucide（★ = lucide-animated 可用）

| `add-circle-line` | `circle-plus` | |
| `add-line` | `plus` | ★ |
| `ai-fill` | `sparkles` | ★ |

### 二、Material Symbols → Lucide

| `notifications-active-outline` | `bell` | ★ |

### 三、品牌/Logo 图标 → Simple Icons

| 现用 (mingcute CSS 或 SVG 组件) | → Simple Icons slug |
|---|---|
| `discord-fill` / Discord SVG | `discord` |
| `github-line` / GitHubBrandIcon | `github` |
| `social-x-line` / XIcon | `x` |
| `twitter-line` / TwitterIcon | `x` |
| `telegram-line` / Telegram SVG | `telegram` |
| `qq-fill` | `tencentqq` |
| `wechat-fill` | `wechat` |
| `weibo-line` | `sinaweibo` |
| AppleIcon | `apple` |
| BilibiliIcon | `bilibili` |
| BlueskyIcon | `bluesky` |
| FacebookIcon | `facebook` |
| FigmaIcon | `figma` |
| GoogleBrandIcon | `google` |
| MicrosoftIcon | `microsoft` |
| MozillaIcon | `mozilla` |
| NeteaseCloudMusicIcon | `neteasecloudmusic` |
| NpmIcon | `npm` |
| OpenAIIcon | `openai` |
| SteamIcon | `steam` |
| TheMovieDBIcon | `themoviedatabase` |
| WikipediaIcon | `wikipedia` |
| XiaoHongShuIcon | `xiaohongshu` |
| ZhihuIcon | `zhihu` |

### 四、自定义 SVG 组件保留评估

以下组件非通用图标，lucide/simple-icons 无对应，**建议保留**：

- `AppearanceIcon` — 双态主题切换 SVG
- `ArrowIcon` (自定义箭头动画)
- `BookmarkOutlineIcon` / `BookmarkFilledIcon` — 可替换为 lucide `bookmark` ★
- `SolarCalendarBold` — 可替换为 lucide `calendar-days`
- `CreativeCommonsIcon` — simple-icons `creativecommons`
- `ClockOutlineIcon` / `ClockFilledIcon` — 可替换为 lucide `clock` ★
- `EmptyIcon` — 空态插画，保留
- `ProgressIcon` — Canvas 渲染，保留
- `weather icons` — lucide 有 `cloud-sun`/`cloud-rain` 等 ★
- `emoji icons` — 自定义 emoji 插画，保留
- `status icons` — 在线/离线状态，保留

---

## 实施方案

**依赖变更：**
```diff
# 移除
- @egoist/tailwindcss-icons
- @iconify-json/mingcute
- @iconify-json/material-symbols

# 新增
+ lucide-react
+ lucide-animated        # 动画图标
+ simple-icons           # 品牌 logo（SVG path 数据）
```

**迁移策略：**

1. **CSS class → React 组件**：所有 `<i className="i-mingcute-*" />` 替换为 `<LucideIcon />` 组件导入
2. **Animated 优先**：凡 lucide-animated 可用者（上表 ★），优先用动画版
3. **Platform 目录重构**：`icons/platform/` 下 22 个 SVG 组件统一改用 simple-icons 数据
4. **保留自定义**：上述评估中标注"保留"的组件不动

涉及文件约 **90+**，规模甚大。君欲如何分步推进？可按模块（UI 控件 → 内容操作 → 社交品牌 → 自定义组件）逐批迁移。

---

<tool-use data-tool-type="unknown" data-tool-name="mcp__plugin_context7_context7__query-docs"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **mcp__plugin_context7_context7__query-docs**</summary>

```text
### Install Animated Icon using npx

Source: https://context7_llms

This command installs a specific animated icon from the lucide-animated collection using npx. It requires replacing '{icon-name}' with the actual name of the desired icon in kebab-case.

```bash
npx shadcn@latest add "https://lucide-animated.com/r/{icon-name}.json"
```

--------------------------------

### Render Lucide Animated Icon in React

Source: https://context7_llms

This snippet demonstrates how to import and render a Lucide animated icon as a React component. It requires the icon component to be imported from '@/components/icons/activity' and accepts className props for styling.

```tsx
import { Activity } from '@/components/icons/activity';

export function MyComponent() {
  return <Activity className="size-6" />;
}
```

### lucide-animated

Source: https://context7_llms

lucide-animated is an open-source (MIT License) collection of smooth animated icons for React projects.

--------------------------------

### lucide-animated > Tech Stack

Source: https://context7_llms

This project utilizes React components with TypeScript for building the icons. The animations are powered by Motion (https://motion.dev), and the icon set is based on the popular Lucide icons (https://lucide.dev).
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-15 11:49:17Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="unknown" data-tool-name="mcp__plugin_context7_context7__query-docs"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **mcp__plugin_context7_context7__query-docs**</summary>

```text
### Import Specific Simple Icons in JavaScript

Source: https://github.com/simple-icons/simple-icons/blob/develop/README.md

Demonstrates how to import individual Simple Icons by their slug in JavaScript, supporting both ES module (import) and CommonJS (require) syntax. Recommends using a bundler for tree shaking.

```javascript
// Import a specific icon by its slug as:
// import { si[ICON SLUG] } from 'simple-icons'

// For example:
// use import/esm to allow tree shaking
import {siSimpleicons} from 'simple-icons';
// or with require/cjs
const {siSimpleicons} = require('simple-icons');
```

--------------------------------

### Examine Simple Icon Object Structure in JavaScript

Source: https://github.com/simple-icons/simple-icons/blob/develop/README.md

Illustrates the structure of an icon object returned when importing a Simple Icon in JavaScript. It includes properties like title, slug, hex color, source, SVG data, and optional guidelines/license information.

```javascript
console.log(siSimpleicons);

/*
{
    title: 'Simple Icons',
    slug: 'simpleicons',
    hex: '111111',
    source: 'https://simpleicons.org/',
    svg: '<svg role="img" viewBox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">...</svg>',
    path: 'M12 12v-1.5c-2.484 ...',
    guidelines: 'https://simpleicons.org/styleguide',
    license: {
        type: '...',
        url: 'https://example.com/'
    }
}

NOTE: the `guidelines` entry will be `undefined` if we do not yet have guidelines for the icon.
NOTE: the `license` entry will be `undefined` if we do not yet have license data for the icon.
*/
```

--------------------------------

### Install Simple Icons npm Package

Source: https://github.com/simple-icons/simple-icons/blob/develop/README.md

Instructions to install the Simple Icons package using npm for Node.js projects. This package provides access to all icons for local usage.

```shell
npm install simple-icons
```

--------------------------------

### Import Simple Icon Type Definitions in TypeScript

Source: https://github.com/simple-icons/simple-icons/blob/develop/README.md

Explains how to import the `SimpleIcon` type definition in TypeScript, which is bundled with the Simple Icons npm package, for enhanced type safety.

```typescript
import type {SimpleIcon} from 'simple-icons';
```

--------------------------------

### Access Simple Icons Data using JavaScript SDK

Source: https://github.com/simple-icons/simple-icons/blob/develop/CONTRIBUTING.md

This JavaScript code snippet shows how to import and use the `getIconsData` function from the `simple-icons/sdk` entrypoint. It includes a JSDoc type definition for `IconData` and demonstrates retrieving a Promise that resolves to an array of icon data, supporting the creation of third-party extensions.

```javascript
import {getIconsData} from 'simple-icons/sdk';

/* @typedef {import("./simple-icons/sdk").IconData} IconData */

/* @type {Promise<IconData[]>} */
const iconsData = getIconsData();
```
```

 `https://lucide-animated.com/r/search.json`

```text
# Complete Raw JSON Structure

```json
{
  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema/registry-item.json",
  "name": "search",
  "type": "registry:ui",
  "registryDependencies": [],
  "dependencies": ["motion"],
  "devDependencies": [],
  "files": [
    {
      "path": "search.tsx",
      "content": "\"use client\";\n\nimport { motion, useAnimation } from \"motion/react\";\nimport type { HTMLAttributes } from \"react\";\nimport { forwardRef, useCallback, useImperativeHandle, useRef } from \"react\";\n\nimport { cn } from \"@/lib/utils\";\n\nexport interface SearchIconHandle {\n  startAnimation: () => void;\n  stopAnimation: () => void;\n}\n\ninterface SearchIconProps extends HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement> {\n  size?: number;\n}\n\nconst SearchIcon = forwardRef<SearchIconHandle, SearchIconProps>(\n  ({ onMouseEnter, onMouseLeave, className, size = 28, ...props }, ref) => {\n    const controls = useAnimation();\n    const isControlledRef = useRef(false);\n\n    useImperativeHandle(ref, () => {\n      isControlledRef.current = true;\n\n      return {\n        startAnimation: () => controls.start(\"animate\"),\n        stopAnimation: () => controls.start(\"normal\"),\n      };\n    });\n\n    const handleMouseEnter = useCallback(\n      (e: React.MouseEvent<HTMLDivElement>) => {\n        if (isControlledRef.current) {\n          onMouseEnter?.(e);\n        } else {\n          controls.start(\"animate\");\n        }\n      },\n      [controls, onMouseEnter]\n    );\n\n    const handleMouseLeave = useCallback(\n      (e: React.MouseEvent<HTMLDivElement>) => {\n        if (isControlledRef.current) {\n          onMouseLeave?.(e);\n        } else {\n          controls.start(\"normal\");\n        }\n      },\n      [controls, onMouseLeave]\n    );\n\n    return (\n      <div\n        className={cn(className)}\n        onMouseEnter={handleMouseEnter}\n        onMouseLeave={handleMouseLeave}\n        {...props}\n      >\n        <motion.svg\n          animate={controls}\n          fill=\"none\"\n          height={size}\n          stroke=\"currentColor\"\n          strokeLinecap=\"round\"\n          strokeLinejoin=\"round\"\n          strokeWidth=\"2\"\n          transition={{\n            duration: 1,\n            bounce: 0.3,\n          }}\n          variants={{\n            normal: { x: 0, y: 0 },\n            animate: {\n              x: [0, 0, -3, 0],\n              y: [0, -4, 0, 0],\n            },\n          }}\n          viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n          width={size}\n          xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\"\n        >\n          <circle cx=\"11\" cy=\"11\" r=\"8\" />\n          <path d=\"m21 21-4.3-4.3\" />\n        </motion.svg>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n);\n\nSearchIcon.displayName = \"SearchIcon\";\n\nexport { SearchIcon };\n",
      "type": "registry:ui"
    }
  ]
}
```

## Key Fields Summary:
- **Schema**: shadcn/ui registry item format
- **Runtime dependency**: motion/react animation library
- **No dev dependencies**
- **Single file**: TypeScript React component
- **Exports**: SearchIcon component with ref handle interface supporting manual animation control
```

<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```tsx
import type { SimpleIcon as SimpleIconType } from 'simple-icons'

export function SimpleIcon({
  icon,
  className,
  ...props
}: {
  icon: SimpleIconType
  className?: string
} & React.SVGProps<SVGSVGElement>) {
  return (
    <svg
      role="img"
      viewBox="0 0 24 24"
      fill="currentColor"
      className={className}
      {...props}
    >
      <path d={icon.path} />
    </svg>
  )
}

```

```text
File created successfully at: <REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/icons/SimpleIcon.tsx
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-15 11:53:20Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="Bash"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Bash**</summary>
Batch-fetch animated icons from lucide-animated.com registry

```bash
cat > /tmp/fetch-animated-icons.mjs << 'SCRIPT'
const icons = [
  'plus', 'sparkles', 'chevron-down', 'arrow-left', 'arrow-right', 'arrow-up-right',
  'book-text', 'message-circle', 'circle-check', 'check', 'x', 'message-square',
  'copy', 'delete', 'file-text', 'download', 'square-pen', 'smile', 'logout',
  'eye', 'eye-off', 'maximize', 'minimize', 'heart', 'key', 'chevron-left',
  'link', 'loader-pinwheel', 'menu', 'moon', 'pause', 'pen-tool', 'play',
  'circle-help', 'feather', 'refresh-cw', 'chevron-right', 'search', 'send',
  'settings', 'sun', 'clock', 'languages', 'chevron-up', 'user', 'user-check',
  'volume', 'bell', 'bookmark', 'monitor-check', 'circle-arrow-right'
];

const outDir = '<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/icons/animated';

async function fetchIcon(name) {
  try {
    const res = await fetch(`https://lucide-animated.com/r/${name}.json`);
    if (!res.ok) {
      console.log(`SKIP ${name}: ${res.status}`);
      return null;
    }
    const json = await res.json();
    const file = json.files?.[0];
    if (!file) {
      console.log(`SKIP ${name}: no files`);
      return null;
    }
    // Remove cn import line and replace cn(...) with clsx(...)
    let code = file.content;
    code = code.replace(/import\s*\{\s*cn\s*\}\s*from\s*["']@\/lib\/utils["'];?\n?/g, '');
    code = code.replace(/\bcn\(/g, 'clsx(');
    // Add clsx import if used
    if (code.includes('clsx(')) {
      code = code.replace(/"use client";\n/, '"use client";\n\nimport clsx from "clsx";\n');
    }
    const fs = await import('fs');
    fs.writeFileSync(`${outDir}/${name}.tsx`, code);
    console.log(`OK ${name}`);
    return name;
  } catch (e) {
    console.log(`ERR ${name}: ${e.message}`);
    return null;
  }
}

async function main() {
  const results = await Promise.all(icons.map(fetchIcon));
  const ok = results.filter(Boolean);
  console.log(`\nFetched ${ok.length}/${icons.length} animated icons`);
}

main();
SCRIPT
node /tmp/fetch-animated-icons.mjs
```

_**Agent - sidechain (2026-03-15 11:55:37Z)**_

You are migrating icons in the Shiroi project from mingcute/material-symbols CSS classes to lucide-react + lucide-animated components.

## MIGRATION RULES

### Pattern 1: Static icon (no animated version, or passive context)
```tsx
// BEFORE
<i className="i-mingcute-rss-line size-4 text-accent" />

// AFTER
import { Rss } from 'lucide-react'
<Rss className="size-4 text-accent" />
```

### Pattern 2: Animated icon (interactive context like buttons, links, toggles)
```tsx
// BEFORE
<i className="i-mingcute-search-line" />

// AFTER
import { SearchIcon } from '@/components/icons/animated/search'
<SearchIcon className="size-4" size={16} />
```
Note: animated icons use a `size` prop for SVG dimensions. Map common Tailwind sizes: size-3=12, size-3.5=14, size-4=16, size-5=20, size-6=24. The `className` goes on the wrapper div.

### Pattern 3: Loading spinner (special case - needs animation CSS class)
```tsx
// BEFORE
<i className="i-mingcute-loading-3-line animate-spin" />

// AFTER  
import { Loader2 } from 'lucide-react'
<Loader2 className="animate-spin size-4" />
```
Note: for loading spinners, use `Loader2` from lucide-react (NOT animated version), keep the `animate-spin` class.

### Icon name mapping (mingcute → lucide-react import name):
- add-circle-line → CirclePlus
- add-line → Plus
- ai-fill → Sparkles
- alert-fill/alert-line → TriangleAlert
- align-arrow-down-line → ChevronsDownUp (or ChevronDown depending on context)
- arow-to-up-line → ArrowUpToLine
- arrow-left-circle-line → CircleArrowLeft
- arrow-left-line → ArrowLeft
- arrow-right-circle-line → CircleArrowRight
- arrow-right-line → ArrowRight
- arrow-right-up-line → ArrowUpRight
- arrow-to-down-line → ArrowDownToLine
- arrow-up-circle-line → CircleArrowUp
- book-6-line → BookText
- camera-line → Camera
- cat-line → Cat
- chat-3-line → MessageCircle
- check-circle-line → CircleCheck
- check-fill/check-line → Check
- close-circle-line → CircleX
- close-fill/close-line → X
- code-line → Code
- comment-2-line → MessageSquare
- comment-line → MessageCircle
- computer-line → Monitor
- copy-2-fill/copy-fill/copy-line → Copy
- dashboard-*-line → LayoutDashboard
- delete-2-line/delete-line → Trash2/Trash
- discord-fill → use SimpleIcon (brand)
- document-line → FileText
- down-line → ChevronDown
- download-2-fill/download-2-line → Download
- edit-2-line/edit-line → SquarePen
- emoji-2-line/emoji-line → Smile
- exit-line → LogOut
- external-link-line → ExternalLink
- eye-2-line/eye-line → Eye
- eye-close-line → EyeOff
- file-line → File
- font-line → Type
- fullscreen-2-fill/fullscreen-2-line → Maximize
- fullscreen-exit-fill → Minimize
- github-line → use SimpleIcon (brand) or import from lucide-react as Github
- hashtag-line → Hash
- heart-crack-line → HeartCrack
- heart-fill/heart-line → Heart
- image-line → Image
- information-fill/information-line → Info
- key-1-line → Key
- left-fill → ChevronLeft
- link-3-line → Link
- list-collapse-line → ListCollapse
- list-expansion-line → List
- loading-3-fill/loading-3-line/loading-line → Loader2 (use with animate-spin)
- mail-line → Mail
- menu-line → Menu
- moon-line → Moon
- pause-fill → Pause
- pen-line → Pen
- pin-line → Pin
- play-fill → Play
- qq-fill → use SimpleIcon (brand)
- question-line → CircleHelp
- quill-pen-line → Feather
- refresh-2-line → RefreshCw
- right-fill → ChevronRight
- rss-fill/rss-line → Rss
- search-line → Search
- send-plane-line → Send
- settings-5-line/settings-6-line → Settings
- share-forward-line → Share
- social-x-line → use SimpleIcon (brand)
- sparkles-line → Sparkles
- star-line → Star
- sun-line → Sun
- table-2-line → Table
- telegram-line → use SimpleIcon (brand)
- thumb-up-line → ThumbsUp
- time-line → Clock
- translate-2-line → Languages
- twitter-line → use SimpleIcon (brand)
- up-line → ChevronUp
- user-4-line → User
- user-visible-line → UserCheck
- volume-fill → Volume2
- volume-mute-fill → VolumeX
- warning-line → TriangleAlert
- wechat-fill → use SimpleIcon (brand)
- weibo-line → use SimpleIcon (brand)

Material Symbols mapping:
- arrow-circle-right-outline-rounded → CircleArrowRight
- dynamic-form-outline → SquarePen
- notifications-active-outline → Bell

### Animated icon file mapping (import from `@/components/icons/animated/{name}`):
plus, sparkles, chevron-down, arrow-left, arrow-right, arrow-up-right, book-text, message-circle, circle-check, check, x, message-square, copy, delete, file-text, download, square-pen, smile, logout, eye, eye-off, maximize, minimize, heart, key, chevron-left, link, loader-pinwheel, menu, moon, pause, pen-tool, play, circle-help, feather, refresh-cw, chevron-right, search, send, settings, sun, clock, languages, chevron-up, user, user-check, volume, bell, bookmark, monitor-check

Each exports `{PascalName}Icon` (e.g., `search.tsx` exports `SearchIcon`, `chevron-down.tsx` exports `ChevronDownIcon`).

### When to use animated vs static:
- **Animated**: Buttons, toggles, interactive links, FABs, action icons that users click/hover
- **Static**: Inline metadata display, list decorators, status indicators, table cells, toasts

### For brand icons (discord, github, twitter/x, telegram, qq, wechat, weibo):
```tsx
import { SimpleIcon } from '@/components/icons/SimpleIcon'
import { siGithub } from 'simple-icons'
<SimpleIcon icon={siGithub} className="size-4" />
```
Simple-icons slugs: discord, github, x, telegram, tencentqq, wechat, sinaweibo

### Important notes:
- Keep all other className values (colors, spacing, etc.) - only replace the icon class
- When an `<i>` tag ONLY had the icon class + size, convert it to the Lucide component with the size in className
- When an `<i>` tag had additional classes, transfer non-icon classes to the new component's className
- For `icon-[mingcute--comment-line]` arbitrary syntax, same rules apply
- Remove any empty className props
- Add necessary imports at top of file (maintain existing import style)
- Do NOT add React import (project uses new JSX transform)

## FILES TO MIGRATE (Batch 1 - Core UI components)

Read each file, understand the icon usage context, then apply the migration. Make the edits directly. Be precise with imports - only import what's needed.

IMPORTANT: For toast.ts / toast related files that use createElement or jsx() patterns with icon classes, you need to adapt the pattern since Lucide icons are React components, not CSS classes. For example:
```ts
// BEFORE
icon: jsx('i', { className: 'i-mingcute-check-fill text-green-500' })
// AFTER  
import { Check } from 'lucide-react'
icon: jsx(Check, { className: 'text-green-500 size-4' })
```

 `./apps/web/src/lib/toast.ts`

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→import type { JSX } from 'react'
     3→import { jsx } from 'react/jsx-runtime'
     4→import type { ExternalToast } from 'sonner'
     5→import { toast as sonnerToast } from 'sonner'
     6→
     7→const defaultOptions: ExternalToast = {
     8→  duration: 3000,
     9→  closeButton: true,
    10→}
    11→interface CustomToastOptions {
    12→  autoClose?: number | false
    13→  iconElement?: JSX.Element
    14→  onClick?: () => void
    15→}
    16→
    17→type SonnerType = 'success' | 'error' | 'info' | 'warning'
    18→const iconNodeMap: Record<SonnerType, JSX.Element> = {
    19→  success: jsx('i', { className: 'i-mingcute-check-fill' }),
    20→  error: jsx('i', { className: 'i-mingcute-close-fill' }),
    21→  info: jsx('i', {
    22→    className: 'i-mingcute-information-fill',
    23→  }),
    24→  warning: jsx('i', {
    25→    className: 'i-mingcute-alert-fill',
    26→  }),
    27→}
    28→
    29→const toast = {} as {
    30→  success: (
    31→    message: string,
    32→    options?: ExternalToast & CustomToastOptions,
    33→  ) => ReturnType<typeof sonnerToast.success>
    34→  info: (
    35→    message: string,
    36→    options?: ExternalToast & CustomToastOptions,
    37→  ) => ReturnType<typeof sonnerToast.info>
    38→  warn: (
    39→    message: string,
    40→    options?: ExternalToast & CustomToastOptions,
    41→  ) => ReturnType<typeof sonnerToast.warning>
    42→  error: (
    43→    message: string,
    44→    options?: ExternalToast & CustomToastOptions,
    45→  ) => ReturnType<typeof sonnerToast.error>
    46→  dismiss: (id?: string | number) => void
    47→}
    48→;['success', 'info', 'warn', 'error'].forEach((type) => {
    49→  // @ts-ignore
    50→  toast[type] = (
    51→    message: string,
    52→    options?: ExternalToast & CustomToastOptions,
    53→  ) => {
    54→    // const toastCaller = toast.ca
    55→    const map = {
    56→      success: sonnerToast.success,
    57→      info: sonnerToast.info,
    58→      warn: sonnerToast.warning,
    59→      error: sonnerToast.error,
    60→    }
    61→
    62→    const finalIconElement =
    63→      options?.iconElement || iconNodeMap[type as SonnerType]
    64→
    65→    const finalDuration =
    66→      typeof options?.autoClose === 'number'
    67→        ? options.autoClose
    68→        : typeof options?.autoClose === 'boolean'
    69→          ? options.autoClose === false
    70→            ? Infinity
    71→            : defaultOptions.duration
    72→          : defaultOptions.duration
    73→    return map[type as keyof typeof map](message, {
    74→      ...defaultOptions,
    75→      duration: finalDuration,
    76→      icon: finalIconElement,
    77→      ...options,
    78→    })
    79→  }
    80→})
    81→
    82→toast.dismiss = (id?: string | number) => sonnerToast.dismiss(id)
    83→
    84→export { toast }
    85→
```

```text
     1→'use client'

     3→import { Select as SelectImpl } from '@base-ui/react/select'
     4→import type { PropsWithChildren } from 'react'
     5→import * as React from 'react'

     7→import { clsxm } from '~/lib/helper'
     8→
     9→export type SelectValue<T> = {
    10→  value: T
    11→  label: string
    12→}
    13→
    14→interface SelectProps<T> {
    15→  isLoading?: boolean
    16→  onChange: (
    17→    value: T,
    18→    item: {
    19→      value: T
    20→      label: string
    21→    },
    22→  ) => void
    23→  placeholder?: string
    24→
    25→  value: T
    26→  values: SelectValue<T>[]
    27→}
    28→
    29→export const Select = function Select<T>(
    30→  props: SelectProps<T> & {
    31→    className?: string
    32→  },
    33→) {
    34→  const { value, className, values, onChange, isLoading, placeholder } = props
    35→
    36→  return (
    37→    <SelectImpl.Root
    38→      items={values}
    39→      value={value as any}
    40→      onValueChange={(next) => {
    41→        if (next == null) return
    42→        const item = values.find((item) => Object.is(item.value, next))
    43→        if (!item) return
    44→        onChange(next as T, item)
    45→      }}
    46→    >
    47→      <SelectImpl.Trigger
    48→        className={clsxm(
    49→          'border-border inline-flex w-full items-center justify-between gap-1 rounded-lg border',
    50→          'p-2',
    51→          'text-[0.9em]',
    52→
    53→          className,
    54→        )}
    55→      >
    56→        <SelectImpl.Value placeholder={placeholder} />
    57→        <SelectImpl.Icon className="flex items-center">
    58→          {isLoading ? (
    59→            <i className="i-mingcute-loading-line animate-spin" />
    60→          ) : (
    61→            <i className="i-mingcute-down-line" />
    62→          )}
    63→        </SelectImpl.Icon>
    64→      </SelectImpl.Trigger>
    65→      <SelectImpl.Portal>
    66→        <SelectImpl.Positioner className="z-[1990]" sideOffset={4}>
    67→          <SelectImpl.Popup className="rounded-lg border border-neutral-3 bg-neutral-1/80 backdrop-blur">
    68→            <SelectImpl.ScrollUpArrow className="flex h-3 items-center justify-center">
    69→              <i className="i-mingcute-up-line" />
    70→            </SelectImpl.ScrollUpArrow>
    71→            <SelectImpl.List>
    72→              {values.map((item) => (
    73→                <SelectItem key={item.label + item.value} value={item.value}>
    74→                  {item.label}
    75→                </SelectItem>
    76→              ))}
    77→            </SelectImpl.List>
    78→            <SelectImpl.ScrollDownArrow className="flex h-3 items-center justify-center">
    79→              <i className="i-mingcute-down-line" />
    80→            </SelectImpl.ScrollDownArrow>
    81→          </SelectImpl.Popup>
    82→        </SelectImpl.Positioner>
    83→      </SelectImpl.Portal>
    84→    </SelectImpl.Root>
    85→  )
    86→}
    87→
    88→const SelectItem = ({
    89→  ref: forwardedRef,
    90→  children,
    91→  ...props
    92→}: PropsWithChildren<React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof SelectImpl.Item>> & {
    93→  ref?: React.RefObject<HTMLDivElement | null>
    94→}) => (
    95→  <SelectImpl.Item
    96→    className="flex cursor-auto items-center justify-between rounded-xs px-3 py-1 hover:bg-neutral-3 data-[highlighted]:bg-neutral-3"
    97→    {...props}
    98→    ref={forwardedRef as any}

   100→    <SelectImpl.ItemText className="pointer-events-none min-w-0 select-none truncate">
   101→      {children}

   106→    </SelectImpl.ItemIndicator>
   107→  </SelectImpl.Item>
   108→)

    34→  PropsWithChildren
    35→export type VideoPlayerRef = {

    37→
    38→  getState: () => HTMLMediaState
    39→  controls: {

    70→
    71→  const scaleValue = useSpring(1)
    72→  const opacityValue = useSpring(0)
    73→  const handleClick = useEventCallback((e?: any) => {
    74→    if (!isPlayer) return
    75→    e?.stopPropagation()
    76→
    77→    if (state.playing) {
    78→      controls.pause()
    79→      setClickToStatus('pause')
    80→    } else {
    81→      controls.play()
    82→      setClickToStatus('play')
    83→    }
    84→
    85→    opacityValue.jump(1)
    86→    scaleValue.jump(1)
    87→
    88→    nextFrame(() => {
    89→      scaleValue.set(1.3)
    90→      opacityValue.set(0)
    91→    })
    92→  })
    93→
    94→  const [element, state, controls, videoRef] = useVideo({
    95→    src,
    96→    className,
    97→    playsInline: true,
    98→    ...rest,
    99→    controls: false,
   100→    onClick(e) {
   101→      rest.onClick?.(e)
   102→      handleClick(e)
   103→    },
   104→    muted: (rest.muted ?? isPlayer) ? false : true,
   105→    onDoubleClick(e) {
   106→      rest.onDoubleClick?.(e)
   107→      if (!isPlayer) return
   108→      e.preventDefault()
   109→      e.stopPropagation()
   110→      if (!document.fullscreenElement) {
   111→        wrapperRef.current?.requestFullscreen()
   112→      } else {
   113→        document.exitFullscreen()
   114→      }
   115→    },
   116→  })
   117→
   118→  const stateRef = useGetState(state)
   119→  const memoedControls = useState(controls)[0]
   120→  const wrapperRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
   121→  useImperativeHandle(
   122→    ref,
   123→    () => ({
   124→      getElement: () => videoRef.current,
   125→      getState: () => stateRef(),
   126→      controls: memoedControls,
   127→      wrapperRef,
   128→    }),
   129→
   130→    [stateRef, videoRef, memoedControls],
   131→  )
   132→
   133→  return (
   134→    <div className="group center relative size-full" ref={wrapperRef}>
   135→      {element}
   136→
   137→      <div className="center pointer-events-none absolute inset-0 flex">
   138→        <m.div
   139→          className="center flex size-20 rounded-full bg-neutral-10 p-3"
   140→          style={{ scale: scaleValue, opacity: opacityValue }}
   141→        >
   142→          <i
   143→            className={clsxm(
   144→              'size-8 text-white',
   145→              clickToStatus === 'play'
   146→                ? 'i-mingcute-play-fill'
   147→                : 'i-mingcute-pause-fill',
   148→            )}
   149→          />
   150→        </m.div>
   151→      </div>
   152→
   153→      <VideoPlayerContext.Provider
   154→        value={useMemo(
   155→          () => ({ state, controls, wrapperRef, src, variant }),
   156→          [state, controls, src, variant],
   157→        )}
   158→      >
   159→        {variant === 'preview' && state.hasAudio && <FloatMutedButton />}
   160→        {isPlayer && <ControlBar />}
   161→      </VideoPlayerContext.Provider>
   162→    </div>
   163→  )
   164→}
   165→const FloatMutedButton = () => {
   166→  const isMuted = useContextSelector(
   167→    VideoPlayerContext,
   168→    (value) => value.state.muted,
   169→  )
   170→  const controls = useContextSelector(
   171→    VideoPlayerContext,
   172→    (value) => value.controls,
   173→  )
   174→  return (
   175→    <MotionButtonBase
   176→      className="center absolute right-4 top-4 z-10 size-7 rounded-full bg-neutral-10/50 opacity-0 duration-200 group-hover:opacity-100"
   177→      onClick={(e) => {
   178→        e.stopPropagation()
   179→        if (isMuted) {
   180→          controls.unmute()
   181→        } else {
   182→          controls.mute()
   183→        }
   184→      }}
   185→    >
   186→      <IconScaleTransition
   187→        className="size-4 text-white"
   188→        icon1="i-mgc-volume-cute-re"
   189→        icon2="i-mgc-volume-mute-cute-re"
   190→        status={isMuted ? 'done' : 'init'}
   191→      />
   192→    </MotionButtonBase>
   193→  )
   194→}
   195→
   196→const ControlBar = memo(() => {
   197→  const t = useTranslations('common')
   198→  const controls = useContextSelector(VideoPlayerContext, (v) => v.controls)
   199→  const isPaused = useContextSelector(VideoPlayerContext, (v) => v.state.paused)
   200→  const dragControls = useDragControls()
   201→
   202→  return (
   203→    <m.div
   204→      drag
   205→      dragConstraints={{ current: document.documentElement }}
   206→      dragControls={dragControls}
   207→      dragElastic={0}
   208→      dragListener={false}
   209→      dragMomentum={false}
   210→      className={clsxm(
   211→        'absolute inset-x-8 bottom-2 h-10 rounded-full border bg-neutral-2/90 backdrop-blur-xl',
   212→        'flex items-center gap-3 px-4',
   213→        'mx-auto max-w-[80vw]',
   214→      )}
   215→      onClick={stopPropagation}
   216→    >
   217→      {/* Drag Area */}
   218→      <div
   219→        className="absolute inset-0 z-[1]"
   220→        onPointerDownCapture={dragControls.start.bind(dragControls)}
   221→      />
   222→
   223→      <ActionIcon
   224→        className="center relative flex"
   225→        label={isPaused ? t('video_play') : t('video_pause')}
   226→        onClick={() => {
   227→          if (isPaused) {
   228→            controls.play()
   229→          } else {
   230→            controls.pause()
   231→          }
   232→        }}
   233→      >
   234→        <span className="center flex">
   235→          <IconScaleTransition
   236→            icon1="i-mingcute-play-fill size-5"
   237→            icon2="i-mingcute-pause-fill size-5"
   238→            status={isPaused ? 'init' : 'done'}
   239→          />
   240→        </span>
   241→      </ActionIcon>
   242→
   243→      {/* Progress bar */}
   244→      <PlayProgressBar />
   245→
   246→      {/* Right Action */}
   247→      <m.div className="relative z-[1] flex items-center gap-2">
   248→        <VolumeControl />
   249→        <DownloadVideo />
   250→        <FullScreenControl />
   251→      </m.div>
   252→    </m.div>
   253→  )
   254→})
   255→
   256→const FullScreenControl = () => {
   257→  const t = useTranslations('common')
   258→  const ref = useContextSelector(VideoPlayerContext, (v) => v.wrapperRef)
   259→  const [isFullScreen, setIsFullScreen] = useState(!!document.fullscreenElement)
   260→
   261→  useEffect(() => {
   262→    const onFullScreenChange = () => {
   263→      setIsFullScreen(!!document.fullscreenElement)
   264→    }
   265→    document.addEventListener('fullscreenchange', onFullScreenChange)
   266→    return () => {
   267→      document.removeEventListener('fullscreenchange', onFullScreenChange)
   268→    }
   269→  }, [])
   270→
   271→  return (
   272→    <ActionIcon
   273→      label={isFullScreen ? t('video_exit_fullscreen') : t('video_fullscreen')}
   274→      onClick={() => {
   275→        if (!ref.current) return
   276→
   277→        if (isFullScreen) {
   278→          document.exitFullscreen()
   279→        } else {
   280→          ref.current.requestFullscreen()
   281→        }
   282→      }}
   283→    >
   284→      {isFullScreen ? (
   285→        <i className="i-mingcute-fullscreen-2-fill size-5" />
   286→      ) : (
   287→        <i className="i-mingcute-fullscreen-exit-fill size-5" />
   288→      )}
   289→    </ActionIcon>
   290→  )
   291→}
   292→
   293→const DownloadVideo = () => {
   294→  const t = useTranslations('common')
   295→  const src = useContextSelector(VideoPlayerContext, (v) => v.src)
   296→  const [isDownloading, setIsDownloading] = useState(false)
   297→  const download = useEventCallback(() => {
   298→    setIsDownloading(true)
   299→    fetch(src)
   300→      .then((res) => res.blob())
   301→      .then((blob) => {
   302→        const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob)
   303→        const a = document.createElement('a')
   304→        a.href = url
   305→        a.download = src.split('/').pop()!
   306→        a.click()
   307→        URL.revokeObjectURL(url)
   308→        setIsDownloading(false)
   309→      })
   310→  })
   311→
   312→  return (
   313→    <ActionIcon label={t('video_download')} onClick={download}>
   314→      {isDownloading ? (
   315→        <i className="i-mingcute-loading-3-fill size-5 animate-spin" />
   316→      ) : (
   317→        <i className="i-mingcute-download-2-fill size-5" />
   318→      )}
   319→    </ActionIcon>
   320→  )
   321→}
   322→const VolumeControl = () => {
   323→  const t = useTranslations('common')
   324→  const hasAudio = useContextSelector(
   325→    VideoPlayerContext,
   326→    (v) => v.state.hasAudio,
   327→  )
   328→
   329→  const controls = useContextSelector(VideoPlayerContext, (v) => v.controls)
   330→  const volume = useContextSelector(VideoPlayerContext, (v) => v.state.volume)
   331→  const muted = useContextSelector(VideoPlayerContext, (v) => v.state.muted)
   332→  if (!hasAudio) return null
   333→  return (
   334→    <ActionIcon
   335→      label={<VolumeSlider volume={volume} onVolumeChange={controls.volume} />}
   336→      onClick={() => {
   337→        if (muted) {
   338→          controls.unmute()
   339→        } else {
   340→          controls.mute()
   341→        }
   342→      }}
   343→    >
   344→      {muted ? (
   345→        <i
   346→          className="i-mingcute-volume-mute-fill size-5"
   347→          title={t('video_mute')}
   348→        />
   349→      ) : (
   350→        <i
   351→          className="i-mingcute-volume-fill size-5"
   352→          title={t('video_unmute')}
   353→        />
   354→      )}
   355→    </ActionIcon>
   356→  )
   357→}
   358→
   359→const PlayProgressBar = () => {
   360→  const t = useTranslations('common')
   361→  const state = useContextSelector(VideoPlayerContext, (value) => value.state)
   362→  const controls = useContextSelector(
   363→    VideoPlayerContext,
   364→    (value) => value.controls,
   365→  )
   366→  const [currentDragging, setCurrentDragging] = useState(false)
   367→  const [dragTime, setDragTime] = useState(0)
   368→
   369→  return (
   370→    <Slider.Root
   371→      className="relative z-[1] flex size-full items-center transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out"
   372→      max={state.duration}
   373→      min={0}
   374→      step={0.01}
   375→      value={currentDragging ? dragTime : state.time}
   376→      onValueChange={(value) => {
   377→        setDragTime(value)
   378→        startTransition(() => {
   379→          controls.seek(value)
   380→        })
   381→      }}
   382→      onValueCommitted={() => {
   383→        controls.play()
   384→        setCurrentDragging(false)
   385→        controls.seek(dragTime)
   386→      }}
   387→    >
   388→      <Slider.Control
   389→        className="relative flex size-full grow items-center"
   390→        onPointerDown={() => {
   391→          if (state.playing) {
   392→            controls.pause()
   393→          }
   394→          setDragTime(state.time)
   395→          setCurrentDragging(true)
   396→        }}
   397→      >
   398→        <Slider.Track className="relative h-1 w-full grow rounded bg-neutral-1">
   399→          <Slider.Indicator className="absolute h-1 rounded bg-neutral-6/40" />
   400→
   401→          {/* indicator */}
   402→          <Slider.Thumb
   403→            aria-label={t('aria_progress')}
   404→            className="block h-3 w-[3px] rounded-[1px] bg-neutral-6"
   405→          />
   406→        </Slider.Track>
   407→      </Slider.Control>
   408→    </Slider.Root>
   409→  )
   410→}
   411→
   412→const ActionIcon = ({
   413→  className,
   414→  onClick,
   415→  children,
   416→  label,
   417→}: {
   418→  className?: string
   419→  onClick?: () => void
   420→  label: React.ReactNode
   421→  children?: React.ReactNode
   422→}) => {
   423→  return (
   424→    <FloatPopover
   425→      placement="top"
   426→      type="tooltip"
   427→      wrapperClassName="flex center"
   428→      triggerElement={
   429→        <MotionButtonBase
   430→          className={clsxm('z-[2] flex center', className)}
   431→          onClick={onClick}
   432→        >
   433→          {children || <i className={className} />}
   434→        </MotionButtonBase>
   435→      }
   436→    >
   437→      {label}
   438→    </FloatPopover>
   439→  )
   440→}
   441→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./apps/web/src/components/ui/markdown/renderers/heading.tsx`

```text
     1→import type { DOMAttributes } from 'react'
     2→import { createElement, useMemo, useRef } from 'react'
     3→
     4→import { useIsClient } from '~/hooks/common/use-is-client'
     5→import { springScrollToElement } from '~/lib/scroller'
     6→
     7→interface HeadingProps {
     8→  children: React.ReactNode
     9→  className?: string
    10→  id: string
    11→  level: number
    12→}
    13→
    14→export const createMarkdownHeadingComponent = () => {
    15→  let index = 0
    16→  return (props: HeadingProps) => {
    17→    const ref = useRef<boolean | number>(false)
    18→    const memoizedIndex = useMemo(() => {
    19→      if (typeof ref.current === 'number') {
    20→        return ref.current
    21→      }
    22→      ref.current = index++
    23→      return ref.current
    24→    }, [])
    25→    return <MHeader index={memoizedIndex} {...props} />
    26→  }
    27→}
    28→
    29→const MHeader = (
    30→  props: HeadingProps & {
    31→    index: number
    32→  },
    33→) => {
    34→  const { children, id, level, index } = props
    35→
    36→  const isClient = useIsClient()
    37→
    38→  const nextId = `${index}__${id}`
    39→  return createElement<DOMAttributes<HTMLHeadingElement>, HTMLHeadingElement>(
    40→    `h${level}`,
    41→    {
    42→      id: nextId,
    43→      className: 'group flex items-center',
    44→
    45→      'data-markdown-heading': true,
    46→    } as any,
    47→    null,
    48→    <>
    49→      <span>{children}</span>
    50→      {isClient && (
    51→        <a
    52→          aria-hidden
    53→          className="center ml-2 inline-flex cursor-pointer select-none text-accent opacity-0 transition-opacity duration-200 group-hover:opacity-100"
    54→          href={`#${nextId}`}
    55→          role="button"
    56→          tabIndex={0}
    57→          onClick={(e) => {
    58→            const { state } = history
    59→            history.replaceState(state, '', `#${nextId}`)
    60→            springScrollToElement(document.getElementById(nextId)!, -100)
    61→            e.preventDefault()
    62→          }}
    63→        >
    64→          <i className="i-mingcute-hashtag-line" />
    65→        </a>
    66→      )}
    67→    </>,
    68→  )
    69→}
    70→
```
</details></tool-use>

     8→
     9→import { CollapseContent } from '../../collapse'

    11→export const MDetails: FC<{ children: ReactNode[] }> = (props) => {

    13→
    14→  const $head = props.children[0]
    15→

    17→  useLayoutEffect(() => {
    18→    isInPrint && setOpen(true)

    23→  }, [])

    26→      <button
    27→        className="mb-2 flex cursor-pointer items-center md:pl-2 [&_summary]:text-left"
    28→        onClick={handleOpen}

    30→        <i
    31→          className={clsx(
    32→            'i-mingcute-align-arrow-down-line mr-2 transition-transform duration-500',
    33→            !open && '-rotate-90',
    34→          )}
    35→        >
    36→          <IcRoundKeyboardDoubleArrowRight />
    37→        </i>
    38→        {$head}
    39→      </button>
    40→      <CollapseContent withBackground className="my-2" isOpened={open}>
    41→        <WrappedElementProvider>
    42→          <div
    43→            className={clsx(
    44→              open ? 'opacity-100' : 'opacity-0',
    45→              'transition-opacity duration-500',
    46→            )}
    47→          >
    48→            {props.children.slice(1)}
    49→          </div>
    50→        </WrappedElementProvider>
    51→      </CollapseContent>
    52→    </div>
    53→  )
    54→}
    55→

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./apps/web/src/components/ui/language-selector/LanguageSelector.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import type { FC } from 'react'
     4→import { useTransition } from 'react'
     5→
     6→import {
     7→  DropdownMenu,
     8→  DropdownMenuContent,
     9→  DropdownMenuItem,
    10→  DropdownMenuTrigger,
    11→} from '~/components/ui/dropdown-menu'
    12→import { clsxm } from '~/lib/helper'
    13→
    14→export interface LanguageOption {
    15→  code: string
    16→  isOriginal?: boolean
    17→  label: string
    18→}
    19→
    20→interface LanguageSelectorProps {
    21→  currentLanguage: string
    22→  languages: LanguageOption[]
    23→  onLanguageChange: (lang: string) => void
    24→  originalLabel?: string
    25→  showIcon?: boolean
    26→  triggerClassName?: string
    27→}
    28→
    29→export const LanguageSelector: FC<LanguageSelectorProps> = ({
    30→  languages,
    31→  currentLanguage,
    32→  onLanguageChange,
    33→  originalLabel,
    34→  triggerClassName,
    35→  showIcon = true,
    36→}) => {
    37→  const [isPending, startTransition] = useTransition()
    38→
    39→  const currentLabel =
    40→    languages.find((l) => l.code === currentLanguage)?.label || currentLanguage
    41→
    42→  const handleSelect = (lang: string) => {
    43→    if (lang === currentLanguage) return
    44→    startTransition(() => {
    45→      onLanguageChange(lang)
    46→    })
    47→  }
    48→
    49→  if (languages.length <= 1) {
    50→    return null
    51→  }
    52→
    53→  return (
    54→    <DropdownMenu modal={false}>
    55→      <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
    56→        <button
    57→          disabled={isPending}
    58→          type="button"
    59→          className={clsxm(
    60→            'flex items-center gap-1 rounded-md px-1.5 py-0.5 text-sm transition-colors',
    61→            'hover:bg-neutral-2 data-[open]:bg-neutral-2',
    62→            isPending && 'opacity-50',
    63→            triggerClassName,
    64→          )}
    65→        >
    66→          {showIcon && <i className="i-mingcute-translate-2-line" />}
    67→          <span>{currentLabel}</span>
    68→          <i className="i-mingcute-down-line text-xs opacity-50" />
    69→        </button>
    70→      </DropdownMenuTrigger>
    71→      <DropdownMenuContent align="start">
    72→        {languages.map((lang) => {
    73→          const isCurrent = lang.code === currentLanguage
    74→
    75→          return (
    76→            <DropdownMenuItem
    77→              key={lang.code}
    78→              className={
    79→                isCurrent ? 'bg-neutral-2/80' : ''
    80→              }
    81→              onClick={() => handleSelect(lang.code)}
    82→            >
    83→              <span className="flex w-full items-center justify-between gap-2">
    84→                <span className="flex items-center gap-2">
    85→                  {lang.label}
    86→                  {lang.isOriginal && originalLabel && (
    87→                    <span className="rounded bg-neutral-3 px-1 py-0.5 text-[10px]">
    88→                      {originalLabel}
    89→                    </span>
    90→                  )}
    91→                </span>
    92→                {isCurrent && (
    93→                  <i className="i-mingcute-check-line text-accent" />
    94→                )}
    95→              </span>
    96→            </DropdownMenuItem>
    97→          )
    98→        })}
    99→      </DropdownMenuContent>
   100→    </DropdownMenu>
   101→  )
   102→}
   103→
