_**Agent - sidechain (2026-03-15 11:55:57Z)**_

You are migrating icons in the Shiroi project from mingcute/material-symbols CSS classes to lucide-react + lucide-animated components.

## MIGRATION RULES

### Pattern 1: Static icon (no animated version, or passive context)
```tsx
// BEFORE
<i className="i-mingcute-rss-line size-4 text-accent" />

// AFTER
import { Rss } from 'lucide-react'
<Rss className="size-4 text-accent" />
```

### Pattern 2: Animated icon (interactive context like buttons, links, toggles)
```tsx
// BEFORE
<i className="i-mingcute-search-line" />

// AFTER
import { SearchIcon } from '@/components/icons/animated/search'
<SearchIcon className="size-4" size={16} />
```
Note: animated icons use a `size` prop for SVG dimensions. Map common Tailwind sizes: size-3=12, size-3.5=14, size-4=16, size-5=20, size-6=24. The `className` goes on the wrapper div.

### Pattern 3: Loading spinner
```tsx
// BEFORE
<i className="i-mingcute-loading-3-line animate-spin" />

// AFTER  
import { Loader2 } from 'lucide-react'
<Loader2 className="animate-spin size-4" />
```

### Icon name mapping (mingcute → lucide-react import name):
- add-circle-line → CirclePlus
- add-line → Plus
- ai-fill → Sparkles
- alert-fill/alert-line → TriangleAlert
- arow-to-up-line → ArrowUpToLine
- arrow-left-circle-line → CircleArrowLeft
- arrow-left-line → ArrowLeft
- arrow-right-circle-line → CircleArrowRight
- arrow-right-line → ArrowRight
- arrow-right-up-line → ArrowUpRight
- arrow-to-down-line → ArrowDownToLine
- arrow-up-circle-line → CircleArrowUp
- book-6-line → BookText
- camera-line → Camera
- cat-line → Cat
- chat-3-line → MessageCircle
- check-circle-line → CircleCheck
- check-fill/check-line → Check
- close-circle-line → CircleX
- close-fill/close-line → X
- code-line → Code
- comment-2-line → MessageSquare
- comment-line → MessageCircle
- computer-line → Monitor
- copy-2-fill/copy-fill/copy-line → Copy
- dashboard-*-line → LayoutDashboard
- delete-2-line/delete-line → Trash2/Trash
- document-line → FileText
- down-line → ChevronDown
- download-2-fill/download-2-line → Download
- edit-2-line/edit-line → SquarePen
- emoji-2-line/emoji-line → Smile
- exit-line → LogOut
- external-link-line → ExternalLink
- eye-2-line/eye-line → Eye
- eye-close-line → EyeOff
- file-line → File
- font-line → Type
- fullscreen-2-fill/fullscreen-2-line → Maximize
- fullscreen-exit-fill → Minimize
- github-line → Github (from lucide-react)
- hashtag-line → Hash
- heart-crack-line → HeartCrack
- heart-fill/heart-line → Heart
- image-line → Image (or ImageIcon to avoid conflict)
- information-fill/information-line → Info
- key-1-line → Key
- left-fill → ChevronLeft
- link-3-line → Link
- list-collapse-line → ListCollapse
- list-expansion-line → List
- loading-3-fill/loading-3-line/loading-line → Loader2 (use with animate-spin)
- mail-line → Mail
- menu-line → Menu
- moon-line → Moon
- pause-fill → Pause
- pen-line → Pen
- pin-line → Pin
- play-fill → Play
- question-line → CircleHelp
- quill-pen-line → Feather
- refresh-2-line → RefreshCw
- right-fill → ChevronRight
- rss-fill/rss-line → Rss
- search-line → Search
- send-plane-line → Send
- settings-5-line/settings-6-line → Settings
- share-forward-line → Share
- sparkles-line → Sparkles
- star-line → Star
- sun-line → Sun
- table-2-line → Table
- thumb-up-line → ThumbsUp
- time-line → Clock
- translate-2-line → Languages
- up-line → ChevronUp
- user-4-line → User
- user-visible-line → UserCheck
- volume-fill → Volume2
- volume-mute-fill → VolumeX
- warning-line → TriangleAlert

Material Symbols mapping:
- arrow-circle-right-outline-rounded → CircleArrowRight
- dynamic-form-outline → SquarePen
- notifications-active-outline → Bell

### Animated icon file mapping (import from `@/components/icons/animated/{name}`):
Each exports `{PascalName}Icon` (e.g., `SearchIcon`, `HeartIcon`, `CopyIcon`).

### When to use animated vs static:
- **Animated**: Buttons, toggles, interactive links, FABs, action icons users click/hover
- **Static**: Inline metadata, list decorators, status indicators, table cells

### For brand icons (discord, github, twitter/x, telegram, qq, wechat, weibo):
```tsx
import { SimpleIcon } from '@/components/icons/SimpleIcon'
import { siGithub } from 'simple-icons'
<SimpleIcon icon={siGithub} className="size-4" />
```

### Important notes:
- Keep all non-icon className values
- Add necessary imports at top of file
- Do NOT add React import

```text
    22→  useCurrentPostDataSelector,

    25→
    26→import {
    27→  ActionAsideContainer,
    28→  ActionAsideIcon,
    29→} from '../shared/ActionAsideContainer'
    30→import { ArticleRightAside } from '../shared/ArticleRightAside'
    31→import { AsideCommentButton } from '../shared/AsideCommentButton'
    32→import { AsideDonateButton } from '../shared/AsideDonateButton'
    33→import { ShareModal } from '../shared/ShareModal'

    35→import { usePresentSubscribeModal } from '../subscribe'
    36→
    37→export const PostBottomBarAction: Component = () => {
    38→  const isMobile = useIsMobile()
    39→  if (!isMobile) return null
    40→  return (
    41→    <div className="my-6 flex items-center justify-center space-x-8">
    42→      <LikeButton />
    43→      <ShareButton />
    44→      <SubscribeButton />
    45→      <AsideDonateButton />
    46→    </div>
    47→  )
    48→}
    49→
    50→export const PostActionAside: Component = ({ className }) => (
    51→  <ArticleRightAside>
    52→    <ActionAsideContainer className={className}>
    53→      <LikeButton />
    54→      <ShareButton />
    55→      <SubscribeButton />
    56→      <AsideDonateButton />
    57→      <PostAsideCommentButton />
    58→    </ActionAsideContainer>
    59→  </ArticleRightAside>
    60→)
    61→
    62→const SubscribeButton = () => {
    63→  const { present } = usePresentSubscribeModal(['post_c'])
    64→  return (
    65→    <MotionButtonBase className="flex flex-col space-y-2" onClick={present}>
    66→      <ActionAsideIcon className="i-material-symbols-notifications-active-outline hover:text-accent" />
    67→    </MotionButtonBase>
    68→  )
    69→}
    70→
    71→const PostAsideCommentButton = () => {
    72→  const { title, id, allowComment } =
    73→    useCurrentPostDataSelector((data) => ({
    74→      title: data?.title,
    75→      id: data?.id,
    76→      allowComment: data?.allowComment,
    77→    })) || {}
    78→  const isEof = useIsEoFWrappedElement()
    79→  if (!id) return null
    80→  if (isEof) return null
    81→  if (!allowComment) return null
    82→
    83→  return <AsideCommentButton refId={id} title={title!} />
    84→}
    85→
    86→const LikeButton = () => {
    87→  const t = useTranslations('common')
    88→  const control = useAnimationControls()
    89→  const [update] = useForceUpdate()
    90→
    91→  const id = useCurrentPostDataSelector((data) => data?.id)
    92→  const likeCount = useCurrentPostDataSelector((data) => data?.count.like)
    93→
    94→  if (!id) return null
    95→  const handleLike = () => {
    96→    if (isLikedBefore(id)) return
    97→
    98→    apiClient.activity.likeIt('Post', id).then(() => {
    99→      setLikeId(id)
   100→      setGlobalCurrentPostData((draft) => {
   101→        draft.count.like += 1
   102→      })
   103→      update()
   104→    })
   105→  }
   106→
   107→  const isLiked = isLikedBefore(id)
   108→
   109→  return (
   110→    <MotionButtonBase
   111→      aria-label={t('aria_like_post')}
   112→      className="flex flex-col space-y-2"
   113→      onClick={() => {
   114→        handleLike()
   115→        control.start('tap')
   116→        toast.success(t('like_post'), {
   117→          iconElement: (
   118→            <m.i
   119→              className="text-warning"
   120→              animate={{
   121→                scale: 1.22,
   122→              }}
   123→              initial={{
   124→                scale: 0.96,
   125→              }}
   126→            >
   127→              <ThumbsupIcon />
   128→            </m.i>
   129→          ),
   130→        })
   131→      }}
   132→    >
   133→      <m.i
   134→        animate={control}
   135→        className={clsxm(
   136→          'relative flex hover:text-warning hover:opacity-100',
   137→          asideButtonStyles.base,
   138→
   139→          isLiked && 'text-warning',
   140→        )}
   141→        transition={{
   142→          ease: 'easeInOut',
   143→        }}
   144→        variants={{
   145→          tap: {
   146→            scale: 1.3,
   147→          },
   148→        }}
   149→      >
   150→        <ThumbsupIcon />
   151→        {!!likeCount && (
   152→          <span className="absolute bottom-0 right-0 translate-x-[8px] text-[10px]">
   153→            <NumberSmoothTransition>{likeCount}</NumberSmoothTransition>
   154→          </span>
   155→        )}
   156→      </m.i>
   157→    </MotionButtonBase>
   158→  )
   159→}
   160→
   161→const ShareButton = () => {
   162→  const t = useTranslations('common')
   163→  const isClient = useIsClient()
   164→  const { present } = useModalStack()
   165→
   166→  if (!isClient) return null
   167→
   168→  return (
   169→    <MotionButtonBase
   170→      aria-label={t('aria_share_post')}
   171→      className="flex flex-col space-y-2"
   172→      onClick={() => {
   173→        const post = getGlobalCurrentPostData()
   174→
   175→        if (!post) return
   176→
   177→        const hasShare = 'share' in navigator
   178→
   179→        const title = t('share_treasure')
   180→        const url = urlBuilder(
   181→          routeBuilder(Routes.Post, {
   182→            slug: post.slug,
   183→            category: post.category.slug,
   184→          }),
   185→        ).href
   186→
   187→        const text = t('share_message', { title: post.title })
   188→
   189→        if (hasShare)
   190→          navigator.share({
   191→            title: post.title,
   192→            text: post.text,
   193→            url,
   194→          })
   195→        else {
   196→          present({
   197→            title: t('share_content'),
   198→            clickOutsideToDismiss: true,
   199→            content: () => <ShareModal text={text} title={title} url={url} />,
   200→          })
   201→        }
   202→      }}
   203→    >
   204→      <ActionAsideIcon className="i-mingcute-share-forward-line hover:text-info" />
   205→    </MotionButtonBase>
   206→  )
   207→}
   208→
```

```text
    18→import { routeBuilder, Routes } from '~/lib/route-builder'
    19→
    20→import { TagDetailModal } from './fab/PostTagsFAB'
    21→
    22→export const PostMetaBar: Component<{
    23→  meta: Partial<
    24→    Pick<PostModel, 'created' | 'modified' | 'category' | 'tags' | 'count'>
    25→  >
    26→}> = ({ className, meta, children }) => {
    27→  const t = useTranslations('common')
    28→  const { present } = useModalStack()
    29→  const router = useRouter()
    30→  const isClient = useIsClient()
    31→  return (
    32→    <div
    33→      className={clsxm(
    34→        'flex min-w-0 shrink grow flex-wrap gap-2 text-sm text-neutral-6',
    35→        className,
    36→      )}
    37→    >
    38→      <div className="flex min-w-0 items-center space-x-1">
    39→        {!!meta.created && (
    40→          <>
    41→            <MdiClockOutline />
    42→            <span>
    43→              <RelativeTime date={meta.created} />
    44→            </span>
    45→          </>
    46→        )}
    47→        {meta.modified ? (
    48→          isClient ? (
    49→            <FloatPopover
    50→              mobileAsSheet
    51→              as="span"
    52→              triggerElement={t('edited')}
    53→              type="tooltip"
    54→              wrapperClassName="text-xs"
    55→            >
    56→              {t('edited_at')} <RelativeTime date={meta.modified} />
    57→            </FloatPopover>
    58→          ) : (
    59→            <span className="text-xs">{t('edited')}</span>
    60→          )
    61→        ) : null}
    62→      </div>
    63→
    64→      {!!meta.category && (
    65→        <div className="flex min-w-0 items-center space-x-1">
    66→          <FeHash className="translate-y-[0.5px]" />
    67→          <span className="min-w-0 truncate">
    68→            <MotionButtonBase
    69→              className="shiro-link--underline font-normal"
    70→              onClick={() =>
    71→                !!meta.category &&
    72→                router.push(
    73→                  routeBuilder(Routes.Category, {
    74→                    slug: meta.category.slug,
    75→                  }),
    76→                )
    77→              }
    78→            >
    79→              <span>{meta.category?.name}</span>
    80→            </MotionButtonBase>
    81→
    82→            {meta.tags?.length ? (
    83→              <>
    84→                {' '}
    85→                /{' '}
    86→                {meta.tags.map((tag, index) => {
    87→                  const isLast = index === meta.tags!.length - 1
    88→
    89→                  return (
    90→                    <Fragment key={tag}>
    91→                      <button
    92→                        className="shiro-link--underline"
    93→                        key={tag}
    94→                        onClick={() =>
    95→                          present({
    96→                            content: () => <TagDetailModal name={tag} />,
    97→                            title: `Tag: ${tag}`,
    98→                          })
    99→                        }
   100→                      >
   101→                        {tag}
   102→                      </button>
   103→                      {!isLast && <span>, </span>}
   104→                    </Fragment>
   105→                  )
   106→                })}
   107→              </>
   108→            ) : (
   109→              ''
   110→            )}
   111→          </span>
   112→        </div>
   113→      )}
   114→
   115→      {!!meta.count?.read && (
   116→        <div className="flex min-w-0 items-center space-x-1">
   117→          <i className="i-mingcute-eye-2-line" />
   118→          <span className="min-w-0 truncate">
   119→            <NumberSmoothTransition>{meta.count.read}</NumberSmoothTransition>
   120→          </span>
   121→        </div>
   122→      )}
   123→      {!!meta.count?.like && (
   124→        <div className="flex min-w-0 items-center space-x-1">
   125→          <ThumbsupIcon />
   126→          <span className="min-w-0 truncate">
   127→            <NumberSmoothTransition>{meta.count.like}</NumberSmoothTransition>
   128→          </span>
   129→        </div>
   130→      )}
   131→
   132→      {children}
   133→    </div>
   134→  )
   135→}
   136→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./apps/web/src/components/modules/post/PostRelated.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
     4→import type { FC } from 'react'
     5→
     6→import { useCurrentPostDataSelector } from '~/providers/post/CurrentPostDataProvider'
     7→
     8→import { PeekLink } from '../peek/PeekLink'
     9→
    10→export const PostRelated: FC<{
    11→  type?: 'before' | 'after'
    12→}> = ({ type = 'after' }) => {
    13→  const t = useTranslations('post')
    14→  const infoText = type === 'before' ? t('related_before') : t('related_after')
    15→  const related = useCurrentPostDataSelector((s) => s?.related)
    16→  if (!related) {
    17→    return null
    18→  }
    19→
    20→  if (related.length === 0) {
    21→    return null
    22→  }
    23→  return (
    24→    <div data-hide-print className="prose mb-5 mt-8">
    25→      <h3 className="flex items-center gap-2 text-lg font-medium">
    26→        <i className="i-mingcute-question-line" />
    27→        <span>{infoText}</span>
    28→      </h3>
    29→      <ul className="ml-0 mt-4 list-inside list-disc pl-0 text-base leading-relaxed">
    30→        {related.map((post) => {
    31→          const href = `/posts/${post.category.slug}/${post.slug}`
    32→          return (
    33→            <li key={href}>
    34→              <PeekLink className="shiro-link--underline" href={href}>
    35→                {post.title}
    36→              </PeekLink>
    37→            </li>
    38→          )
    39→        })}
    40→      </ul>
    41→    </div>
    42→  )
    43→}
    44→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>

 `./apps/web/src/components/modules/post/PostCopyright.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import { useFormatter, useLocale, useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
     4→import type { FC } from 'react'
     5→import { useState } from 'react'
     6→
     7→import { FloatPopover } from '~/components/ui/float-popover'
     8→import { IconScaleTransition } from '~/components/ui/transition/IconScaleTransnsition'
     9→import { toast } from '~/lib/toast'
    10→import { useCurrentPostDataSelector } from '~/providers/post/CurrentPostDataProvider'
    11→import { useAggregationSelector } from '~/providers/root/aggregation-data-provider'
    12→
    13→import { Signature } from '../shared/Signature'
    14→
    15→const CC_DEED_URL: Record<string, string> = {
    16→  zh: 'https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/deed.zh-hans',
    17→  ja: 'https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/deed.ja',
    18→  en: 'https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/deed.en',
    19→}
    20→
    21→export const PostCopyright: FC = () => {
    22→  const t = useTranslations('post')
    23→  const tCommon = useTranslations('common')
    24→  const format = useFormatter()
    25→  const locale = useLocale()
    26→  const name = useAggregationSelector((data) => data.user.name)
    27→
    28→  const webUrl = useAggregationSelector((data) => data.url.webUrl)
    29→  const data = useCurrentPostDataSelector(
    30→    (data) => {
    31→      if (!webUrl) return null
    32→      if (!data) return null
    33→      return {
    34→        title: data.title,
    35→        link: `${webUrl}/posts/${data.category.slug}/${data.slug}`,
    36→        date: data.modified,
    37→      }
    38→    },
    39→    [webUrl],
    40→  )
    41→
    42→  const [copied, setCopied] = useState(false)
    43→
    44→  const handleCopy = async () => {
    45→    try {
    46→      await navigator.clipboard.writeText(data!.link)
    47→      setCopied(true)
    48→      toast.success(tCommon('copy_article_link'))
    49→      setTimeout(() => setCopied(false), 2000)
    50→    } catch (err) {
    51→      console.error('Failed to copy:', err)
    52→    }
    53→  }
    54→
    55→  if (!data) return null
    56→  const { title, link, date } = data
    57→  const lastModified = date
    58→    ? format.dateTime(new Date(date), {
    59→        year: 'numeric',
    60→        month: 'long',
    61→        day: 'numeric',
    62→        hour: 'numeric',
    63→        minute: 'numeric',
    64→      })
    65→    : tCommon('no_modification')
    66→
    67→  return (
    68→    <footer className="mt-8 w-full border-t border-border pt-5" id="copyright">
    69→      {/* 信息网格 */}
    70→      <div className="grid grid-cols-[auto_1fr] gap-x-4 gap-y-1.5">
    71→        {/* 文章标题 */}
    72→        <span className="text-right text-xs text-neutral-9/70">
    73→          {t('copyright_title')}
    74→        </span>
    75→        <span className="text-xs text-neutral-9">{title}</span>
    76→
    77→        {/* 文章链接 */}
    78→        <span className="text-right text-xs text-neutral-9/70">
    79→          {t('copyright_link')}
    80→        </span>
    81→        <div className="flex min-w-0 items-center gap-1.5">
    82→          <span className="break-all text-xs text-neutral-9">{link}</span>
    83→          <button
    84→            data-hide-print
    85→            aria-label={t('copyright_copy')}
    86→            className="hidden shrink-0 rounded transition-colors hover:bg-neutral-2 size-4 md:flex items-center justify-center"
    87→            type="button"
    88→            onClick={handleCopy}
    89→          >
    90→            <IconScaleTransition
    91→              className="size-3.5 text-neutral-9/70"
    92→              icon1="i-mingcute-copy-2-fill"
    93→              icon2="i-mingcute-check-line"
    94→              status={copied ? 'done' : 'init'}
    95→            />
    96→          </button>
    97→        </div>
    98→
    99→        {/* 最后修改时间 */}
   100→        <span className="text-right text-xs text-neutral-9/70">
   101→          {t('copyright_modified')}
   102→        </span>
   103→        <time className="text-xs text-neutral-9">{lastModified}</time>
   104→
   105→        {/* 文章作者 */}
   106→        <span className="text-right text-xs text-neutral-9/70">
   107→          {t('copyright_author')}
   108→        </span>
   109→        <span className="text-xs text-neutral-9">{name}</span>
   110→      </div>
   111→
   112→      {/* 版权声明 */}
   113→      <div className="mt-3 border-t border-border/60 pt-3">
   114→        <p className="text-xs leading-relaxed text-neutral-9/70">
   115→          {t('copyright_license_prefix')}
   116→          <FloatPopover
   117→            asChild
   118→            mobileAsSheet
   119→            type="tooltip"
   120→            triggerElement={
   121→              <a
   122→                className="mx-0.5 text-neutral-9 underline decoration-border underline-offset-2 transition-colors hover:text-neutral-9/70"
   123→                href={CC_DEED_URL[locale] ?? CC_DEED_URL.en}
   124→                rel="noopener noreferrer"
   125→                target="_blank"
   126→              >
   127→                CC BY-NC-SA 4.0
   128→              </a>
   129→            }
   130→          >
   131→            {t('copyright_license_tooltip')}
   132→          </FloatPopover>
   133→          {t('copyright_license_suffix')}
   134→        </p>
   135→        <p className="mt-2 text-xs leading-relaxed text-neutral-9/70">
   136→          {t('copyright_license_text')}
   137→        </p>
   138→      </div>
   139→
   140→      {/* 作者签名 */}
   141→      <div className="flex flex-col items-end pt-2">
   142→        <Signature />
   143→      </div>
   144→    </footer>
   145→  )
   146→}
   147→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import type { PostListItem } from '@mx-space/api-client'
     2→import clsx from 'clsx'
     3→import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
     4→import { memo } from 'react'
     5→import RemoveMarkdown from 'remove-markdown'
     6→
     7→import { useIsOwnerLogged } from '~/atoms/hooks/owner'
     8→import { PostPinIcon } from '~/components/modules/post/PostPinIcon'
     9→import { TranslatedBadge } from '~/components/modules/translation/TranslatedBadge'
    10→import { MagneticHoverEffect } from '~/components/ui/effect/MagneticHoverEffect'
    11→import { Link } from '~/i18n/navigation'
    12→
    13→import { PostMetaBar } from './PostMetaBar'
    14→
    15→export const PostLooseItem = memo<{ data: PostListItem }>(
    16→  function PostLooseItem({ data }) {
    17→    const text = data.text ?? ''
    18→    const displayText =
    19→      text.length > 300 ? `${RemoveMarkdown(text.slice(0, 300))}...` : text
    20→    const hasImage = data.images?.length > 0 && data.images[0].src
    21→    const categorySlug = data.category?.slug
    22→    const postLink = `/posts/${categorySlug}/${data.slug}`
    23→
    24→    const isLogged = useIsOwnerLogged()
    25→    const t = useTranslations('common')
    26→    return (
    27→      <MagneticHoverEffect
    28→        as={Link}
    29→        className="relative flex cursor-pointer! flex-col py-8 before:-inset-x-6 focus-visible:shadow-none!"
    30→        href={postLink}
    31→      >
    32→        <h2 className="relative break-words text-2xl font-medium">
    33→          <div
    34→            className={clsx(
    35→              'flex items-baseline gap-2',
    36→              isLogged || data.pin ? 'w-[calc(100%-2rem)]' : 'w-full',
    37→            )}
    38→          >
    39→            <span>{data.title}</span>
    40→            <span className="-translate-y-1">
    41→              {data.isTranslated && data.translationMeta && (
    42→                <TranslatedBadge translationMeta={data.translationMeta} />
    43→              )}
    44→            </span>
    45→          </div>
    46→
    47→          <PostPinIcon id={data.id} pin={!!data.pin} />
    48→        </h2>
    49→        <div className="relative mt-8 space-y-2">
    50→          {!!data.summary && (
    51→            <p className="mb-4 break-all rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm leading-relaxed text-neutral-9 ring-1 ring-accent/10">
    52→              {t('summary_label')} {data.summary}
    53→            </p>
    54→          )}
    55→          <div className="relative overflow-hidden text-justify">
    56→            {hasImage && (
    57→              <div
    58→                style={{ backgroundImage: `url(${hasImage})` }}
    59→                className={clsx(
    60→                  'float-right mb-2 ml-3 size-[5.5rem] overflow-hidden rounded-md',
    61→                  'bg-cover bg-center bg-no-repeat',
    62→                )}
    63→              />
    64→            )}
    65→            <p className="break-all leading-loose text-neutral-9/90">
    66→              {displayText}
    67→            </p>
    68→          </div>
    69→        </div>
    70→
    71→        <div className="mt-2 flex select-none flex-wrap items-center justify-end gap-4 text-neutral-9/60">
    72→          <PostMetaBar meta={data} />
    73→          <span className="flex shrink-0 select-none items-center space-x-1 text-right text-accent hover:text-accent [&>svg]:hover:ml-2">
    74→            <span>{t('read_full')}</span>
    75→            <i className="i-mingcute-arrow-right-line text-lg transition-[margin]" />
    76→          </span>
    77→        </div>
    78→      </MagneticHoverEffect>
    79→    )
    80→  },
    81→)
    82→
    83→export const PostCompactItem = memo<{ data: PostListItem }>(
    84→  function PostCompactItem({ data }) {
    85→    const categorySlug = data.category?.slug
    86→    const postLink = `/posts/${categorySlug}/${data.slug}`
    87→
    88→    const isLogged = useIsOwnerLogged()
    89→    return (
    90→      <MagneticHoverEffect
    91→        as={Link}
    92→        className="relative flex cursor-pointer! flex-col py-8 before:-inset-x-6 focus-visible:shadow-none!"
    93→        href={postLink}
    94→      >
    95→        <h2 className="relative break-words text-2xl font-medium">
    96→          <div
    97→            className={clsx(
    98→              'flex items-baseline gap-2',
    99→              isLogged || data.pin ? 'w-[calc(100%-2rem)]' : 'w-full',
   100→            )}
   101→          >
   102→            <span>{data.title}</span>
   103→            <span className="-translate-y-1">
   104→              {data.isTranslated && data.translationMeta && (
   105→                <TranslatedBadge translationMeta={data.translationMeta} />
   106→              )}
   107→            </span>
   108→          </div>
   109→
   110→          <PostPinIcon id={data.id} pin={!!data.pin} />
   111→        </h2>
   112→        <div className="relative mt-4 space-y-2">
   113→          <div className="relative overflow-hidden text-justify">
   114→            {data.summary && (
   115→              <p className="mb-2 break-all leading-loose text-neutral-9/90">
   116→                {data.summary}
   117→              </p>
   118→            )}
   119→          </div>
   120→        </div>
   121→
   122→        <div className="post-meta-bar flex select-none flex-wrap items-center justify-end gap-4 text-neutral-9/60">
   123→          <PostMetaBar meta={data} />
   124→        </div>
   125→      </MagneticHoverEffect>
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./apps/web/src/components/modules/post/fab/PostsSettingsFab.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import clsx from 'clsx'
     4→import { useIsomorphicLayoutEffect } from 'foxact/use-isomorphic-layout-effect'
     5→import { atom, useAtom, useSetAtom } from 'jotai'
     6→import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
     7→import { useCallback } from 'react'
     8→
     9→import { FABPortable } from '~/components/ui/fab'
    10→import { FloatPanel } from '~/components/ui/float-panel/FloatPanel'
    11→import { Select } from '~/components/ui/select'
    12→import { useEventCallback } from '~/hooks/common/use-event-callback'
    13→import { useSetSearchParams } from '~/hooks/common/use-set-search-params'
    14→import { useRouter } from '~/i18n/navigation'
    15→import { Noop } from '~/lib/noop'
    16→import type { PostsParams } from '~/lib/route-builder'
    17→import { routeBuilder, Routes } from '~/lib/route-builder'
    18→
    19→import { postsViewModeAtom, usePostViewMode } from '../atom'
    20→
    21→type SortBy = 'default' | 'created' | 'modified'
    22→type OrderBy = 'asc' | 'desc'
    23→
    24→type SortByValues = {
    25→  label: string
    26→  value: SortBy
    27→}[]
    28→
    29→type OrderByValues = {
    30→  label: string
    31→  value: OrderBy
    32→}[]
    33→
    34→const sortByAtom = atom<SortBy>('default')
    35→const orderByAtom = atom<OrderBy>('desc')
    36→
    37→const SortingAndOrdering = () => {
    38→  const t = useTranslations('common')
    39→  const [sortBy, setSortBy] = useAtom(sortByAtom)
    40→  const [orderBy, setOrderBy] = useAtom(orderByAtom)
    41→
    42→  const sortByValues = [
    43→    {
    44→      label: t('sort_default'),
    45→      value: 'default',
    46→    },
    47→    {
    48→      label: t('sort_created'),
    49→      value: 'created',
    50→    },
    51→    {
    52→      label: t('sort_modified'),
    53→      value: 'modified',
    54→    },
    55→  ] as SortByValues
    56→
    57→  const orderByValues = [
    58→    {
    59→      label: t('order_desc'),
    60→      value: 'desc',
    61→    },
    62→    {
    63→      label: t('order_asc'),
    64→      value: 'asc',
    65→    },
    66→  ] as OrderByValues
    67→  const router = useRouter()
    68→  const handleChange = useEventCallback(() => {
    69→    const params = {} as PostsParams
    70→    if (sortBy === 'default') {
    71→      router.push(routeBuilder(Routes.Posts, {}))
    72→      return
    73→    }
    74→    if (orderBy) params.orderBy = orderBy
    75→
    76→    if (sortBy) params.sortBy = sortBy
    77→
    78→    router.replace(routeBuilder(Routes.Posts, params))
    79→  })
    80→  return (
    81→    <>
    82→      <section>
    83→        <div className="ml-1 font-bold">{t('sort_by')}</div>
    84→        <Select<SortBy>
    85→          className="mt-2"
    86→          value={sortBy}
    87→          values={sortByValues}
    88→          onChange={useCallback((val) => {
    89→            setSortBy(val)
    90→
    91→            requestAnimationFrame(() => {
    92→              handleChange()
    93→            })
    94→          }, [])}
    95→        />
    96→      </section>
    97→
    98→      <section className="mb-2 mt-4">
    99→        <div className="ml-1 font-bold">{t('order_label')}</div>
   100→        <Select<OrderBy>
   101→          value={orderBy}
   102→          values={orderByValues}
   103→          className={clsx(
   104→            'mt-2',
   105→            sortBy === 'default' && 'pointer-events-none opacity-50',
   106→          )}
   107→          onChange={useCallback((val) => {
   108→            setOrderBy(val)
   109→            requestAnimationFrame(() => {
   110→              handleChange()
   111→            })
   112→          }, [])}
   113→        />
   114→      </section>
   115→    </>
   116→  )
   117→}
   118→
   119→export const PostsSettingFab = () => {
   120→  const t = useTranslations('common')
   121→  const setViewMode = useSetAtom(postsViewModeAtom)
   122→  const viewMode = usePostViewMode()
   123→  const setParams = useSetSearchParams()
   124→
   125→  useIsomorphicLayoutEffect(() => {
   126→    setParams('view_mode', viewMode)
   127→  }, [viewMode])
   128→
   129→  return (
   130→    <FloatPanel
   131→      placement="left-end"
   132→      triggerElement={
   133→        <FABPortable onClick={Noop}>
   134→          <i className="i-mingcute-settings-5-line" />
   135→        </FABPortable>
   136→      }
   137→    >
   138→      <main className="relative flex w-[300px] flex-col">
   139→        <SortingAndOrdering />
   140→        <section className="mb-2 mt-4">
   141→          <div className="ml-1 font-bold">{t('view_mode')}</div>
   142→
   143→          <div className="mt-4 grid w-full grid-cols-2 gap-2 px-2">
   144→            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   145→              <input
   146→                checked={viewMode === 'compact'}
   147→                className="radio-accent radio radio-xs"
   148→                id="compact"
   149→                name="radio-4"
   150→                type="radio"
   151→                onChange={(e) => {
   152→                  if (e.target.checked) setViewMode('compact')
   153→                }}
   154→              />
   155→
   156→              <label htmlFor="compact">{t('view_compact')}</label>
   157→            </div>
   158→            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   159→              <input
   160→                checked={viewMode === 'loose'}
   161→                className="radio-accent radio radio-xs"
   162→                id="loose"
   163→                name="radio-4"
   164→                type="radio"
   165→                value={viewMode}
   166→                onChange={(e) => {
   167→                  if (e.target.checked) setViewMode('loose')
   168→                }}
   169→              />
   170→
   171→              <label htmlFor="loose">{t('view_preview')}</label>
   172→            </div>
   173→          </div>
   174→        </section>
   175→      </main>
   176→    </FloatPanel>
   177→  )
   178→}
   179→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./apps/web/src/components/modules/post/fab/PostTagsFAB.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import type { TagModel } from '@mx-space/api-client'
     4→import { useQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query'
     5→import { memo, useCallback } from 'react'
     6→
     7→import { EmptyIcon } from '~/components/icons/empty'
     8→import { FABPortable } from '~/components/ui/fab'
     9→import { TimelineList } from '~/components/ui/list/TimelineList'
    10→import { Loading } from '~/components/ui/loading'
    11→import { useModalStack } from '~/components/ui/modal'
    12→import { Tag } from '~/components/ui/tag/Tag'
    13→import { Link } from '~/i18n/navigation'
    14→import { apiClient } from '~/lib/request'
    15→import { routeBuilder, Routes } from '~/lib/route-builder'
    16→
    17→export const PostTagsFAB = () => {
    18→  const { present } = useModalStack()
    19→  return (
    20→    <FABPortable
    21→      onClick={() => {
    22→        present({
    23→          content: TagsModal,
    24→          clickOutsideToDismiss: true,
    25→          title: '标签云',
    26→          modalClassName: 'w-[900px] max-w-full',
    27→        })
    28→      }}
    29→    >
    30→      <i className="i-mingcute-hashtag-line" />
    31→    </FABPortable>
    32→  )
    33→}
    34→
    35→const TagsModal = () => {
    36→  const { data, isLoading } = useQuery({
    37→    queryKey: ['tags'],
    38→    queryFn: async () => (await apiClient.category.getAllTags()).data,
    39→  })
    40→
    41→  const { present } = useModalStack()
    42→  const handleTagClick = useCallback(
    43→    (tag: TagModel) => {
    44→      present({
    45→        content: () => <TagDetailModal {...tag} />,
    46→        title: (
    47→          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
    48→            Tag: {tag.name}
    49→            <a
    50→              aria-label={`Go to ${tag.name} tag detail`}
    51→              href={routeBuilder(Routes.Tag, { name: tag.name })}
    52→              rel="noreferrer"
    53→              target="_blank"
    54→            >
    55→              <i className="i-mingcute-arrow-right-up-line translate-y-[2px] opacity-70" />
    56→            </a>
    57→          </div>
    58→        ),
    59→      })
    60→    },
    61→    [present],
    62→  )
    63→  if (isLoading) return <Loading />
    64→  if (!data) return <EmptyIcon />
    65→  return (
    66→    <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-3">
    67→      {data.map((tag) => (
    68→        <TagInternal key={tag.name} {...tag} onClick={handleTagClick} />
    69→      ))}
    70→    </div>
    71→  )
    72→}
    73→
    74→const TagInternal = memo(function TagInternal(
    75→  props: TagModel & {
    76→    onClick?: (tag: TagModel) => void
    77→  },
    78→) {
    79→  const { count, name } = props
    80→
    81→  return (
    82→    // @ts-ignore
    83→    <Tag count={count} passProps={props} text={name} onClick={props.onClick} />
    84→  )
    85→})
    86→
    87→export const TagDetailModal = (props: { name: string }) => {
    88→  const { name } = props
    89→  const { data, isLoading } = useQuery({
    90→    queryKey: [name, 'tag'],
    91→    queryFn: async ({ queryKey }) => {
    92→      const [tagName] = queryKey
    93→      return (await apiClient.category.getTagByName(tagName)).data
    94→    },
    95→    staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 60 * 24,
    96→  })
    97→  const { dismissAll } = useModalStack()
    98→  if (isLoading)
    99→    return (
   100→      <div className="center flex h-24 w-full">
   101→        <div className="loading loading-dots loading-md" />
   102→      </div>
   103→    )
   104→
   105→  if (!data) return <EmptyIcon />
   106→
   107→  return (
   108→    <TimelineList>
   109→      {data
   110→        .sort(
   111→          (a, b) =>
   112→            new Date(b.created).getTime() - new Date(a.created).getTime(),
   113→        )
   114→        .map((item) => (
   115→          <li
   116→            className="flex items-center justify-between"
   117→            data-id={item.id}
   118→            key={item.id}
   119→          >
   120→            <span className="flex min-w-0 shrink items-center">
   121→              <span className="mr-2 inline-block tabular-nums">
   122→                {Intl.DateTimeFormat('en-us', {
   123→                  month: '2-digit',
   124→                  day: '2-digit',
   125→                  year: '2-digit',
   126→                }).format(new Date(item.created))}
   127→              </span>
   128→              <Link
   129→                className="min-w-0 truncate leading-6"
   130→                href={routeBuilder(Routes.Post, {
   131→                  category: item.category.slug,
   132→                  slug: item.slug,
   133→                })}
   134→                onClick={() => {
   135→                  dismissAll()
   136→                }}
   137→              >
   138→                <span className="min-w-0 truncate">{item.title}</span>
   139→              </Link>
   140→            </span>
   141→          </li>
   142→        ))}
   143→    </TimelineList>
   144→  )
   145→}
   146→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     6→import { AIGenBadge } from '~/components/modules/ai/AIGenBadge'

    23→const sectionBlockClassName = 'flex items-center space-x-1 shrink-0'
    24→export const NoteMetaBar = () => (
    25→  <>

    27→    <NoteMetaMood />
    28→    <NoteMetaReadCount />
    29→    <NoteMetaLikeCount />
    30→    <NoteMetaCC />
    31→    <NoteMetaAIGen />
    32→    <NoteMetaTranslation />

    35→
    36→export const NoteMetaAIGen = () => {
    37→  const aiGen = useCurrentNoteDataSelector((data) => data?.data.meta?.aiGen)
    38→  if (aiGen === undefined || aiGen === null || aiGen === '') return null
    39→
    40→  return (
    41→    <>
    42→      {dividerVertical}

    44→        <AIGenBadge
    45→          className="border-transparent! bg-transparent px-1.5! py-0!"

    47→        />
    48→      </span>
    49→    </>
    50→  )
    51→}

    53→export const NoteMetaWeather = () => {
    54→  const weather = useCurrentNoteDataSelector((data) => data?.data.weather)
    55→  const t = useTranslations('common')
    56→  if (!weather) return null
    57→  return (
    58→    <>
    59→      {dividerVertical}
    60→      <span className={sectionBlockClassName} key="weather">
    61→        {weather2icon(weather)}
    62→        <span className="font-medium">{getWeatherLabel(weather, t)}</span>
    63→      </span>
    64→    </>
    65→  )
    66→}
    67→
    68→export const NoteMetaMood = () => {
    69→  const mood = useCurrentNoteDataSelector((data) => data?.data.mood)
    70→  const t = useTranslations('common')
    71→
    72→  if (!mood) return null
    73→  return (
    74→    <>
    75→      {dividerVertical}
    76→      <span className={sectionBlockClassName} key="mood">
    77→        {mood2icon(mood)}
    78→        <span className="font-medium">{getMoodLabel(mood, t)}</span>
    79→      </span>
    80→    </>
    81→  )
    82→}
    83→
    84→export const NoteMetaReadCount = () => {

    86→  if (!read) return null

    88→    <>

    91→        <i className="i-mingcute-book-6-line" />
    92→
    93→        <span className="font-medium">
    94→          <NumberSmoothTransition>{read}</NumberSmoothTransition>
    95→        </span>
    96→      </span>
    97→    </>
    98→  )
    99→}
   100→

   102→  const like = useCurrentNoteDataSelector((data) => data?.data.count.like)
   103→  if (!like) return null

   111→        </span>
   112→      </span>

   116→
   117→export const NoteMetaCC = () => (
   118→  <NoteMetaCCInner />

   120→
   121→const NoteMetaCCInner = () => {

   123→
   124→  return (

   126→      {dividerVertical}
   127→      <span className="inline-flex items-center" key="cc">
   128→        <FloatPopover
   129→          asChild
   130→          mobileAsSheet
   131→          type="tooltip"
   132→          triggerElement={
   133→            <a
   134→              className="inline-flex cursor-pointer items-center text-current"
   135→              href="https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/deed.zh"
   136→              rel="noreferrer"
   137→              target="_blank"
   138→            >
   139→              <CreativeCommonsIcon />
   140→            </a>
   141→          }
   142→        >
   143→          {t('copyright_license_tooltip')}
   144→        </FloatPopover>
   145→      </span>
   146→    </>
   147→  )
   148→}
   149→
   150→export const NoteMetaReadingCount = () => (
   151→  <CurrentReadingCountingMetaBarItem leftElement={dividerVertical} />
   152→)
   153→
   154→export const NoteMetaTranslation = () => {
   155→  const translationData = useCurrentNoteDataSelector((data) => ({
   156→    availableTranslations: (data?.data as any)?.availableTranslations as
   157→      | string[]
   158→      | undefined,
   159→    sourceLang: data?.data.translationMeta?.sourceLang,
   160→  }))
   161→
   162→  if (

   164→    translationData.availableTranslations.length === 0
   165→  ) {

   167→  }
   168→
   169→  return (
   170→    <>
   171→      {dividerVertical}
   172→      <span className={sectionBlockClassName}>
   173→        <TranslationLanguageSwitcher
   174→          availableTranslations={translationData.availableTranslations}
   175→          sourceLang={translationData.sourceLang}
   176→        />
   177→      </span>
   178→    </>
   179→  )
   180→}
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./apps/web/src/components/modules/note/NoteTimelineItem.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import type { TargetAndTransition } from 'motion/react'
     4→import { m } from 'motion/react'
     5→import { memo } from 'react'
     6→import { tv } from 'tailwind-variants'
     7→
     8→import { LeftToRightTransitionView } from '~/components/ui/transition'
     9→import { Link } from '~/i18n/navigation'
    10→import { clsxm } from '~/lib/helper'
    11→import { routeBuilder, Routes } from '~/lib/route-builder'
    12→import { springScrollToTop } from '~/lib/scroller'
    13→
    14→const styles = tv({
    15→  base: 'text-neutral-8 min-w-0 truncate text-left opacity-50 transition-all tabular-nums hover:opacity-80',
    16→  variants: {
    17→    status: {
    18→      active: 'ml-2 opacity-100',
    19→    },
    20→  },
    21→})
    22→const initialLi: TargetAndTransition = {
    23→  opacity: 0.0001,
    24→}
    25→const animateLi: TargetAndTransition = {
    26→  opacity: 1,
    27→}
    28→
    29→export const NoteTimelineItem = memo<{
    30→  active: boolean
    31→  created?: Date | string
    32→  title: string
    33→  nid: number
    34→  slug?: string | null
    35→
    36→  layout?: boolean
    37→}>((props) => {
    38→  const { active, nid, title, layout, slug, created } = props
    39→  const href = routeBuilder(Routes.Note, {
    40→    id: nid,
    41→    slug: slug || undefined,
    42→    created,
    43→  })
    44→  return (
    45→    <m.li
    46→      animate={animateLi}
    47→      className="flex items-center"
    48→      exit={initialLi}
    49→      initial={initialLi}
    50→      layout={layout}
    51→      layoutId={layout ? `note-${nid}` : undefined}
    52→    >
    53→      {active && (
    54→        <LeftToRightTransitionView
    55→          as="span"
    56→          className="inline-flex items-center"
    57→        >
    58→          <i className="i-material-symbols-arrow-circle-right-outline-rounded duration-200" />
    59→        </LeftToRightTransitionView>
    60→      )}
    61→      <Link
    62→        href={href}
    63→        className={clsxm(
    64→          active
    65→            ? styles({
    66→                status: 'active',
    67→              })
    68→            : styles(),
    69→        )}
    70→        onClick={springScrollToTop}
    71→      >
    72→        {title}
    73→      </Link>
    74→    </m.li>
    75→  )
    76→})
    77→NoteTimelineItem.displayName = 'MemoedItem'
    78→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./apps/web/src/components/modules/note/NoteTopicDetail.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import type {
     4→  NoteTopicListItem,
     5→  PaginateResult,
     6→  TopicModel,
     7→} from '@mx-space/api-client'
     8→import { useQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query'
     9→import { useLocale, useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
    10→import type { FC } from 'react'
    11→
    12→import { useIsMobile } from '~/atoms/hooks/viewport'
    13→import { MdiClockOutline } from '~/components/icons/clock'
    14→import { MdiFountainPenTip } from '~/components/icons/pen'
    15→import { Divider, DividerVertical } from '~/components/ui/divider'
    16→import { Loading } from '~/components/ui/loading'
    17→import { RelativeTime } from '~/components/ui/relative-time'
    18→import { useIsClient } from '~/hooks/common/use-is-client'
    19→import { Link } from '~/i18n/navigation'
    20→import { getNoteRouteParams } from '~/lib/note-route'
    21→import { apiClient } from '~/lib/request'
    22→import { routeBuilder, Routes } from '~/lib/route-builder'
    23→import { useCurrentNoteDataSelector } from '~/providers/note/CurrentNoteDataProvider'
    24→
    25→import { NoteTopicMarkdownRender } from './NoteTopicMarkdownRender'
    26→
    27→export const NoteTopicDetail: FC<{ topic: TopicModel }> = (props) => {
    28→  const { topic } = props
    29→  const { id: topicId } = topic
    30→  const locale = useLocale()
    31→  const t = useTranslations('note')
    32→
    33→  const { data, isLoading } = useQuery({
    34→    queryKey: [`topic-${topicId}`, locale],
    35→    queryFn: () =>
    36→      apiClient.note.proxy
    37→        .topics(topicId)
    38→        .get<PaginateResult<NoteTopicListItem>>({
    39→          params: {
    40→            page: 1,
    41→            size: 1,
    42→            sortBy: 'created',
    43→            sortOrder: -1,
    44→            lang: locale,
    45→          },
    46→        }),
    47→  })
    48→
    49→  const isMobile = useIsMobile()
    50→  const isClient = useIsClient()
    51→  if (!isClient) {
    52→    return null
    53→  }
    54→
    55→  return (
    56→    <div className="flex w-[400px] flex-col">
    57→      <Link
    58→        href={routeBuilder(Routes.NoteTopic, {
    59→          slug: topic.slug,
    60→        })}
    61→      >
    62→        <h1 className="m-0! inline-block pb-2 text-lg font-medium">
    63→          {topic.name}
    64→        </h1>
    65→        {isMobile && (
    66→          <i className="i-mingcute-arrow-right-up-line ml-2 translate-y-[2px] opacity-70" />
    67→        )}
    68→      </Link>
    69→
    70→      <div className="line-clamp-2 break-all text-neutral-6">
    71→        <NoteTopicMarkdownRender>{topic.introduce}</NoteTopicMarkdownRender>
    72→      </div>
    73→      {topic.description && (
    74→        <>
    75→          <Divider />
    76→          <div className="leading-8 text-neutral-7">
    77→            <NoteTopicMarkdownRender>
    78→              {topic.description}
    79→            </NoteTopicMarkdownRender>
    80→          </div>
    81→        </>
    82→      )}
    83→
    84→      <Divider />
    85→      {isLoading ? (
    86→        <Loading className="my-4" />
    87→      ) : (
    88→        data?.data[0] && (
    89→          <p className="flex items-center">
    90→            <MdiClockOutline />
    91→            <DividerVertical />
    92→            <span className="shrink-0">{t('topic_recent_update')}</span>
    93→            <DividerVertical />
    94→            <span className="inline-flex min-w-0 shrink">
    95→              <Link
    96→                className="truncate"
    97→                href={routeBuilder(Routes.Note, {
    98→                  ...getNoteRouteParams(data.data[0]!),
    99→                })}
   100→              >
   101→                {data?.data[0]?.title}
   102→              </Link>
   103→              <span className="shrink-0">
   104→                （
   105→                <RelativeTime
   106→                  date={data?.data[0].modified || data?.data[0].created}
   107→                  displayAbsoluteTimeAfterDay={Infinity}
   108→                />
   109→                ）
   110→              </span>
   111→            </span>
   112→          </p>
   113→        )
   114→      )}
   115→
   116→      {!isLoading && (
   117→        <>
   118→          <Divider />
   119→          <p className="flex items-center">
   120→            <MdiFountainPenTip />
   121→            <DividerVertical />
   122→            {t('topic_total_notes', { total: data?.pagination?.total ?? 0 })}
   123→          </p>
   124→        </>
   125→      )}
   126→    </div>
   127→  )
   128→}
   129→
   130→export const ToTopicLink: FC = () => {
   131→  const topic = useCurrentNoteDataSelector((data) => data?.data.topic)
   132→  if (!topic) return null
   133→  return (
   134→    <Link
   135→      href={routeBuilder(Routes.NoteTopic, {
   136→        slug: topic.slug,
   137→      })}
   138→    >
   139→      <span className="grow truncate opacity-80 hover:opacity-100">
   140→        {topic.name}
   141→      </span>
   142→    </Link>
   143→  )
   144→}
   145→
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./apps/web/src/components/modules/note/NoteActionAside.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import { m, useAnimationControls } from 'motion/react'
     4→import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
     5→
     6→import { useIsMobile } from '~/atoms/hooks/viewport'
     7→import { MotionButtonBase } from '~/components/ui/button'
     8→import { useModalStack } from '~/components/ui/modal'
     9→import { NumberSmoothTransition } from '~/components/ui/number-transition/NumberSmoothTransition'
    10→import { useForceUpdate } from '~/hooks/common/use-force-update'
    11→import { useIsClient } from '~/hooks/common/use-is-client'
    12→import { isLikedBefore, setLikeId } from '~/lib/cookie'
    13→import { clsxm } from '~/lib/helper'
    14→import { buildNotePath } from '~/lib/note-route'
    15→import { apiClient } from '~/lib/request'
    16→import { toast } from '~/lib/toast'
    17→import { urlBuilder } from '~/lib/url-builder'
    18→import {
    19→  getCurrentNoteData,
    20→  setCurrentNoteData,
    21→  useCurrentNoteDataSelector,
    22→} from '~/providers/note/CurrentNoteDataProvider'
    23→import { useCurrentNoteNid } from '~/providers/note/CurrentNoteIdProvider'
    24→import { useIsEoFWrappedElement } from '~/providers/shared/WrappedElementProvider'
    25→
    26→import {
    27→  ActionAsideContainer,
    28→  ActionAsideIcon,
    29→} from '../shared/ActionAsideContainer'
    30→import { ArticleRightAside } from '../shared/ArticleRightAside'
    31→import { AsideCommentButton } from '../shared/AsideCommentButton'
    32→import { AsideDonateButton } from '../shared/AsideDonateButton'
    33→import { ShareModal } from '../shared/ShareModal'
    34→import { asideButtonStyles } from '../shared/styles'
    35→import { usePresentSubscribeModal } from '../subscribe'
    36→
    37→export const NoteBottomBarAction: Component = () => {
    38→  const isMobile = useIsMobile()
    39→  if (!isMobile) return null
    40→  return (
    41→    <div className="mb-8 mt-4 flex items-center justify-center space-x-8">
    42→      <LikeButton />
    43→      <ShareButton />
    44→      <SubscribeButton />
    45→      <AsideDonateButton />
    46→    </div>
    47→  )
    48→}
    49→
    50→export const NoteActionAside: Component = ({ className }) => (
    51→  <ArticleRightAside>
    52→    <ActionAsideContainer className={className}>
    53→      <LikeButton />
    54→      <ShareButton />
    55→      <SubscribeButton />
    56→      <NoteAsideCommentButton />
    57→      <AsideDonateButton />
    58→    </ActionAsideContainer>
    59→  </ArticleRightAside>
    60→)
    61→
    62→const NoteAsideCommentButton = () => {
    63→  const { title, id, allowComment } =
    64→    useCurrentNoteDataSelector((_data) => {
    65→      const { data } = _data || {}
    66→      return {
    67→        title: data?.title,
    68→        id: data?.id,
    69→        allowComment: data?.allowComment,
    70→      }
    71→    }) || {}
    72→
    73→  const isEoF = useIsEoFWrappedElement()
    74→  if (!id) return null
    75→  if (isEoF) return null
    76→  if (!allowComment) return null
    77→  return <AsideCommentButton refId={id} title={title!} />
    78→}
    79→
    80→const LikeButton = () => {
    81→  const t = useTranslations('common')
    82→  const control = useAnimationControls()
    83→  const [update] = useForceUpdate()
    84→
    85→  const likeCount = useCurrentNoteDataSelector((data) => data?.data.count.like)
    86→  const id = useCurrentNoteDataSelector((data) => data?.data.id)
    87→  const nid = useCurrentNoteNid()
    88→
    89→  if (!id) return null
    90→
    91→  const handleLike = () => {
    92→    if (isLikedBefore(id)) return
    93→    if (!nid) return
    94→    apiClient.activity.likeIt('Note', id).then(() => {
    95→      setLikeId(id)
    96→      setCurrentNoteData((draft) => {
    97→        draft.data.count.like += 1
    98→      })
    99→      update()
   100→    })
   101→  }
   102→
   103→  const isLiked = isLikedBefore(id)
   104→
   105→  return (
   106→    <MotionButtonBase
   107→      aria-label={t('aria_like_note')}
   108→      className="relative flex flex-col space-y-2"
   109→      onClick={() => {
   110→        handleLike()
   111→        control.start('tap', {
   112→          repeat: 5,
   113→        })
   114→        toast.success(t('thanks'), {
   115→          iconElement: (
   116→            <m.i
   117→              className="i-mingcute-heart-fill text-error"
   118→              animate={{
   119→                scale: 1.22,
   120→              }}
   121→              initial={{
   122→                scale: 0.96,
   123→              }}
   124→              transition={{
   125→                ease: 'easeInOut',
   126→                delay: 0.3,
   127→                repeat: 5,
   128→                repeatDelay: 0.3,
   129→              }}
   130→            />
   131→          ),
   132→        })
   133→      }}
   134→    >
   135→      <m.i
   136→        animate={control}
   137→        className={clsxm(
   138→          'duration-200 hover:text-error',
   139→          asideButtonStyles.base,
   140→          !isLiked && 'i-mingcute-heart-line',
   141→          isLiked && 'i-mingcute-heart-fill text-error',
   142→        )}
   143→        variants={{
   144→          tap: {
   145→            scale: 1.3,
   146→          },
   147→        }}
   148→      />
   149→      {!!likeCount && (
   150→        <span className="absolute bottom-0 right-0 translate-x-[10px] text-[10px]">
   151→          <NumberSmoothTransition>{likeCount}</NumberSmoothTransition>
   152→        </span>
   153→      )}
   154→    </MotionButtonBase>
   155→  )
   156→}
   157→
   158→const SubscribeButton = () => {
   159→  const { present } = usePresentSubscribeModal(['note_c'])
   160→  return (
   161→    <MotionButtonBase className="flex flex-col space-y-2" onClick={present}>
   162→      <ActionAsideIcon className="i-material-symbols-notifications-active-outline hover:text-accent" />
   163→    </MotionButtonBase>
   164→  )
   165→}
   166→
   167→const ShareButton = () => {
   168→  const t = useTranslations('common')
   169→  const isClient = useIsClient()
   170→  const { present } = useModalStack()
   171→
   172→  if (!isClient) return null
   173→
   174→  return (
   175→    <MotionButtonBase
   176→      aria-label={t('aria_share_note')}
   177→      className="flex flex-col space-y-2"
   178→      onClick={() => {
   179→        const note = getCurrentNoteData()?.data
   180→
   181→        if (!note) return
   182→
   183→        const hasShare = 'share' in navigator
   184→
   185→        const title = t('share_treasure')
   186→        const url = urlBuilder(buildNotePath(note)).href
   187→
   188→        const text = t('share_message', { title: note.title })
   189→
   190→        if (hasShare)
   191→          navigator.share({
   192→            title: note.title,
   193→            text: note.text,
   194→            url,
   195→          })
   196→        else {
   197→          present({
   198→            title: t('share_content'),
   199→            clickOutsideToDismiss: true,
   200→            content: () => <ShareModal text={text} title={title} url={url} />,
   201→          })
   202→        }
   203→      }}
   204→    >
   205→      <ActionAsideIcon className="i-mingcute-share-forward-line hover:text-info" />
   206→    </MotionButtonBase>
   207→  )
   208→}
   209→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./apps/web/src/components/modules/note/NoteFontFab.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import { useAtomValue } from 'jotai'
     4→import { atomWithStorage, selectAtom } from 'jotai/utils'
     5→import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
     6→import { useEffect, useMemo } from 'react'
     7→
     8→import { useMainMarkdownElement } from '~/atoms/hooks/reading'
     9→import { MotionButtonBase } from '~/components/ui/button'
    10→import { FABPortable } from '~/components/ui/fab'
    11→import { FloatPanel } from '~/components/ui/float-panel'
    12→import { clsxm } from '~/lib/helper'
    13→import { loadStyleSheet } from '~/lib/load-script'
    14→import { Noop } from '~/lib/noop'
    15→import { jotaiStore } from '~/lib/store'
    16→
    17→type Font = 'serif' | 'sans' | 'youzai' | 'lxgw'
    18→const fontAtom = atomWithStorage<Font>('note-font', 'serif')
    19→
    20→export const NoteFontSettingFab = () => (
    21→  <NoteFontSettingFabInner />
    22→)
    23→
    24→const NoteFontSettingFabInner = () => {
    25→  const t = useTranslations('note')
    26→
    27→  return (
    28→    <>
    29→      <FloatPanel
    30→        triggerElement={
    31→          <FABPortable onClick={Noop}>
    32→            <i className="i-mingcute-font-line" />
    33→          </FABPortable>
    34→        }
    35→      >
    36→        <main>
    37→          <div className="mb-4 text-lg font-medium">
    38→            {t('font_selector_title')}
    39→          </div>
    40→          <div className="grid w-[200px] grid-cols-2 grid-rows-2 gap-4">
    41→            <FontItem type="serif">
    42→              <SerifFontSvg />
    43→            </FontItem>
    44→
    45→            <FontItem type="sans">
    46→              <SansFont />
    47→            </FontItem>
    48→
    49→            <FontItem type="lxgw">
    50→              <LXGWFontSvg />
    51→            </FontItem>
    52→
    53→            <FontItem type="youzai">
    54→              <YouZaiFontSvg />
    55→            </FontItem>
    56→          </div>
    57→        </main>
    58→      </FloatPanel>
    59→      <FontAdjust />
    60→    </>
    61→  )
    62→}
    63→
    64→const FONT_CONFIG = {
    65→  youzai: {
    66→    stylesheetUrl:
    67→      'https://fastly.jsdelivr.net/gh/Innei/static@master/fonts/yozai/stylesheet.css',
    68→    fontFamily: `'Yozai', 'LXGW WenKai Screen R', var(--font-sans), var(--font-serif), system-ui`,
    69→  },
    70→  sans: {
    71→    fontFamily: `var(--font-sans), system-ui`,
    72→  },
    73→  lxgw: {
    74→    stylesheetUrl:
    75→      'https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/lxgw-wenkai-screen-webfont/1.7.0/lxgwwenkaiscreenr.css',
    76→    fontFamily: `'LXGW WenKai Screen R', Yozai, var(--font-sans), var(--font-serif), system-ui`,
    77→  },
    78→}
    79→
    80→function loadAndApplyFont(
    81→  container: HTMLElement,
    82→  config: (typeof FONT_CONFIG)[keyof typeof FONT_CONFIG],
    83→) {
    84→  if ('stylesheetUrl' in config && config.stylesheetUrl) {
    85→    loadStyleSheet(config.stylesheetUrl)
    86→  }
    87→
    88→  // Resolve var() references so computed font stacks are always concrete values
    89→  const computedStyle = getComputedStyle(document.documentElement)
    90→  const resolved = config.fontFamily.replaceAll(
    91→    /var\(--([^)]+)\)/g,
    92→    (_, name) => computedStyle.getPropertyValue(`--${name}`).trim() || '',
    93→  )
    94→
    95→  const applyFont = (el: HTMLElement) => {
    96→    el.style.setProperty('--note-font-override', resolved)
    97→    el.style.setProperty('--rc-font-family', resolved)
    98→    el.style.fontFamily = config.fontFamily
    99→  }
   100→
   101→  const cleanupFont = (el: HTMLElement) => {
   102→    el.style.removeProperty('--note-font-override')
   103→    el.style.removeProperty('--rc-font-family')
   104→    el.style.removeProperty('font-family')
   105→  }
   106→
   107→  const apply = () => {
   108→    applyFont(container)
   109→    container.querySelectorAll<HTMLElement>('.rich-content').forEach(applyFont)
   110→  }
   111→
   112→  apply()
   113→
   114→  const observer = new MutationObserver(() => {
   115→    apply()
   116→  })
   117→  observer.observe(container, {
   118→    childList: true,
   119→    subtree: true,
   120→  })
   121→
   122→  return () => {
   123→    observer.disconnect()
   124→    cleanupFont(container)
   125→    container
   126→      .querySelectorAll<HTMLElement>('.rich-content')
   127→      .forEach(cleanupFont)
   128→  }
   129→}
   130→
   131→const FontAdjust = () => {
   132→  const currentFont = useAtomValue(fontAtom)
   133→  const mainContentElement = useMainMarkdownElement()
   134→
   135→  useEffect(() => {
   136→    const config = (FONT_CONFIG as any)[currentFont]
   137→    if (config && mainContentElement) {
   138→      return loadAndApplyFont(mainContentElement, config)
   139→    }
   140→  }, [currentFont, mainContentElement])
   141→  return null
   142→}
   143→
   144→const FontItem: Component<{
   145→  type: Font
   146→}> = ({ children, type }) => {
   147→  const isSelected = useAtomValue(
   148→    useMemo(() => selectAtom(fontAtom, (value) => value === type), [type]),
   149→  )
   150→  return (
   151→    <MotionButtonBase
   152→      className={clsxm(
   153→        'center flex aspect-square select-none rounded-lg ring-1 ring-neutral-2',
   154→        'duration-200',
   155→        isSelected && 'ring-accent!',
   156→      )}
   157→      onClick={() => {
   158→        jotaiStore.set(fontAtom, type)
   159→      }}
   160→    >
   161→      {children}
   162→    </MotionButtonBase>
   163→  )
   164→}
   165→
   166→export const SansFont = () => {
   167→  const t = useTranslations('note')
   168→
   169→  return (
   170→    <span className="font-sans text-[30px]">{t('font_preview_glyph')}</span>
   171→  )
   172→}
   173→
   174→export const YouZaiFontSvg = () => (
   175→  <svg
   176→    className="size-[1em] text-[30px]"
   177→    viewBox="0 0 16 17"
   178→    xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
   179→  >
   180→    <path
   181→      d="M1.9 9.8L1.9 9.8Q1.8 9.8 1.7 9.7Q1.6 9.6 1.6 9.5Q1.5 9.5 1.5 9.4L1.5 9.4Q1.7 8.7 2.0 8.0Q2.3 7.4 2.5 6.7L2.5 6.7L2.5 6.4Q2.5 6.2 2.8 6.1L2.8 6.1L8.0 5.6Q7.7 5.1 7.4 4.6Q7.2 4.1 7.0 3.5L7.0 3.5Q7.0 3.5 7.0 3.4L7.0 3.4Q7.2 3.3 7.3 3.2L7.3 3.2L7.5 3.2Q8.1 3.7 8.5 4.7L8.5 4.7Q8.6 4.9 8.7 5.0Q8.7 5.2 8.7 5.3L8.7 5.3L8.7 5.6Q9.5 5.6 11.4 5.3L11.4 5.3Q12.7 5.1 14.0 5.0L14.0 5.0L14.1 5.0L14.4 5.0Q14.6 5.1 14.7 5.3L14.7 5.3L14.7 5.5Q14.4 6.2 14.1 6.9Q13.9 7.6 13.5 8.3L13.5 8.3Q13.3 8.4 13.1 8.4L13.1 8.4Q12.8 8.3 12.8 8.1L12.8 8.1L12.8 7.8L13.5 6.0L13.2 6.0Q10.7 6.3 8.3 6.5Q5.8 6.7 3.4 6.9L3.4 6.9Q2.9 8.5 2.2 9.7L2.2 9.7Q2.1 9.8 1.9 9.8ZM8.0 17.4L8.0 17.4L7.8 17.4Q7.1 17.1 6.3 16.9Q5.5 16.6 4.8 16.2L4.8 16.2L4.7 15.9L4.9 15.5Q5.0 15.5 5.3 15.5L5.3 15.5Q5.9 15.7 6.6 16.0L6.6 16.0Q7.2 16.2 7.9 16.5L7.9 16.5Q8.0 16.4 8.1 16.3Q8.2 16.2 8.3 16.1L8.3 16.1Q9.0 15.2 9.0 13.4L9.0 13.4Q9.0 13.0 8.9 12.6L8.9 12.6Q7.0 12.8 5.1 12.9Q3.3 13.0 1.4 13.3L1.4 13.3Q1.2 13.2 1.1 13.0L1.1 13.0L1.1 12.7L1.4 12.4Q3.2 12.2 5.0 12.1Q6.8 11.9 8.5 11.8L8.5 11.8L8.6 11.7L8.3 11.0Q8.1 10.5 7.5 10.1L7.5 10.1Q7.3 10.0 7.2 9.8L7.2 9.8Q7.2 9.4 7.5 9.3L7.5 9.3L7.8 9.3L8.5 9.7Q8.9 9.4 9.2 9.0Q9.6 8.6 10.1 8.4L10.1 8.4L9.9 8.4Q9.1 8.5 4.4 9.4L4.4 9.4L4.0 9.2Q4.0 9.1 4.0 8.8L4.0 8.8Q4 8.6 4.2 8.5L4.2 8.5Q4.4 8.5 8.0 7.8L8.0 7.8Q9.9 7.4 11.7 7.3L11.7 7.3Q11.8 7.3 11.9 7.4Q12.0 7.5 12.1 7.6L12.1 7.6L12.1 7.8Q11.3 8.5 10.6 9.1Q9.8 9.7 9.0 10.4L9.0 10.4Q9.4 11.2 9.6 11.7L9.6 11.7L10.1 11.7Q12.7 11.3 14.5 11.3L14.5 11.3Q14.7 11.3 14.8 11.6L14.8 11.6L14.8 11.8Q14.7 12.1 14.5 12.1L14.5 12.1Q13.0 12.2 9.8 12.6L9.8 12.6L9.9 13.9Q9.8 14.8 9.6 15.6Q9.3 16.4 8.6 17.0L8.6 17.0Q8.6 17.1 8.3 17.3L8.3 17.3Q8.1 17.4 8.0 17.4Z "

   199→export const SerifFontSvg = () => (
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./apps/web/src/components/modules/note/NoteFooterNavigation.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
     4→
     5→import { MdiClockTimeThreeOutline } from '~/components/icons/clock'
     6→import { OnlyMobile } from '~/components/ui/viewport/OnlyMobile'
     7→import { Link, useRouter } from '~/i18n/navigation'
     8→import { routeBuilder, Routes } from '~/lib/route-builder'
     9→import { springScrollToTop } from '~/lib/scroller'
    10→import { useCurrentNoteDataSelector } from '~/providers/note/CurrentNoteDataProvider'
    11→
    12→export const NoteFooterNavigation = () => {
    13→  const t = useTranslations('note')
    14→  const tCommon = useTranslations('common')
    15→  const data = useCurrentNoteDataSelector((data) =>
    16→    !data
    17→      ? null
    18→      : {
    19→          next: data.next
    20→            && data.next.nid
    21→            ? {
    22→                nid: data.next.nid,
    23→                slug: data.next.slug,
    24→                created: data.next.created,
    25→              }
    26→            : null,
    27→          prev: data.prev
    28→            && data.prev.nid
    29→            ? {
    30→                nid: data.prev.nid,
    31→                slug: data.prev.slug,
    32→                created: data.prev.created,
    33→              }
    34→            : null,
    35→          currentObjectId: data.data.id,
    36→        },
    37→  )
    38→
    39→  const router = useRouter()
    40→
    41→  if (!data) return null
    42→
    43→  const { next, prev, currentObjectId } = data
    44→
    45→  return (
    46→    <>
    47→      {/* // 没有 0 的情况 */}
    48→      {(!!prev || !!next) && (
    49→        <>
    50→          <section data-hide-print className="relative mt-4 py-2 text-center">
    51→            <div className="flex items-center justify-between [&>*]:inline-flex [&>*]:items-center [&>*]:space-x-2 [&>*]:p-2">
    52→              {!!next && (
    53→                <Link
    54→                  className="hover:text-accent"
    55→                  href={routeBuilder(Routes.Note, {
    56→                    id: next.nid.toString(),
    57→                    slug: next.slug,
    58→                    created: next.created,
    59→                  })}
    60→                >
    61→                  <i className="i-mingcute-arrow-left-line" />
    62→                  <span>{t('previous_note')}</span>
    63→                </Link>
    64→              )}
    65→
    66→              {!!prev && (
    67→                <Link
    68→                  className="hover:text-accent"
    69→                  href={routeBuilder(Routes.Note, {
    70→                    id: prev.nid.toString(),
    71→                    slug: prev.slug,
    72→                    created: prev.created,
    73→                  })}
    74→                >
    75→                  <span>{t('next_note')}</span>
    76→                  <i className="i-mingcute-arrow-right-line" />
    77→                </Link>
    78→              )}
    79→            </div>
    80→            <div
    81→              className="absolute inset-y-0 left-1/2 flex -translate-x-1/2 items-center space-x-2 text-accent opacity-80 hover:text-accent"
    82→              role="button"
    83→              tabIndex={1}
    84→              onClick={() => {
    85→                springScrollToTop()
    86→                router.push(
    87→                  routeBuilder(Routes.Timelime, {
    88→                    type: 'note',
    89→                    selectId: currentObjectId,
    90→                  }),
    91→                )
    92→              }}
    93→            >
    94→              <span>{tCommon('page_title_timeline')}</span>
    95→              <MdiClockTimeThreeOutline />
    96→            </div>
    97→          </section>
    98→        </>
    99→      )}
   100→    </>
   101→  )
   102→}
   103→
   104→export const NoteFooterNavigationBarForMobile: typeof NoteFooterNavigation =
   105→  () => (
   106→    <OnlyMobile>
   107→      <NoteFooterNavigation />
   108→    </OnlyMobile>
   109→  )
   110→
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentBox/SwitchCommentMode.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import clsx from 'clsx'
     4→import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
     5→
     6→import { useIsOwnerLogged } from '~/atoms/hooks/owner'
     7→import { useSessionReader } from '~/atoms/hooks/reader'
     8→import { MotionButtonBase } from '~/components/ui/button'
     9→import { FloatPopover } from '~/components/ui/float-popover'
    10→import { useAggregationSelector } from '~/providers/root/aggregation-data-provider'
    11→
    12→import { resolveCommentGuard } from '../comment-guard'
    13→import {
    14→  CommentBoxMode,
    15→  setCommentMode,
    16→  useCommentBoxHasText,
    17→  useCommentMode,
    18→} from './hooks'
    19→
    20→const SwitchCommentModeButton = () => {
    21→  const t = useTranslations('comment')
    22→  const mode = useCommentMode()
    23→  const copyMap = {
    24→    [CommentBoxMode.legacy]: t('switch_to_legacy'),
    25→    [CommentBoxMode['with-auth']]: t('switch_to_auth'),
    26→  }
    27→  const copy = copyMap[mode]
    28→  return (
    29→    <>
    30→      <i
    31→        className={clsx(
    32→          mode === CommentBoxMode.legacy
    33→            ? 'i-mingcute-user-4-line'
    34→            : 'i-material-symbols-dynamic-form-outline',
    35→        )}
    36→      />
    37→      <span className="sr-only">{copy}</span>
    38→    </>
    39→  )
    40→}
    41→export const SwitchCommentMode = () => {
    42→  const t = useTranslations('comment')
    43→  const mode = useCommentMode()
    44→  const copyMap = {
    45→    [CommentBoxMode.legacy]: t('switch_to_legacy'),
    46→    [CommentBoxMode['with-auth']]: t('switch_to_auth'),
    47→  }
    48→  const copy = copyMap[mode]
    49→
    50→  const hasText = useCommentBoxHasText()
    51→
    52→  const sessionReader = useSessionReader()
    53→  const notLogged = !sessionReader
    54→  const allowGuestComment = useAggregationSelector(
    55→    (data) => data.commentOptions?.allowGuestComment,
    56→    [],
    57→  ) as boolean | undefined | null
    58→  const disableComment = useAggregationSelector(
    59→    (data) => data.commentOptions?.disableComment,
    60→    [],
    61→  ) as boolean | undefined | null
    62→  const { forceAuthOnly } = resolveCommentGuard({
    63→    allowComment: true,
    64→    disableComment: disableComment ?? undefined,
    65→    allowGuestComment: allowGuestComment ?? undefined,
    66→    hasSessionReader: !!sessionReader,
    67→  })
    68→
    69→  const isOwnerLogged = useIsOwnerLogged()
    70→  if (isOwnerLogged || sessionReader || forceAuthOnly) return null
    71→  return (
    72→    <MotionButtonBase
    73→      className={clsx(
    74→        'absolute left-0 top-0 z-10 rounded-full text-sm',
    75→        'size-6 border border-neutral-3',
    76→        'bg-neutral-2',
    77→        'center flex cursor-pointer',
    78→        'text-neutral-9/50',
    79→        'opacity-0 transition-opacity duration-200 group-[:hover]:opacity-100',
    80→        mode === CommentBoxMode['legacy'] && 'bottom-0 top-auto',
    81→        hasText ||
    82→          (notLogged &&
    83→            mode === CommentBoxMode['with-auth'] &&
    84→            'invisible opacity-0'),
    85→      )}
    86→      onClick={() => {
    87→        setCommentMode(
    88→          mode === CommentBoxMode.legacy
    89→            ? CommentBoxMode['with-auth']
    90→            : CommentBoxMode['legacy'],
    91→        )
    92→      }}
    93→    >
    94→      <FloatPopover TriggerComponent={SwitchCommentModeButton} type="tooltip">
    95→        {copy}
    96→      </FloatPopover>
    97→    </MotionButtonBase>
    98→  )
    99→}
   100→
```
</details></tool-use>
