<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentBox/UniversalTextArea.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import type { LexicalEditor } from 'lexical'
     4→import { $getSelection, $isRangeSelection } from 'lexical'
     5→import dynamic from 'next/dynamic'
     6→import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
     7→import { useCallback, useMemo, useRef } from 'react'
     8→
     9→import { useIsMobile } from '~/atoms/hooks/viewport'
    10→import { FloatPopover } from '~/components/ui/float-popover'
    11→import { MarkdownEditor } from '~/components/ui/markdown-editor'
    12→import { useRefValue } from '~/hooks/common/use-ref-value'
    13→import { clsxm } from '~/lib/helper'
    14→import { sample } from '~/lib/lodash'
    15→
    16→import { KAOMOJI_LIST } from '../../dashboard/comments/kaomoji'
    17→import { KaomojiPanel } from '../../shared/KaomojiPanel'
    18→import { getRandomPlaceholder } from './constants'
    19→import {
    20→  useCommentBoxTextValue,
    21→  useCommentCompact,
    22→  useSendComment,
    23→  useSetCommentBoxValues,
    24→} from './hooks'
    25→import { CommentBoxSlotPortal } from './providers'
    26→
    27→const EmojiPicker = dynamic(() =>
    28→  import('../../shared/EmojiPicker').then((mod) => mod.EmojiPicker),
    29→)
    30→
    31→export const UniversalTextArea: Component<{ autoFocus?: boolean }> = ({
    32→  className,
    33→  autoFocus,
    34→}) => {
    35→  const t = useTranslations('common')
    36→  const placeholder = useRefValue(() => getRandomPlaceholder(t.raw))
    37→  const setter = useSetCommentBoxValues()
    38→  const value = useCommentBoxTextValue()
    39→  const [sendComment] = useSendComment()
    40→  const isMobile = useIsMobile()
    41→
    42→  const editorRef = useRef<LexicalEditor | null>(null)
    43→  const shouldAutoFocusByHash =
    44→    typeof location !== 'undefined' && location.hash === '#comment'
    45→  const shouldAutoFocus = !!autoFocus || shouldAutoFocusByHash
    46→
    47→  const handleInsertText = useCallback((text: string) => {
    48→    const editor = editorRef.current
    49→    if (!editor) return
    50→    editor.focus()
    51→    editor.update(() => {
    52→      const selection = $getSelection()
    53→      if ($isRangeSelection(selection)) {
    54→        selection.insertText(` ${text} `)
    55→      }
    56→    })
    57→  }, [])
    58→
    59→  const contentClassName = useMemo(
    60→    () => clsxm(className, 'overflow-auto flex-1 h-0! min-h-0!'),
    61→    [className],
    62→  )
    63→
    64→  const commentCompact = useCommentCompact()
    65→
    66→  return (
    67→    <MarkdownEditor
    68→      autoFocus={shouldAutoFocus}
    69→      className="relative flex flex-col overflow-hidden pb-8"
    70→      contentClassName={contentClassName}
    71→      placeholder={placeholder}
    72→      scrollIntoView={shouldAutoFocusByHash}
    73→      value={value}
    74→      actions={
    75→        <CommentBoxSlotPortal>
    76→          {!isMobile && (
    77→            <FloatPopover
    78→              headless
    79→              mobileAsSheet
    80→              popoverClassNames="pointer-events-auto"
    81→              popoverWrapperClassNames="z-[999]"
    82→              trigger="click"
    83→              triggerElement={
    84→                <div
    85→                  className={'center inline-flex size-5 text-base'}
    86→                  role="button"
    87→                  tabIndex={0}
    88→                >
    89→                  <i className="i-mingcute-emoji-2-line" />
    90→                  <span className="sr-only">{t('emoji_label')}</span>
    91→                </div>
    92→              }
    93→            >
    94→              <EmojiPicker onEmojiSelect={handleInsertText} />
    95→            </FloatPopover>
    96→          )}
    97→          <KaomojiPanel placement="bottom" onInsert={handleInsertText}>
    98→            <div
    99→              className="center inline-flex shrink-0 text-xs"
   100→              role="button"
   101→              tabIndex={0}
   102→            >
   103→              {useMemo(() => sample(KAOMOJI_LIST), [])}
   104→              <span className="sr-only">{t('kaomoji_label')}</span>
   105→            </div>
   106→          </KaomojiPanel>
   107→        </CommentBoxSlotPortal>
   108→      }
   109→      onChange={(next) => setter('text', next)}
   110→      onSubmit={sendComment}
   111→      onEditorReady={(editor) => {
   112→        editorRef.current = editor
   113→      }}
   114→    />
   115→  )
   116→}
   117→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentBlockGutter.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import type { CommentModel } from '@mx-space/api-client'
     4→import { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from 'react'
     5→
     6→import { useIsMobile } from '~/atoms/hooks/viewport'
     7→import { Avatar } from '~/components/ui/avatar'
     8→import { PresentSheet } from '~/components/ui/sheet'
     9→
    10→import { resolveRangeAnchor } from './anchor-resolve'
    11→import type { BlockInfo } from './anchor-utils'
    12→import { buildBlockAnchorFromIndex } from './anchor-utils'
    13→import { CommentBlockThread } from './CommentBlockThread'
    14→import { useRichContentElement } from './RichContentElementContext'
    15→import type { CommentAnchor } from './types'
    16→
    17→type CommentWithAnchor = CommentModel & { anchor?: CommentAnchor }
    18→
    19→interface CommentBlockGutterProps {
    20→  blockInfos: BlockInfo[]
    21→  comments: CommentWithAnchor[]
    22→  containerRef: React.RefObject<HTMLElement | null>
    23→  currentLang?: string | null
    24→  refId: string
    25→}
    26→
    27→function AvatarStack({
    28→  comments,
    29→  size = 22,
    30→}: {
    31→  comments: CommentWithAnchor[]
    32→  size?: number
    33→}) {
    34→  const uniqueAvatars = useMemo(() => {
    35→    const seen = new Set<string>()
    36→    const result: { avatar?: string; author: string }[] = []
    37→    for (const c of comments) {
    38→      const key = c.avatar || c.author
    39→      if (!seen.has(key)) {
    40→        seen.add(key)
    41→        result.push({ avatar: c.avatar, author: c.author })
    42→      }
    43→    }
    44→    return result.slice(0, 3)
    45→  }, [comments])
    46→
    47→  return (
    48→    <div className="flex items-center -space-x-1.5">
    49→      {uniqueAvatars.map((u) => (
    50→        <Avatar
    51→          className="rounded-full ring-2 ring-neutral-1"
    52→          imageUrl={u.avatar}
    53→          key={u.avatar || u.author}
    54→          radius="full"
    55→          shadow={false}
    56→          size={size}
    57→          text={u.author}
    58→        />
    59→      ))}
    60→    </div>
    61→  )
    62→}
    63→
    64→function DesktopGutterTrigger({
    65→  blockComments,
    66→  top,
    67→  isHovered,
    68→  isActive,
    69→  onClick,
    70→}: {
    71→  blockComments: CommentWithAnchor[]
    72→  top: number
    73→  isHovered: boolean
    74→  isActive: boolean
    75→  onClick: () => void
    76→}) {
    77→  const hasComments = blockComments.length > 0
    78→
    79→  return (
    80→    <div
    81→      className="absolute left-0 flex items-start"
    82→      style={{ top: `${top}px` }}
    83→    >
    84→      {hasComments ? (
    85→        <button
    86→          className="flex cursor-pointer items-center gap-1 rounded-full py-0.5 pl-0.5 pr-1.5 transition-colors hover:bg-neutral-2"
    87→          type="button"
    88→          onClick={onClick}
    89→        >
    90→          <AvatarStack comments={blockComments} />
    91→          <span className="ml-0.5 text-[11px] font-medium text-muted-foreground">
    92→            {blockComments.length}
    93→          </span>
    94→        </button>
    95→      ) : (
    96→        <button
    97→          type="button"
    98→          className={`flex size-7 cursor-pointer items-center justify-center rounded-md text-muted-foreground transition-all hover:bg-neutral-2 hover:text-foreground ${
    99→            isHovered || isActive ? 'opacity-100' : 'opacity-0'
   100→          }`}
   101→          onClick={onClick}
   102→        >
   103→          <i className="i-mingcute-comment-line text-[15px]" />
   104→        </button>
   105→      )}
   106→    </div>
   107→  )
   108→}
   109→
   110→function MobileGutterItem({
   111→  blockIndex,
   112→  blockComments,
   113→  blockInfos,
   114→  refId,
   115→  top,
   116→  lang,
   117→  onOpen,
   118→  onClose,
   119→}: {
   120→  blockIndex: number
   121→  blockComments: CommentWithAnchor[]
   122→  blockInfos: BlockInfo[]
   123→  refId: string
   124→  top: number
   125→  lang?: string | null
   126→  onOpen: () => void
   127→  onClose: () => void
   128→}) {
   129→  const anchor = buildBlockAnchorFromIndex(blockInfos, blockIndex, lang)
   130→
   131→  if (!anchor) return null
   132→
   133→  return (
   134→    <div
   135→      className="absolute -right-1 flex items-start"
   136→      style={{ top: `${top}px` }}
   137→    >
   138→      <PresentSheet
   139→        triggerAsChild
   140→        title="评论"
   141→        content={
   142→          <CommentBlockThread
   143→            anchor={anchor!}
   144→            comments={blockComments}
   145→            refId={refId}
   146→          />
   147→        }
   148→        onOpenChange={(open) => {
   149→          if (open) onOpen()
   150→          else onClose()
   151→        }}
   152→      >
   153→        <button
   154→          className="flex cursor-pointer items-center gap-0.5 rounded-full border border-neutral-3/80 bg-neutral-1/90 py-0.5 pl-0.5 pr-1.5 shadow-sm backdrop-blur-sm"
   155→          type="button"
   156→        >
   157→          <AvatarStack comments={blockComments} size={20} />
   158→          <span className="text-[10px] font-medium text-muted-foreground">
   159→            {blockComments.length}
   160→          </span>
   161→        </button>
   162→      </PresentSheet>
   163→    </div>
   164→  )
   165→}
   166→
   167→interface ActivePanel {
   168→  blockId: string
   169→  blockIndex: number
   170→}
   171→
   172→export function CommentBlockGutter({
   173→  containerRef,
   174→  blockInfos,
   175→  comments,
   176→  refId,
   177→  currentLang,
   178→}: CommentBlockGutterProps) {
   179→  const isMobile = useIsMobile()
   180→  const contentEl = useRichContentElement()
   181→
   182→  const commentsByBlock = useMemo(() => {
   183→    const map = new Map<string, CommentWithAnchor[]>()
   184→    for (const c of comments) {
   185→      const { anchor } = c
   186→      if (!anchor?.blockId) continue
   187→      const anchorLang = (anchor as CommentAnchor).lang ?? null
   188→      const isBlock = anchor.mode === 'block'
   189→      const langMatch = anchorLang === currentLang
   190→      if (isBlock || !langMatch) {
   191→        const arr = map.get(anchor.blockId) || []
   192→        arr.push(c)
   193→        map.set(anchor.blockId, arr)
   194→      } else if (anchor.mode === 'range') {
   195→        // Range anchor with matching lang — check if it falls back to block level
   196→        const resolved = resolveRangeAnchor(anchor, blockInfos)
   197→        if (
   198→          resolved.status === 'block-fallback' &&
   199→          resolved.blockIndex !== -1
   200→        ) {
   201→          const blockId = blockInfos[resolved.blockIndex]?.blockId
   202→          if (blockId) {
   203→            const arr = map.get(blockId) || []
   204→            arr.push(c)
   205→            map.set(blockId, arr)
   206→          }
   207→        }
   208→      }
   209→    }
   210→    return map
   211→  }, [comments, currentLang, blockInfos])
   212→
   213→  const [blockPositions, setBlockPositions] = useState<Map<number, number>>(
   214→    () => new Map(),
   215→  )
   216→
   217→  useEffect(() => {
   218→    const container = containerRef.current
   219→    if (!container || !contentEl) return
   220→
   221→    const updatePositions = () => {
   222→      const containerRect = container.getBoundingClientRect()
   223→      const positions = new Map<number, number>()
   224→      for (let i = 0; i < contentEl.children.length; i++) {
   225→        const child = contentEl.children[i] as HTMLElement
   226→        const rect = child.getBoundingClientRect()
   227→        positions.set(i, rect.top - containerRect.top)
   228→      }
   229→      setBlockPositions(new Map(positions))
   230→    }
   231→
   232→    updatePositions()
   233→    const observer = new ResizeObserver(updatePositions)
   234→    observer.observe(contentEl)
   235→
   236→    return () => observer.disconnect()
   237→  }, [containerRef, contentEl, blockInfos])
   238→
   239→  const [hoverIndex, setHoverIndex] = useState(-1)
   240→
   241→  const handleMouseMove = useCallback(
   242→    (e: MouseEvent) => {
   243→      if (!contentEl) return
   244→
   245→      for (let i = 0; i < contentEl.children.length; i++) {
   246→        const child = contentEl.children[i] as HTMLElement
   247→        const rect = child.getBoundingClientRect()
   248→        if (e.clientY >= rect.top && e.clientY < rect.bottom) {
   249→          setHoverIndex(i)
   250→          return
   251→        }
   252→      }
   253→      setHoverIndex(-1)
   254→    },
   255→    [contentEl],
   256→  )
   257→
   258→  const handleMouseLeave = useCallback(() => {
   259→    setHoverIndex(-1)
   260→  }, [])
   261→
   262→  useEffect(() => {
   263→    if (isMobile) return
   264→
   265→    const container = containerRef.current
   266→    if (!container) return
   267→
   268→    container.addEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove)
   269→    container.addEventListener('mouseleave', handleMouseLeave)
   270→    return () => {
   271→      container.removeEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove)
   272→      container.removeEventListener('mouseleave', handleMouseLeave)
   273→    }
   274→  }, [containerRef, handleMouseMove, handleMouseLeave, isMobile])
   275→
   276→  // Panel state
   277→  const [activePanel, setActivePanel] = useState<ActivePanel | null>(null)
   278→  const prevActiveRef = useRef<string | null>(null)
   279→  const panelRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
   280→  const gutterRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
   281→
   282→  const activeBlockId = activePanel?.blockId ?? null
   283→
   284→  const resolveBlockIndex = useCallback(
   285→    (id: string | null): number => {
   286→      if (!id) return -1
   287→      const idx = blockInfos.findIndex((b) => b.blockId === id)
   288→      if (idx !== -1) return idx
   289→      if (id.startsWith('__idx_')) {
   290→        return Number.parseInt(id.slice(6), 10)
   291→      }
   292→      return -1
   293→    },
   294→    [blockInfos],
   295→  )
   296→
   297→  // Block highlight
   298→  useEffect(() => {
   299→    if (!contentEl) return
   300→
   301→    const prevIdx = resolveBlockIndex(prevActiveRef.current)
   302→    if (prevIdx !== -1) {
   303→      contentEl.children[prevIdx]?.classList.remove('comment-block-active')
   304→    }
   305→
   306→    const idx = resolveBlockIndex(activeBlockId)
   307→    if (idx !== -1) {
   308→      contentEl.children[idx]?.classList.add('comment-block-active')
   309→    }
   310→
   311→    prevActiveRef.current = activeBlockId
   312→  }, [activeBlockId, contentEl, resolveBlockIndex])
   313→
   314→  useEffect(() => {
   315→    return () => {
   316→      if (!contentEl) return
   317→      for (const child of contentEl.children) {
   318→        child.classList.remove('comment-block-active')
   319→      }
   320→    }
   321→  }, [contentEl])
   322→
   323→  // Click outside panel to close
   324→  useEffect(() => {
   325→    if (!activePanel) return
   326→    const handler = (e: MouseEvent) => {
   327→      const target = e.target as Node
   328→      if (panelRef.current?.contains(target)) return
   329→      if (gutterRef.current?.contains(target)) return
   330→      setActivePanel(null)
   331→    }
   332→    const rafId = requestAnimationFrame(() => {
   333→      document.addEventListener('mousedown', handler)
   334→    })
   335→    return () => {
   336→      cancelAnimationFrame(rafId)
   337→      document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handler)
   338→    }
   339→  }, [activePanel])
   340→
   341→  // Escape to close
   342→  useEffect(() => {
   343→    if (!activePanel) return
   344→    const handler = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
   345→      if (e.key === 'Escape') setActivePanel(null)
   346→    }
   347→    document.addEventListener('keydown', handler)
   348→    return () => document.removeEventListener('keydown', handler)
   349→  }, [activePanel])
   350→
   351→  const handleGutterClick = useCallback(
   352→    (blockIndex: number, blockId: string) => {
   353→      const anchor = buildBlockAnchorFromIndex(
   354→        blockInfos,
   355→        blockIndex,
   356→        currentLang,
   357→      )
   358→      if (!anchor) return
   359→      setActivePanel((prev) =>
   360→        prev?.blockId === blockId ? null : { blockIndex, blockId },
   361→      )
   362→    },
   363→    [blockInfos, currentLang],
   364→  )
   365→
   366→  const gutterItems = useMemo(() => {
   367→    const items: {
   368→      blockIndex: number
   369→      blockId: string
   370→      comments: CommentWithAnchor[]
   371→      isGhost: boolean
   372→    }[] = []
   373→
   374→    for (const [blockId, blockComments] of commentsByBlock) {
   375→      const blockIdx = blockInfos.findIndex((b) => b.blockId === blockId)
   376→      if (blockIdx !== -1) {
   377→        items.push({
   378→          blockIndex: blockIdx,
   379→          blockId,
   380→          comments: blockComments,
   381→          isGhost: false,
   382→        })
   383→      }
   384→    }
   385→
   386→    if (!isMobile && hoverIndex !== -1) {
   387→      const info = blockInfos[hoverIndex]
   388→      if (info && !commentsByBlock.has(info.blockId || `__idx_${hoverIndex}`)) {
   389→        items.push({
   390→          blockIndex: hoverIndex,
   391→          blockId: info.blockId || `__idx_${hoverIndex}`,
   392→          comments: [],
   393→          isGhost: true,
   394→        })
   395→      }
   396→    }
   397→
   398→    return items
   399→  }, [commentsByBlock, blockInfos, hoverIndex, isMobile])
   400→
   401→  // Mobile: only show blocks with comments
   402→  if (isMobile) {
   403→    const commentItems = gutterItems.filter((item) => !item.isGhost)
   404→    if (commentItems.length === 0) return null
   405→
   406→    return (
   407→      <div className="absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none">
   408→        {commentItems.map((item) => {
   409→          const top = blockPositions.get(item.blockIndex)
   410→          if (top === undefined) return null
   411→
   412→          return (
   413→            <div className="pointer-events-auto" key={item.blockId}>
   414→              <MobileGutterItem
   415→                blockComments={item.comments}
   416→                blockIndex={item.blockIndex}
   417→                blockInfos={blockInfos}
   418→                lang={currentLang}
   419→                refId={refId}
   420→                top={top}
   421→                onClose={() => setActivePanel(null)}
   422→                onOpen={() =>
   423→                  setActivePanel({
   424→                    blockIndex: item.blockIndex,
   425→                    blockId: item.blockId,
   426→                  })
   427→                }
   428→              />
   429→            </div>
   430→          )
   431→        })}
   432→      </div>
   433→    )
   434→  }
   435→
   436→  const panelTop = activePanel
   437→    ? blockPositions.get(activePanel.blockIndex)
   438→    : undefined
   439→  const panelAnchor = activePanel
   440→    ? buildBlockAnchorFromIndex(blockInfos, activePanel.blockIndex, currentLang)
   441→    : null
   442→  const panelComments = activePanel
   443→    ? commentsByBlock.get(activePanel.blockId) || []
   444→    : []
   445→
   446→  return (
   447→    <div
   448→      className="absolute top-0 bottom-0 right-0 hidden w-8 lg:block z-10"
   449→      ref={gutterRef}
   450→    >
   451→      {gutterItems.map((item) => {
   452→        const top = blockPositions.get(item.blockIndex)
   453→        if (top === undefined) return null
   454→
   455→        return (
   456→          <DesktopGutterTrigger
   457→            blockComments={item.comments}
   458→            isActive={activeBlockId === item.blockId}
   459→            isHovered={hoverIndex === item.blockIndex}
   460→            key={item.blockId}
   461→            top={top}
   462→            onClick={() => handleGutterClick(item.blockIndex, item.blockId)}
   463→          />
   464→        )
   465→      })}
   466→
   467→      {activePanel && panelAnchor && panelTop !== undefined && (
   468→        <div
   469→          className="absolute -left-2 ml-2 z-20 rounded-xl border border-neutral-3/80 bg-neutral-1 shadow-lg overflow-hidden"
   470→          ref={panelRef}
   471→          style={{ top: `${panelTop}px` }}
   472→        >
   473→          <CommentBlockThread
   474→            anchor={panelAnchor}
   475→            comments={panelComments}
   476→            refId={refId}
   477→            onClose={() => setActivePanel(null)}
   478→          />
   479→        </div>
   480→      )}
   481→    </div>
   482→  )
   483→}
   484→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>

 `./apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentActionButtonGroup.tsx`

```text
     1→import { useMutation } from '@tanstack/react-query'
     2→import clsx from 'clsx'
     3→import { m } from 'motion/react'
     4→import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
     5→import type { FC } from 'react'
     6→import { useCallback, useMemo, useRef, useState } from 'react'
     7→
     8→import { useIsOwnerLogged } from '~/atoms/hooks/owner'
     9→import { useSessionReader } from '~/atoms/hooks/reader'
    10→import { TiltedSendIcon } from '~/components/icons/TiltedSendIcon'
    11→import { AutoResizeHeight } from '~/components/modules/shared/AutoResizeHeight'
    12→import { TextArea } from '~/components/ui/input'
    13→import { apiClient } from '~/lib/request'
    14→
    15→import { CommentBoxRootLazy } from '.'
    16→import { CommentBoxHolderPortal } from './Comment'
    17→import { useCommentBoxRefIdValue } from './CommentBox/hooks'
    18→import { CommentIsReplyProvider } from './CommentBox/providers'
    19→import { useCommentByIdSelector, useUpdateComment } from './CommentProvider'
    20→
    21→const READER_EDIT_WINDOW_MS = 10 * 60 * 1000
    22→
    23→export const CommentActionButtonGroup: FC<{
    24→  commentId: string
    25→  className?: string
    26→}> = ({ commentId, className }) => {
    27→  const tCommon = useTranslations('common')
    28→  const [replyFormOpen, setReplyFormOpen] = useState(false)
    29→  const [editFormOpen, setEditFormOpen] = useState(false)
    30→  const originalRefId = useCommentBoxRefIdValue()
    31→  const onReplyCompleted = useCallback(() => {
    32→    setReplyFormOpen(false)
    33→  }, [])
    34→
    35→  const isOwner = useIsOwnerLogged()
    36→  const readerSession = useSessionReader()
    37→  const readerId = useCommentByIdSelector(
    38→    commentId,
    39→    useCallback((comment) => comment?.readerId, []),
    40→  )
    41→  const createdAt = useCommentByIdSelector(
    42→    commentId,
    43→    useCallback((comment) => comment?.created, []),
    44→  )
    45→  const isDeleted = useCommentByIdSelector(
    46→    commentId,
    47→    useCallback((comment) => comment?.isDeleted, []),
    48→  )
    49→  const canReaderEdit = useMemo(() => {
    50→    if (!readerId || readerId !== readerSession?.id) return false
    51→    if (!createdAt) return false
    52→
    53→    const createdAtMs = new Date(createdAt).getTime()
    54→    if (Number.isNaN(createdAtMs)) return false
    55→
    56→    return Date.now() - createdAtMs <= READER_EDIT_WINDOW_MS
    57→  }, [createdAt, readerId, readerSession?.id])
    58→
    59→  const canEdit = !isDeleted && (isOwner || canReaderEdit)
    60→  const isButtonGroup = canEdit
    61→  return (
    62→    <div className="absolute bottom-0 right-0 flex min-h-0 translate-x-2/3 translate-y-1/4 items-center">
    63→      {canEdit && (
    64→        <button
    65→          aria-label={tCommon('actions_edit')}
    66→          className={clsx(
    67→            'text-xs',
    68→            'aspect-square',
    69→            !isButtonGroup ? 'rounded-full' : 'rounded-l-full border-r-0',
    70→            'center box-content flex size-6 p-[2px]',
    71→            'border border-neutral-3 bg-neutral-2',
    72→            'invisible cursor-pointer opacity-0',
    73→            'group-[:hover]:visible group-[:hover]:opacity-70',
    74→            className,
    75→          )}
    76→          onClick={() => {
    77→            setReplyFormOpen(false)
    78→            setEditFormOpen((s) => !s)
    79→          }}
    80→        >
    81→          <i className="i-mingcute-edit-2-line" />
    82→        </button>
    83→      )}
    84→      {isButtonGroup && (
    85→        <div className="pointer-events-none hidden h-full w-px shrink-0 select-none border-l border-neutral-4/50 text-transparent group-hover:inline-block">
    86→          {'1'}
    87→        </div>
    88→      )}
    89→      <button
    90→        aria-label={tCommon('actions_reply')}
    91→        className={clsx(
    92→          'text-xs',
    93→          'aspect-square',
    94→          !isButtonGroup ? 'rounded-full' : 'rounded-r-full border-l-0',
    95→          'center box-content flex size-6 p-[2px]',
    96→          'border border-neutral-3 bg-neutral-2',
    97→          'invisible cursor-pointer opacity-0',
    98→          'group-[:hover]:visible group-[:hover]:opacity-70',
    99→          className,
   100→        )}
   101→        onClick={() => {
   102→          setEditFormOpen(false)
   103→          setReplyFormOpen((o) => !o)
   104→        }}
   105→      >
   106→        <i className="i-mingcute-comment-line" />
   107→      </button>
   108→      <CommentBoxHolderPortal>
   109→        <CommentIsReplyProvider
   110→          isReply
   111→          originalRefId={originalRefId}
   112→          onCompleted={onReplyCompleted}
   113→        >
   114→          <AutoResizeHeight duration={0.2}>
   115→            {replyFormOpen && (
   116→              <div className="py-6">
   117→                <CommentBoxRootLazy refId={commentId} />
   118→              </div>
   119→            )}
   120→          </AutoResizeHeight>
   121→        </CommentIsReplyProvider>
   122→      </CommentBoxHolderPortal>
   123→
   124→      <CommentBoxHolderPortal>
   125→        <AutoResizeHeight duration={0.2}>
   126→          {editFormOpen && (
   127→            <EditCommentForm
   128→              commentId={commentId}
   129→              onCompleted={() => {
   130→                setEditFormOpen(false)
   131→              }}
   132→            />
   133→          )}
   134→        </AutoResizeHeight>
   135→      </CommentBoxHolderPortal>
   136→    </div>
   137→  )
   138→}
   139→
   140→const EditCommentForm: FC<{
   141→  commentId: string
   142→  onCompleted: () => void
   143→}> = ({ commentId, onCompleted }) => {
   144→  const tCommon = useTranslations('common')
   145→  const tComment = useTranslations('comment')
   146→  const commentText = useCommentByIdSelector(
   147→    commentId,
   148→    useCallback((comment) => comment?.text, []),
   149→  )
   150→  const { mutateAsync: updateComment, isPending } = useMutation({
   151→    mutationFn: (text: string) => {
   152→      return apiClient.comment.proxy.edit(commentId).patch({
   153→        data: {
   154→          text,
   155→        },
   156→      })
   157→    },
   158→  })
   159→  const textAreaRef = useRef<HTMLTextAreaElement>(null)
   160→  const updateCommentUI = useUpdateComment()
   161→  return (
   162→    <div className="px-2 py-6">
   163→      <div className="mb-2 pl-2 text-sm">{tComment('editing_comment')}</div>
   164→      <div className="relative">
   165→        <TextArea
   166→          defaultValue={commentText}
   167→          ref={textAreaRef}
   168→          wrapperClassName="bg-neutral-3/50 rounded-xl h-[150px]"
   169→        />
   170→        <div className="absolute bottom-2 right-4 flex items-center gap-2">
   171→          <m.button
   172→            className="flex items-center gap-1"
   173→            type="button"
   174→            whileHover={{ scale: 1.05 }}
   175→            whileTap={{ scale: 0.95 }}
   176→            onClick={() => {
   177→              onCompleted()
   178→            }}
   179→          >
   180→            <i className="i-mingcute-close-line" />
   181→            <span className="text-sm">{tCommon('actions_cancel')}</span>
   182→          </m.button>
   183→          <SaveButton
   184→            isPending={isPending}
   185→            onClickSave={() => {
   186→              const text = textAreaRef.current?.value
   187→              if (!text) {
   188→                return
   189→              }
   190→              updateComment(text).then(() => {
   191→                onCompleted()
   192→                updateCommentUI({
   193→                  id: commentId,
   194→                  text,
   195→                })
   196→              })
   197→            }}
   198→          />
   199→        </div>
   200→      </div>
   201→    </div>
   202→  )
   203→}
   204→
   205→const SaveButton: FC<{
   206→  isPending: boolean
   207→  onClickSave: () => void
   208→}> = ({ isPending, onClickSave }) => {
   209→  const tCommon = useTranslations('common')
   210→  return (
   211→    <m.button
   212→      className="flex appearance-none items-center space-x-1 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50"
   213→      disabled={isPending}
   214→      type="button"
   215→      whileHover={{ scale: 1.05 }}
   216→      whileTap={{ scale: 0.95 }}
   217→      onClick={onClickSave}
   218→    >
   219→      {isPending ? (
   220→        <i className="loading loading-spinner loading-sm size-4" />
   221→      ) : (
   222→        <TiltedSendIcon />
   223→      )}
   224→      <m.span className="text-sm" layout="size">
   225→        {isPending ? '' : tCommon('actions_save')}
   226→      </m.span>
   227→    </m.button>
   228→  )
   229→}
   230→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentBlockButton.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
     4→import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react'
     5→
     6→import { useModalStack } from '~/components/ui/modal'
     7→
     8→import { CommentModal } from '../shared/CommentModal'
     9→import type { BlockInfo } from './anchor-utils'
    10→import { buildBlockAnchorFromIndex } from './anchor-utils'
    11→import { useRichContentElement } from './RichContentElementContext'
    12→
    13→export function CommentBlockButton({
    14→  containerRef,
    15→  blockInfos,
    16→  refId,
    17→  title,
    18→}: {
    19→  containerRef: React.RefObject<HTMLElement | null>
    20→  blockInfos: BlockInfo[]
    21→  refId: string
    22→  title: string
    23→}) {
    24→  const contentEl = useRichContentElement()
    25→  const [hoverIndex, setHoverIndex] = useState(-1)
    26→  const [btnPos, setBtnPos] = useState({ top: 0, right: 0 })
    27→  const btnRef = useRef<HTMLButtonElement>(null)
    28→  const { present } = useModalStack()
    29→  const t = useTranslations('common')
    30→
    31→  const handleMouseMove = useCallback(
    32→    (e: MouseEvent) => {
    33→      const container = containerRef.current
    34→      if (!container || !contentEl) return
    35→
    36→      const { children } = contentEl
    37→      const containerRect = container.getBoundingClientRect()
    38→
    39→      for (let i = 0; i < children.length; i++) {
    40→        const child = children[i] as HTMLElement
    41→        const rect = child.getBoundingClientRect()
    42→        if (e.clientY >= rect.top && e.clientY <= rect.bottom) {
    43→          setHoverIndex(i)
    44→          setBtnPos({
    45→            top: rect.top - containerRect.top + 4,
    46→            right: 0,
    47→          })
    48→          return
    49→        }
    50→      }
    51→      setHoverIndex(-1)
    52→    },
    53→    [containerRef],
    54→  )
    55→
    56→  const handleMouseLeave = useCallback(() => {
    57→    setHoverIndex(-1)
    58→  }, [])
    59→
    60→  useEffect(() => {
    61→    const container = containerRef.current
    62→    if (!container) return
    63→
    64→    container.addEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove)
    65→    container.addEventListener('mouseleave', handleMouseLeave)
    66→    return () => {
    67→      container.removeEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove)
    68→      container.removeEventListener('mouseleave', handleMouseLeave)
    69→    }
    70→  }, [containerRef, handleMouseMove, handleMouseLeave])
    71→
    72→  if (hoverIndex < 0) return null
    73→
    74→  return (
    75→    <button
    76→      className="absolute z-10 flex size-6 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-neutral-3/80 text-neutral-7 opacity-0 transition-opacity hover:bg-accent/20 hover:text-accent group-hover/comment-block:opacity-100"
    77→      ref={btnRef}
    78→      type="button"
    79→      style={{
    80→        top: btnPos.top,
    81→        right: btnPos.right,
    82→      }}
    83→      onClick={() => {
    84→        const anchor = buildBlockAnchorFromIndex(blockInfos, hoverIndex)
    85→        present({
    86→          title: t('selection_comment'),
    87→          content: (rest) => (
    88→            <CommentModal
    89→              anchor={anchor}
    90→              refId={refId}
    91→              title={title}
    92→              {...rest}
    93→            />
    94→          ),
    95→        })
    96→      }}
    97→    >
    98→      <i className="icon-[mingcute--comment-line] text-sm" />
    99→    </button>
   100→  )
   101→}
   102→
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./apps/web/src/components/ui/transition/IconScaleTransnsition.tsx`

```text
     1→import type { TargetAndTransition } from 'motion/react'
     2→import { AnimatePresence, m } from 'motion/react'
     3→import * as React from 'react'
     4→import { cloneElement, useEffect, useState } from 'react'
     5→
     6→import { clsxm } from '~/lib/helper'
     7→
     8→type TransitionType = {
     9→  initial: TargetAndTransition | boolean
    10→  animate: TargetAndTransition
    11→  exit: TargetAndTransition
    12→}
    13→
    14→type IconTransitionProps = {
    15→  icon1: string | React.JSX.Element
    16→  icon2: string | React.JSX.Element
    17→  status: 'init' | 'done'
    18→  className?: string
    19→  icon1ClassName?: string
    20→  icon2ClassName?: string
    21→}
    22→
    23→const createIconTransition =
    24→  (transitionType: TransitionType) =>
    25→  ({
    26→    icon1,
    27→    icon2,
    28→    status,
    29→    className,
    30→    icon1ClassName,
    31→    icon2ClassName,
    32→  }: IconTransitionProps) => {
    33→    const [isMount, setIsMounted] = useState(false)
    34→    useEffect(() => {
    35→      setIsMounted(true)
    36→      return () => setIsMounted(false)
    37→    }, [])
    38→
    39→    const initial = isMount ? transitionType.initial : true
    40→    const { animate } = transitionType
    41→    const { exit } = transitionType
    42→
    43→    return (
    44→      <AnimatePresence mode="popLayout">
    45→        {status === 'init' ? (
    46→          typeof icon1 === 'string' ? (
    47→            <m.i
    48→              animate={animate}
    49→              className={clsxm(icon1ClassName, className, icon1)}
    50→              exit={exit}
    51→              initial={initial}
    52→              key="1"
    53→            />
    54→          ) : (
    55→            <m.span animate={animate} exit={exit} initial={initial} key="1">
    56→              {cloneElement(icon1, {
    57→                className: clsxm(icon1ClassName, className),
    58→              })}
    59→            </m.span>
    60→          )
    61→        ) : typeof icon2 === 'string' ? (
    62→          <m.i
    63→            animate={animate}
    64→            className={clsxm(icon2ClassName, className, icon2)}
    65→            exit={exit}
    66→            initial={initial}
    67→            key="2"
    68→          />
    69→        ) : (
    70→          <m.span animate={animate} exit={exit} initial={initial} key="2">
    71→            {cloneElement(icon2, {
    72→              className: clsxm(icon2ClassName, className),
    73→            })}
    74→          </m.span>
    75→        )}
    76→      </AnimatePresence>
    77→    )
    78→  }
    79→
    80→export const IconScaleTransition = createIconTransition({
    81→  initial: { scale: 0.97, filter: 'blur(2px)', opacity: 0 },
    82→  animate: { scale: 1, filter: 'blur(0px)', opacity: 1 },
    83→  exit: { scale: 0.97, filter: 'blur(2px)', opacity: 0 },
    84→})
    85→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./apps/web/src/components/modules/shared/ActionAsideContainer.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import clsx from 'clsx'
     4→import { cloneElement, isValidElement } from 'react'
     5→
     6→import { usePageScrollElement, useViewport } from '~/atoms/hooks/viewport'
     7→import { clsxm } from '~/lib/helper'
     8→import { usePageScrollLocationSelector } from '~/providers/root/page-scroll-info-provider'
     9→import { useIsEoFWrappedElement } from '~/providers/shared/WrappedElementProvider'
    10→
    11→// import { asideButtonStyles } from './styles'
    12→const asideButtonStyles = {
    13→  base: 'text-[24px] opacity-80 duration-200 hover:opacity-100 relative',
    14→}
    15→
    16→export const ActionAsideIcon: Component = (props) => {
    17→  if (props.children && isValidElement(props.children))
    18→    return cloneElement(props.children, {
    19→      // @ts-ignore
    20→      className: clsxm(asideButtonStyles.base, props.className),
    21→    })
    22→  return <i className={clsxm(asideButtonStyles.base, props.className)} />
    23→}
    24→export const ActionAsideContainer: Component = ({ className, children }) => {
    25→  const isEOA = useIsEoFWrappedElement()
    26→  const h = useViewport((v) => v.h)
    27→
    28→  const scrollElement = usePageScrollElement()
    29→  const isEndOfPage = usePageScrollLocationSelector(
    30→    (y) => {
    31→      const threshold = 100
    32→
    33→      return y + h >= scrollElement.scrollHeight - threshold
    34→    },
    35→    [h, scrollElement],
    36→  )
    37→
    38→  return (
    39→    <div
    40→      className={clsxm(
    41→        'absolute bottom-0 left-0 -mb-4 flex max-h-[300px] p-4 transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out',
    42→        !isEOA ? 'opacity-20 hover:opacity-100' : '',
    43→        className,
    44→      )}
    45→    >
    46→      <div
    47→        className={clsx(
    48→          isEndOfPage && '-rotate-90 [&>button]:!rotate-90',
    49→          'flex origin-top-left flex-col gap-6 duration-200 ease-in-out [&>button]:duration-200',
    50→        )}
    51→      >
    52→        {children}
    53→      </div>
    54→    </div>
    55→  )
    56→}
    57→
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent - sidechain (2026-03-15 11:56:17Z)**_

You are migrating icons in the Shiroi project from mingcute/material-symbols CSS classes to lucide-react + lucide-animated components.

## MIGRATION RULES

### Pattern 1: Static icon
```tsx
// BEFORE
<i className="i-mingcute-rss-line size-4" />
// AFTER
import { Rss } from 'lucide-react'
<Rss className="size-4" />
```

### Pattern 2: Animated icon (interactive context)
```tsx
// BEFORE  
<i className="i-mingcute-search-line" />
// AFTER
import { SearchIcon } from '@/components/icons/animated/search'
<SearchIcon className="size-4" size={16} />
```

### Pattern 3: Loading spinner
```tsx
import { Loader2 } from 'lucide-react'
<Loader2 className="animate-spin size-4" />
```

### Icon mapping (mingcute → lucide-react):
- add-circle-line → CirclePlus
- add-line → Plus
- ai-fill → Sparkles
- alert-fill/line → TriangleAlert
- arrow-left-line → ArrowLeft
- arrow-right-line → ArrowRight
- arrow-right-up-line → ArrowUpRight
- check-circle-line → CircleCheck
- check-fill/line → Check
- close-fill/line → X
- code-line → Code
- comment-line → MessageCircle
- comment-2-line → MessageSquare
- computer-line → Monitor
- copy-line/fill → Copy
- dashboard-*-line → LayoutDashboard
- delete-line → Trash
- document-line → FileText
- down-line → ChevronDown
- download-2-line/fill → Download
- edit-line → SquarePen
- emoji-line → Smile
- exit-line → LogOut
- external-link-line → ExternalLink
- eye-line → Eye
- eye-close-line → EyeOff
- fullscreen-2-line/fill → Maximize
- fullscreen-exit-fill → Minimize
- github-line → Github
- hashtag-line → Hash
- heart-fill/line → Heart
- heart-crack-line → HeartCrack
- information-fill/line → Info
- key-1-line → Key
- left-fill → ChevronLeft
- link-3-line → Link
- loading-* → Loader2
- mail-line → Mail
- menu-line → Menu
- moon-line → Moon
- pause-fill → Pause
- pen-line → Pen
- pin-line → Pin
- play-fill → Play
- question-line → CircleHelp
- quill-pen-line → Feather
- refresh-2-line → RefreshCw
- right-fill → ChevronRight
- rss-line/fill → Rss
- search-line → Search
- send-plane-line → Send
- settings-5/6-line → Settings
- share-forward-line → Share
- sparkles-line → Sparkles
- star-line → Star
- sun-line → Sun
- thumb-up-line → ThumbsUp
- time-line → Clock
- translate-2-line → Languages
- up-line → ChevronUp
- user-4-line → User
- volume-fill → Volume2
- volume-mute-fill → VolumeX
- warning-line → TriangleAlert

Material Symbols:
- notifications-active-outline → Bell
- dynamic-form-outline → SquarePen
- arrow-circle-right-outline-rounded → CircleArrowRight

### Animated icons available at `@/components/icons/animated/{name}`:
Export: `{PascalName}Icon`. Examples: SearchIcon, HeartIcon, CopyIcon, SettingsIcon, MenuIcon, etc.

### Brand icons:
```tsx
import { SimpleIcon } from '@/components/icons/SimpleIcon'
import { siGithub } from 'simple-icons'
<SimpleIcon icon={siGithub} className="size-4" />
```

### When to use animated vs static:
- Animated: Buttons, toggles, FABs, interactive actions
- Static: Metadata display, list items, status indicators

```text
    10→
    11→import type { AiSummaryProps } from '../ai/Summary'

    13→
    14→export const SummarySwitcher: FC<
    15→  AiSummaryProps & {
    16→    summary?: string
    17→  }
    18→> = memo((props) => {
    19→  const enableSummary = useAggregationSelector((data) => data.ai?.enableSummary)
    20→  const { summary, articleId } = props
    21→
    22→  if (summary && summary.trim().length > 0)

    24→
    25→  if (!enableSummary) return null
    26→
    27→  return (
    28→    <ErrorBoundary variant="inline">
    29→      <div className="my-4">
    30→        <AISummary articleId={articleId} />
    31→      </div>
    32→    </ErrorBoundary>
    33→  )
    34→})
    35→
    36→SummarySwitcher.displayName = 'SummarySwitcher'
    37→
    38→const ManualSummary: Component<{
    39→  summary: string
    40→}> = ({ className, summary }) => {
    41→  const t = useTranslations('common')
    42→
    43→  return (
    44→    <div
    45→      className={clsxm(
    46→        `space-y-2 rounded-xl border border-neutral-3 p-4`,
    47→        className,
    48→      )}
    49→    >
    50→      <div className="flex items-center">
    51→        <i className="i-mingcute-sparkles-line mr-2 text-lg" />
    52→        {t('summary_label')}
    53→      </div>
    54→      <div className="m-0! text-sm leading-loose text-neutral-9/85">
    55→        {summary}
    56→      </div>
    57→    </div>
    58→  )
    59→}
    60→
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>

 `./apps/web/src/components/modules/shared/KaomojiPanel.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import type { Placement } from '@floating-ui/react-dom'
     4→import markdownEscape from 'markdown-escape'
     5→import type { FC, PropsWithChildren } from 'react'
     6→import { useEffect, useState } from 'react'
     7→
     8→import { useIsMobile } from '~/atoms/hooks/viewport'
     9→import { MotionButtonBase } from '~/components/ui/button'
    10→import { FloatPopover } from '~/components/ui/float-popover'
    11→import { ScrollArea } from '~/components/ui/scroll-area'
    12→import { PresentSheet } from '~/components/ui/sheet'
    13→
    14→import { KAOMOJI_LIST } from '../dashboard/comments/kaomoji'
    15→
    16→export const KaomojiPanel: FC<
    17→  {
    18→    to?: HTMLElement | null
    19→    inputRef?:
    20→      | React.RefObject<HTMLTextAreaElement | null>
    21→      | React.RefObject<HTMLInputElement | null>
    22→    onInsert?: (value: string) => void
    23→
    24→    open?: boolean
    25→    onOpenChange?: (open: boolean) => void
    26→    placement?: Placement
    27→    onValueChange?: (value: string) => void
    28→  } & PropsWithChildren
    29→> = ({
    30→  to,
    31→  inputRef,
    32→  placement,
    33→  onOpenChange,
    34→  open,
    35→  children,
    36→  onValueChange,
    37→  onInsert,
    38→}) => {
    39→  const KaomojiContentEl = (
    40→    <ScrollArea.ScrollArea
    41→      mask
    42→      rootClassName="pointer-events-auto h-[250px] w-auto lg:h-[200px] lg:w-[400px]"
    43→    >
    44→      <div className="grid grid-cols-4 gap-4">
    45→        {KAOMOJI_LIST.map((kamoji) => (
    46→          <MotionButtonBase
    47→            key={kamoji}
    48→            onClick={() => {
    49→              const escapeKaomoji = markdownEscape(kamoji)
    50→              if (onInsert) {
    51→                onInsert(escapeKaomoji)
    52→                return
    53→              }
    54→
    55→              const $ta = inputRef?.current
    56→              if (!$ta) return
    57→              $ta.focus()
    58→
    59→              requestAnimationFrame(() => {
    60→                const start = $ta.selectionStart as number
    61→                const end = $ta.selectionEnd as number
    62→                $ta.value = `${$ta.value.slice(
    63→                  0,
    64→                  Math.max(0, start),
    65→                )} ${escapeKaomoji} ${$ta.value.substring(
    66→                  end,
    67→                  $ta.value.length,
    68→                )}`
    69→                onValueChange?.($ta.value)
    70→
    71→                requestAnimationFrame(() => {
    72→                  const shouldMoveToPos = start + escapeKaomoji.length + 2
    73→                  $ta.selectionStart = shouldMoveToPos
    74→                  $ta.selectionEnd = shouldMoveToPos
    75→
    76→                  $ta.focus()
    77→                })
    78→              })
    79→            }}
    80→          >
    81→            {kamoji}
    82→          </MotionButtonBase>
    83→        ))}
    84→      </div>
    85→    </ScrollArea.ScrollArea>
    86→  )
    87→
    88→  const [kaomojiPanelOpen, setKaomojiPanelOpen] = useState(open || false)
    89→
    90→  useEffect(() => {
    91→    if (onOpenChange) {
    92→      onOpenChange(kaomojiPanelOpen)
    93→    }
    94→  }, [kaomojiPanelOpen, onOpenChange])
    95→
    96→  const KaomojiButton = children ?? (
    97→    <MotionButtonBase>
    98→      <i className="i-mingcute-emoji-line" />
    99→    </MotionButtonBase>
   100→  )
   101→
   102→  const isMobile = useIsMobile()
   103→
   104→  return (
   105→    <>
   106→      {isMobile ? (
   107→        <PresentSheet
   108→          content={KaomojiContentEl}
   109→          triggerAsChild={false}
   110→          zIndex={1002}
   111→          onOpenChange={setKaomojiPanelOpen}
   112→        >
   113→          {KaomojiButton}
   114→        </PresentSheet>
   115→      ) : (
   116→        <FloatPopover
   117→          placement={placement || 'left-end'}
   118→          popoverWrapperClassNames="z-[999]"
   119→          to={to || void 0}
   120→          trigger="click"
   121→          triggerElement={KaomojiButton as any}
   122→          onClose={() => {
   123→            setKaomojiPanelOpen(false)
   124→          }}
   125→          onOpen={() => {
   126→            setKaomojiPanelOpen(true)
   127→          }}
   128→        >
   129→          {KaomojiContentEl}
   130→        </FloatPopover>
   131→      )}
   132→    </>
   133→  )
   134→}
   135→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
     4→import type { ElementType } from 'react'
     5→import { useDeferredValue } from 'react'
     6→import { useInView } from 'react-intersection-observer'
     7→
     8→import { useIsMobile } from '~/atoms/hooks/viewport'
     9→import {
    10→  CircleProgress,
    11→  MaterialSymbolsProgressActivity,
    12→} from '~/components/icons/Progress'
    13→import { MotionButtonBase } from '~/components/ui/button'
    14→import { RootPortal } from '~/components/ui/portal'
    15→import { IconSmoothTransition } from '~/components/ui/transition'
    16→import { useReadPercent } from '~/hooks/shared/use-read-percent'
    17→import { clsxm } from '~/lib/helper'
    18→import { springScrollToTop } from '~/lib/scroller'
    19→import { useIsEoFWrappedElement } from '~/providers/shared/WrappedElementProvider'
    20→
    21→export const ReadIndicator: Component<{
    22→  as?: ElementType
    23→}> = ({ className, as }) => {
    24→  const t = useTranslations('common')
    25→  const readPercent = useReadPercent()
    26→  const As = as || 'span'
    27→
    28→  const { ref, inView } = useInView()
    29→
    30→  return (
    31→    <As
    32→      className={clsxm('text-neutral-8', className)}
    33→      ref={ref}
    34→    >
    35→      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
    36→        <IconSmoothTransition
    37→          currentState={readPercent !== 0 ? 'regular' : 'solid'}
    38→          solidIcon={<MaterialSymbolsProgressActivity />}
    39→          regularIcon={
    40→            <CircleProgress percent={readPercent} size={14} strokeWidth={2} />
    41→          }
    42→        />
    43→        {readPercent}%<br />
    44→      </div>
    45→      <MotionButtonBase
    46→        className={clsxm(
    47→          'mt-1 flex flex-nowrap items-center gap-2 opacity-50 transition-all duration-500 hover:opacity-100',
    48→          readPercent > 10 ? '' : 'pointer-events-none opacity-0',
    49→        )}
    50→        onClick={springScrollToTop}
    51→      >
    52→        <i className="i-mingcute-arrow-up-circle-line" />
    53→        <span className="whitespace-nowrap">{t('back_to_top')}</span>
    54→      </MotionButtonBase>
    55→      {!inView && <ReadIndicatorVertical className="right-px" />}
    56→    </As>
    57→  )
    58→}
    59→
    60→const ReadIndicatorVertical: Component = ({ className }) => {
    61→  const readPercent = useDeferredValue(useReadPercent())
    62→  const isEOA = useIsEoFWrappedElement()
    63→
    64→  // TODO new API ScrollTimeline but safari not support
    65→  // const wrappedElement = useWrappedElement()
    66→  // const timeline = new ScrollTimeline({
    67→  //   source: wrappedElement,
    68→  //   axis: "block",
    69→  // });
    70→  return (
    71→    <RootPortal>
    72→      <div
    73→        className={clsxm(
    74→          'fixed inset-y-0 right-0 z-[99] w-px transition-opacity duration-200 ease-in-out',
    75→          isEOA ? 'opacity-0' : 'opacity-100',
    76→          className,
    77→        )}
    78→      >
    79→        <div
    80→          className="absolute top-0 w-full bg-accent/80 duration-75 ease-linear"
    81→          style={{
    82→            height: `${readPercent}%`,
    83→          }}
    84→        />
    85→      </div>
    86→    </RootPortal>
    87→  )
    88→}
    89→export const ReadIndicatorForMobile: Component<{}> = () => {
    90→  const isMobile = useIsMobile()
    91→  if (!isMobile) return null
    92→
    93→  return <ReadIndicatorVertical />
    94→}
    95→
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./apps/web/src/components/modules/shared/SearchFAB.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import { Dialog } from '@base-ui/react/dialog'
     4→import { useQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query'
     5→import clsx from 'clsx'
     6→import { atom, useAtomValue, useSetAtom } from 'jotai'
     7→import { AnimatePresence, m } from 'motion/react'
     8→import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
     9→import type { KeyboardEventHandler } from 'react'
    10→import {
    11→  memo,
    12→  startTransition,
    13→  useCallback,
    14→  useEffect,
    15→  useRef,
    16→  useState,
    17→} from 'react'
    18→
    19→import { useIsOwnerLogged } from '~/atoms/hooks/owner'
    20→import { EmptyIcon } from '~/components/icons/empty'
    21→import { MotionButtonBase } from '~/components/ui/button'
    22→import { FABPortable } from '~/components/ui/fab'
    23→import { FloatPopover } from '~/components/ui/float-popover'
    24→import { microDampingPreset } from '~/constants/spring'
    25→import useDebounceValue from '~/hooks/common/use-debounce-value'
    26→import { useIsClient } from '~/hooks/common/use-is-client'
    27→import { Link } from '~/i18n/navigation'
    28→import { noopArr } from '~/lib/noop'
    29→import { buildNotePath } from '~/lib/note-route'
    30→import { apiClient } from '~/lib/request'
    31→import { jotaiStore } from '~/lib/store'
    32→
    33→const searchPanelOpenAtom = atom(false)
    34→const isComposingAtom = atom(false)
    35→export const SearchFAB = () => {
    36→  const isClient = useIsClient()
    37→  if (!isClient) return null
    38→  return (
    39→    <>
    40→      <FABPortable
    41→        onClick={() => {
    42→          jotaiStore.set(searchPanelOpenAtom, true)
    43→        }}
    44→      >
    45→        <i className="i-mingcute-search-line" />
    46→      </FABPortable>
    47→    </>
    48→  )
    49→}
    50→
    51→export const SearchPanelWithHotKey = () => {
    52→  useEffect(() => {
    53→    const handler = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
    54→      if (e.key === 'k' && (e.metaKey || e.ctrlKey)) {
    55→        e.preventDefault()
    56→        jotaiStore.set(searchPanelOpenAtom, true)
    57→      }
    58→
    59→      if (
    60→        e.key === 'Escape' &&
    61→        jotaiStore.get(searchPanelOpenAtom) &&
    62→        !jotaiStore.get(isComposingAtom)
    63→      ) {
    64→        e.preventDefault()
    65→        jotaiStore.set(searchPanelOpenAtom, false)
    66→      }
    67→    }
    68→    document.addEventListener('keydown', handler)
    69→    return () => {
    70→      document.removeEventListener('keydown', handler)
    71→    }
    72→  }, [])
    73→  return <SearchPanel />
    74→}
    75→
    76→const SearchPanel = () => {
    77→  const t = useTranslations('common')
    78→  const panelOpen = useAtomValue(searchPanelOpenAtom)
    79→
    80→  return (
    81→    <Dialog.Root open={panelOpen}>
    82→      {panelOpen && <Dialog.Backdrop />}
    83→      <AnimatePresence>
    84→        {panelOpen && (
    85→          <Dialog.Portal>
    86→            <Dialog.Popup>
    87→              <Dialog.Title className="hidden">{t('search_title')}</Dialog.Title>
    88→              <div className="center fixed inset-0 z-20 flex">
    89→                <div
    90→                  className="fixed inset-0 z-[-1]"
    91→                  tabIndex={-1}
    92→                  onClick={() => {
    93→                    jotaiStore.set(searchPanelOpenAtom, false)
    94→                  }}
    95→                />
    96→                <SearchPanelImpl />
    97→              </div>
    98→            </Dialog.Popup>
    99→          </Dialog.Portal>
   100→        )}
   101→      </AnimatePresence>
   102→    </Dialog.Root>
   103→  )
   104→}
   105→
   106→type SearchListType = {
   107→  title: string
   108→  subtitle?: string
   109→  url: string
   110→  id: string
   111→}
   112→const currentSelectAtom = atom(0)
   113→
   114→const SearchPanelImpl = () => {
   115→  const t = useTranslations('common')
   116→  const [keyword, setKeyword] = useState('')
   117→  const listRef = useRef<HTMLUListElement>(null)
   118→  const setCurrentSelect = useSetAtom(currentSelectAtom)
   119→  const debouncedKeyword = useDebounceValue(keyword, 360)
   120→
   121→  const {
   122→    data: _data,
   123→    isLoading,
   124→    isFetching,
   125→  } = useQuery({
   126→    queryKey: ['search', debouncedKeyword],
   127→    queryFn: ({ queryKey }) => {
   128→      const [, keyword] = queryKey
   129→      if (!keyword) {
   130→        return
   131→      }
   132→      return apiClient.search.proxy('algolia').get({
   133→        params: {
   134→          keyword,
   135→        },
   136→      })
   137→    },
   138→    select: useCallback(
   139→      (data: any) => {
   140→        if (!data?.data) {
   141→          return
   142→        }
   143→
   144→        const _list: SearchListType[] = data?.data.map((item: any) => {
   145→          switch (item.type) {
   146→            case 'post': {
   147→              return {
   148→                title: item.title,
   149→                subtitle: item.category.name,
   150→                id: item.id,
   151→                url: `/posts/${item.category.slug}/${item.slug}`,
   152→              }
   153→            }
   154→            case 'note': {
   155→              return {
   156→                title: item.title,
   157→                subtitle: t('search_note'),
   158→                id: item.id,
   159→                url: buildNotePath(item),
   160→              }
   161→            }
   162→            case 'page': {
   163→              return {
   164→                title: item.title,
   165→                subtitle: t('search_page'),
   166→                id: item.id,
   167→                url: `/${item.slug}`,
   168→              }
   169→            }
   170→          }
   171→        })
   172→        setCurrentSelect(0)
   173→
   174→        return _list
   175→      },
   176→      [setCurrentSelect, t],
   177→    ),
   178→  })
   179→  const data = _data || noopArr
   180→  const handleKeyDown: KeyboardEventHandler<HTMLDivElement> = useCallback(
   181→    (e) => {
   182→      if (!listRef.current) {
   183→        return
   184→      }
   185→      const $ = listRef.current
   186→      const currentSelect = jotaiStore.get(currentSelectAtom)
   187→
   188→      switch (e.key) {
   189→        case 'Enter': {
   190→          ;(
   191→            ($.children.item(currentSelect) as HTMLLIElement).children.item(
   192→              0,
   193→            ) as HTMLLinkElement
   194→          )?.click()
   195→
   196→          break
   197→        }
   198→        case 'ArrowDown': {
   199→          setCurrentSelect((currentSelect) => {
   200→            const index = currentSelect + 1
   201→            return index ? index % data.length : 0
   202→          })
   203→
   204→          break
   205→        }
   206→        case 'ArrowUp': {
   207→          setCurrentSelect((currentSelect) => {
   208→            const index = currentSelect - 1
   209→            return index < 0 ? data.length - 1 : index
   210→          })
   211→
   212→          break
   213→        }
   214→      }
   215→
   216→      $.children.item(currentSelect)?.scrollIntoView({
   217→        behavior: 'smooth',
   218→      })
   219→    },
   220→    [data.length],
   221→  )
   222→
   223→  const isLogged = useIsOwnerLogged()
   224→
   225→  return (
   226→    <m.div
   227→      initial={true}
   228→      role="dialog"
   229→      animate={{
   230→        y: 0,
   231→        transition: microDampingPreset,
   232→      }}
   233→      className={clsx(
   234→        'h-[600px] max-h-[80vh] w-[800px] max-w-screen rounded-none md:h-screen md:max-h-[60vh] md:max-w-[80vw]',
   235→        'flex min-h-[50px] flex-col bg-neutral-1/80 shadow-2xl backdrop-blur-md md:rounded-xl',
   236→        'border-0 border-neutral-3 md:border',
   237→      )}
   238→      exit={{
   239→        y: 20,
   240→        opacity: 0,
   241→      }}
   242→      onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}
   243→    >
   244→      <input
   245→        autoFocus
   246→        className="w-full shrink-0 border-b border-neutral-3 bg-transparent p-4 px-5 text-lg leading-4"
   247→        placeholder={t('search_placeholder')}
   248→        value={keyword}
   249→        onChange={(e) => setKeyword(e.target.value)}
   250→        onCompositionEnd={() => {
   251→          jotaiStore.set(isComposingAtom, false)
   252→        }}
   253→        onCompositionStart={() => {
   254→          jotaiStore.set(isComposingAtom, true)
   255→        }}
   256→        onKeyDown={(e) => {
   257→          if (
   258→            e.key === 'ArrowDown' ||
   259→            e.key === 'ArrowUp' ||
   260→            e.key === 'Enter'
   261→          ) {
   262→            e.preventDefault()
   263→          }
   264→        }}
   265→      />
   266→      <div />
   267→      <div className="relative h-0 shrink grow overflow-auto">
   268→        <ul className="h-full px-2 py-4" ref={listRef}>
   269→          {data.length === 0 && !isLoading ? (
   270→            <div className="flex h-full items-center justify-center">
   271→              <div className="flex flex-col items-center space-y-2">
   272→                {!keyword ? (
   273→                  <i className="i-mingcute-search-line text-[60px]" />
   274→                ) : (
   275→                  <EmptyIcon />
   276→                )}
   277→
   278→                {!data && isLoading && isFetching && (
   279→                  <div className="loading loading-dots text-[30px]" />
   280→                )}
   281→                <span>{!!keyword && t('search_empty')}</span>
   282→              </div>
   283→            </div>
   284→          ) : (
   285→            data.map((item, index) => (
   286→              <SearchItem key={item.id} {...item} index={index} />
   287→            ))
   288→          )}
   289→
   290→          {data.length === 0 && isLoading && (
   291→            <div className="center flex h-full grow">
   292→              <div className="loading loading-spinner" />
   293→            </div>
   294→          )}
   295→        </ul>
   296→      </div>
   297→
   298→      <div className="flex shrink-0 items-center justify-between px-4 py-2">
   299→        {isLogged ? (
   300→          <MotionButtonBase
   301→            onClick={() => {
   302→              window.open(
   303→                apiClient.search.proxy('algolia')('import-json').toString(true),
   304→              )
   305→            }}
   306→          >
   307→            <FloatPopover
   308→              mobileAsSheet
   309→              triggerElement={<i className="i-mingcute-download-2-line" />}
   310→              type="tooltip"
   311→            >
   312→              {t('search_download_index')}
   313→            </FloatPopover>
   314→          </MotionButtonBase>
   315→        ) : (
   316→          <div />
   317→        )}
   318→        <a
   319→          className="flex items-center hover:text-current"
   320→          href="https://www.algolia.com"
   321→          rel="noopener noreferrer"
   322→          target="_blank"
   323→        >
   324→          <span className="mr-2 text-sm">{t('search_by')}</span>
   325→          <svg aria-label="Algolia" height="19" role="img" width="77">
   326→            <path
<!-- [omitted 5508 chars — likely node_modules or generated bundle] -->
   328→              fill="currentColor"
   329→              fillRule="evenodd"
   330→            />
   331→          </svg>
   332→        </a>
   333→      </div>
   334→    </m.div>
   335→  )
   336→}
   337→
   338→const SearchItem = memo(
   339→  ({
   340→    index,
   341→    ...item
   342→  }: {
   343→    index: number
   344→  } & SearchListType) => {
   345→    const selectIndex = useAtomValue(currentSelectAtom)
   346→    const isSelect = selectIndex === index
   347→    return (
   348→      <li
   349→        key={item.id}
   350→        className={clsx(
   351→          'relative flex w-full justify-between px-1',
   352→          'before:content-auto before:absolute before:inset-0 before:rounded-md',
   353→          'before:z-0 hover:before:bg-neutral-3/80',
   354→          isSelect && 'before:bg-neutral-3/80',
   355→        )}
   356→        onMouseOver={() => {
   357→          startTransition(() => {
   358→            jotaiStore.set(currentSelectAtom, index)
   359→          })
   360→        }}
   361→      >
   362→        <Link
   363→          className="relative z-10 flex w-full justify-between p-3"
   364→          href={item.url}
   365→        >
   366→          <span className="block min-w-0 flex-1 shrink-0 truncate">
   367→            {item.title}
   368→          </span>
   369→          <span className="block min-w-0 shrink-0 grow-0 text-neutral-9">
   370→            {item.subtitle}
   371→          </span>
   372→        </Link>
   373→      </li>
   374→    )
   375→  },
   376→)
   377→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./apps/web/src/components/modules/shared/Hitokoto.tsx`

```text
     1→import { useQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query'
     2→import { useLocale, useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
     3→
     4→import { MotionButtonBase } from '~/components/ui/button'
     5→import { toast } from '~/lib/toast'
     6→
     7→export const Hitokoto = () => {
     8→  const t = useTranslations('common')
     9→  const locale = useLocale()
    10→  const {
    11→    data: hitokoto,
    12→    refetch,
    13→    isLoading,
    14→  } = useQuery({
    15→    queryKey: ['hitokoto', locale],
    16→    queryFn: () => fetchQuoteByLocale(locale),
    17→    refetchInterval: 1000 * 60 * 60 * 24,
    18→    staleTime: Infinity,
    19→    select(data) {
    20→      if (!data) return t('hitokoto_no_data')
    21→      return data
    22→    },
    23→  })
    24→
    25→  if (!hitokoto) return null
    26→  if (isLoading) return <div className="loading loading-dots" />
    27→  return (
    28→    <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
    29→      <span className="leading-normal">{hitokoto}</span>
    30→      <div className="ml-0 flex items-center space-x-2">
    31→        <MotionButtonBase onClick={() => refetch()}>
    32→          <i className="i-mingcute-refresh-2-line" />
    33→        </MotionButtonBase>
    34→
    35→        <MotionButtonBase
    36→          onClick={() => {
    37→            navigator.clipboard.writeText(hitokoto)
    38→            toast.success(t('hitokoto_copy_success'))
    39→            toast.info(hitokoto)
    40→          }}
    41→        >
    42→          <i className="i-mingcute-copy-line" />
    43→        </MotionButtonBase>
    44→      </div>
    45→    </div>
    46→  )
    47→}
    48→
    49→export enum SentenceType {
    50→  '其他' = 'g',
    51→  '动画' = 'a',
    52→  '原创' = 'e',
    53→  '哲学' = 'k',
    54→  '影视' = 'h',
    55→  '抖机灵' = 'l',
    56→  '文学' = 'd',
    57→  '来自网络' = 'f',
    58→  '游戏' = 'c',
    59→  '漫画' = 'b',
    60→  '网易云' = 'j',
    61→  '诗词' = 'i',
    62→}
    63→
    64→/** Fetch quote from Hitokoto (Chinese) */
    65→const fetchHitokoto = async (
    66→  type: SentenceType[] | SentenceType = SentenceType.文学,
    67→) => {
    68→  const res = await fetch(
    69→    `https://v1.hitokoto.cn/${
    70→      Array.isArray(type)
    71→        ? `?${type.map((t) => `c=${t}`).join('&')}`
    72→        : `?c=${type}`
    73→    }`,
    74→  )
    75→  const data = (await res.json()) as {
    76→    hitokoto: string
    77→    from: string
    78→    from_who: string
    79→    creator: string
    80→  }
    81→  const postfix = [data.from, data.from_who, data.creator].find(Boolean)
    82→  return data.hitokoto
    83→    ? `${data.hitokoto}${postfix ? ` —— ${postfix}` : ''}`
    84→    : null
    85→}
    86→
    87→/** Fetch quote from 名言教えるよ (Japanese) */
    88→const fetchMeigen = async (): Promise<string | null> => {
    89→  const res = await fetch('https://meigen.doodlenote.net/api/json.php?c=1')
    90→  const arr = (await res.json()) as Array<{ meigen: string; auther: string }>
    91→  const item = arr?.[0]
    92→  if (!item?.meigen) return null
    93→  const postfix = item.auther || ''
    94→  return postfix ? `${item.meigen} —— ${item.auther}` : item.meigen
    95→}
    96→
    97→/** Fetch quote from DummyJSON (English) */
    98→const fetchEnglishQuote = async (): Promise<string | null> => {
    99→  const res = await fetch('https://dummyjson.com/quotes/random')
   100→  if (!res.ok) return null
   101→  const item = (await res.json()) as { quote: string; author: string }
   102→  if (!item?.quote) return null
   103→  return item.author ? `${item.quote} —— ${item.author}` : item.quote
   104→}
   105→
   106→/** Fetch quote by locale: zh→Hitokoto, ja→Meigen, en→Quotable */
   107→export const fetchQuoteByLocale = async (
   108→  locale: string,
   109→): Promise<string | null> => {
   110→  try {
   111→    switch (locale) {
   112→      case 'ja': {
   113→        return await fetchMeigen()
   114→      }
   115→      case 'en': {
   116→        return await fetchEnglishQuote()
   117→      }
   118→      default: {
   119→        return await fetchHitokoto([
   120→          SentenceType.动画,
   121→          SentenceType.原创,
   122→          SentenceType.哲学,
   123→          SentenceType.文学,
   124→        ])
   125→      }
   126→    }
   127→  } catch {
   128→    return null
   129→  }
   130→}
   131→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./apps/web/src/components/modules/toc/TocFAB.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
     4→import { startTransition, useCallback, useEffect, useState } from 'react'
     5→
     6→import { FABPortable } from '~/components/ui/fab'
     7→import { useModalStack } from '~/components/ui/modal'
     8→import { MAIN_CONTENT_ID } from '~/constants/dom-id'
     9→import { DOMCustomEvents } from '~/constants/event'
    10→import { useForceUpdate } from '~/hooks/common/use-force-update'
    11→
    12→import { useTocHeadingStrategy } from './TocHeadingStrategy'
    13→import { TocTree } from './TocTree'
    14→
    15→export const TocFAB = () => {
    16→  const t = useTranslations('common')
    17→  const { present } = useModalStack()
    18→  const [forceUpdate, updated] = useForceUpdate()
    19→  const [$headings, setHeadings] = useState<HTMLHeadingElement[]>()
    20→
    21→  useEffect(() => {
    22→    const handler = () => {
    23→      startTransition(() => {
    24→        forceUpdate()
    25→      })
    26→    }
    27→    document.addEventListener(DOMCustomEvents.RefreshToc, handler)
    28→    return () => {
    29→      document.removeEventListener(DOMCustomEvents.RefreshToc, handler)
    30→    }
    31→  }, [forceUpdate])
    32→
    33→  const queryHeadings = useTocHeadingStrategy()
    34→  useEffect(() => {
    35→    const $mainContentRender = document.getElementById(MAIN_CONTENT_ID)
    36→    if (!$mainContentRender) {
    37→      setHeadings(undefined)
    38→      return
    39→    }
    40→
    41→    setHeadings(queryHeadings($mainContentRender))
    42→  }, [queryHeadings, updated])
    43→  const presentToc = useCallback(() => {
    44→    present({
    45→      title: t('toc_title'),
    46→      clickOutsideToDismiss: true,
    47→      content: ({ dismiss }) => (
    48→        <TocTree
    49→          scrollInNextTick
    50→          $headings={$headings!}
    51→          className="max-h-full space-y-3 overflow-y-auto [&>li]:py-1"
    52→          onItemClick={() => {
    53→            dismiss()
    54→          }}
    55→        />
    56→      ),
    57→    })
    58→  }, [$headings, present, t])
    59→
    60→  if (!$headings?.length) return null
    61→
    62→  return (
    63→    <FABPortable aria-label={t('aria_toc')} onClick={presentToc}>
    64→      <i className="i-mingcute-list-expansion-line" />
    65→    </FABPortable>
    66→  )
    67→}
    68→
```
</details></tool-use>
