 `./apps/web/src/components/modules/translation/TranslationBanner.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import type { TranslationMeta } from '@mx-space/api-client'
     4→import { clsx } from 'clsx'
     5→import { usePathname, useRouter, useSearchParams } from 'next/navigation'
     6→import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
     7→import { useCallback } from 'react'
     8→
     9→import { useTranslationPending, useViewingOriginal } from '~/atoms/translation'
    10→
    11→import { TranslatedBadge } from './TranslatedBadge'
    12→
    13→interface TranslationBannerProps {
    14→  translationMeta: TranslationMeta
    15→}
    16→
    17→export function TranslationBanner({ translationMeta }: TranslationBannerProps) {
    18→  const t = useTranslations('translation')
    19→  const tCommon = useTranslations('common')
    20→  const isPending = useTranslationPending()
    21→  const isViewingOriginal = useViewingOriginal()
    22→  const router = useRouter()
    23→  const pathname = usePathname()
    24→  const searchParams = useSearchParams()
    25→
    26→  const handleViewOriginal = useCallback(() => {
    27→    const params = new URLSearchParams(searchParams.toString())
    28→    params.set('lang', 'original')
    29→    router.replace(`${pathname}?${params.toString()}`)
    30→  }, [router, pathname, searchParams])
    31→
    32→  const handleViewTranslation = useCallback(() => {
    33→    const params = new URLSearchParams(searchParams.toString())
    34→    params.delete('lang')
    35→    const queryString = params.toString()
    36→    router.replace(queryString ? `${pathname}?${queryString}` : pathname)
    37→  }, [router, pathname, searchParams])
    38→
    39→  return (
    40→    <div className="mb-8 overflow-hidden">
    41→      <div
    42→        className={clsx(
    43→          'group relative flex items-center justify-between overflow-hidden rounded-lg border px-4 py-3 shadow-xs backdrop-blur-md transition-colors',
    44→          isPending
    45→            ? 'border-amber-200/50 bg-amber-50/50 dark:border-amber-900/30! dark:bg-amber-950/10'
    46→            : 'border-transparent bg-neutral-1/50',
    47→        )}
    48→      >
    49→        <div className="flex w-full items-center gap-4">
    50→          {/* Icon Wrapper */}
    51→          <div
    52→            className={clsx(
    53→              'flex size-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br shadow-inner',
    54→              isPending
    55→                ? 'from-amber-100 to-amber-200/50 text-amber-600 dark:from-amber-900/40 dark:to-amber-800/20 dark:text-amber-400'
    56→                : isViewingOriginal
    57→                  ? 'from-neutral-2 to-neutral-3/50 text-neutral-7'
    58→                  : 'from-sky-100 to-sky-200/50 text-sky-600 dark:from-sky-900/40 dark:to-sky-800/20 dark:text-sky-400',
    59→            )}
    60→          >
    61→            {isPending ? (
    62→              <i className="i-mingcute-loading-line animate-spin text-xl" />
    63→            ) : isViewingOriginal ? (
    64→              <i className="i-mingcute-document-line text-xl" />
    65→            ) : (
    66→              <i className="i-mingcute-translate-2-line text-xl" />
    67→            )}
    68→          </div>
    69→
    70→          {/* Content */}
    71→          <div className="flex flex-1 flex-col gap-0.5">
    72→            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
    73→              <span className="text-sm font-semibold text-neutral-9">
    74→                {isPending
    75→                  ? t('optimizing')
    76→                  : isViewingOriginal
    77→                    ? t('original_mode')
    78→                    : t('banner_title')}
    79→              </span>
    80→              {!isPending && !isViewingOriginal && (
    81→                <TranslatedBadge translationMeta={translationMeta} />
    82→              )}
    83→
    84→              <button
    85→                className="ml-auto inline-block text-sm font-medium text-neutral-9 underline decoration-neutral-4 underline-offset-2 transition-colors hover:text-sky-600 hover:decoration-sky-300 dark:hover:text-sky-400 md:hidden"
    86→                type="button"
    87→                onClick={
    88→                  isViewingOriginal ? handleViewTranslation : handleViewOriginal
    89→                }
    90→              >
    91→                {isViewingOriginal
    92→                  ? tCommon('view_translation')
    93→                  : t('banner_viewOriginal')}
    94→              </button>
    95→            </div>
    96→
    97→            <div className="mt-0.5 flex w-full flex-1 items-center gap-3 text-xs text-neutral-7">
    98→              {isPending ? (
    99→                <span>{t('content_updated')}</span>
   100→              ) : (
   101→                <>
   102→                  <span>
   103→                    {isViewingOriginal
   104→                      ? t('viewing_original')
   105→                      : t('banner_description')}
   106→                  </span>
   107→                  {!isPending && (
   108→                    <div className="hidden flex-1 items-center justify-end md:flex">
   109→                      <button
   110→                        className="font-medium text-neutral-9 underline decoration-neutral-4 underline-offset-2 transition-colors hover:text-sky-600 hover:decoration-sky-300 dark:hover:text-sky-400"
   111→                        type="button"
   112→                        onClick={
   113→                          isViewingOriginal
   114→                            ? handleViewTranslation
   115→                            : handleViewOriginal
   116→                        }
   117→                      >
   118→                        {isViewingOriginal
   119→                          ? tCommon('view_translation')
   120→                          : t('banner_viewOriginal')}
   121→                      </button>
   122→                    </div>
   123→                  )}
   124→                </>
   125→              )}
   126→            </div>
   127→          </div>
   128→        </div>
   129→      </div>
   130→    </div>
   131→  )
   132→}
   133→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import { useQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query'
     4→import { useParams } from 'next/navigation'
     5→import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
     6→import type { FC } from 'react'
     7→import { memo } from 'react'
     8→
     9→import { AutoResizeHeight } from '~/components/modules/shared/AutoResizeHeight'
    10→import { Markdown } from '~/components/ui/markdown'
    11→import { clsxm } from '~/lib/helper'
    12→import { apiClient } from '~/lib/request'
    13→
    14→export interface AiSummaryProps {
    15→  articleId: string
    16→  className?: string
    17→  hydrateText?: string
    18→}
    19→
    20→export const AISummary: FC<AiSummaryProps> = memo((props) => {
    21→  const { articleId, hydrateText } = props
    22→  const { locale } = useParams<{ locale: string }>()
    23→
    24→  const { data: response, isLoading } = useQuery({
    25→    queryKey: ['ai-summary', articleId, locale],
    26→    queryFn: async () =>
    27→      apiClient.ai.getSummary({
    28→        articleId,
    29→        lang: locale,
    30→      }),
    31→    retryDelay: 5000,
    32→    enabled: !hydrateText,
    33→  })
    34→
    35→  if (hydrateText) {
    36→    return <SummaryContainer isLoading={false} summary={hydrateText} />
    37→  }
    38→  return <SummaryContainer isLoading={isLoading} summary={response?.summary} />
    39→})
    40→
    41→const SummaryLoadingSkeleton = (
    42→  <div className="space-y-4">
    43→    {/* 丝带样式loading标题 */}
    44→    <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
    45→      <div className="h-px w-8 bg-gradient-to-r from-accent/30 to-transparent" />
    46→      <div className="flex items-center space-x-1">
    47→        <span className="inline-block size-2 animate-pulse rounded-full bg-accent/70 dark:bg-accent/80" />
    48→        <span className="inline-block size-2 animate-pulse rounded-full bg-accent/40 delay-150 dark:bg-accent/50" />
    49→        <span className="inline-block size-2 animate-pulse rounded-full bg-accent/20 delay-300 dark:bg-accent/30" />
    50→      </div>
    51→    </div>
    52→
    53→    {/* 内容skeleton */}
    54→    <div className="space-y-3">
    55→      <span className="block h-4 w-full animate-pulse rounded-md bg-gradient-to-r from-neutral-9/10 via-accent/10 to-neutral-9/5" />
    56→      <span className="block h-4 w-11/12 animate-pulse rounded-md bg-gradient-to-r from-neutral-9/10 via-accent/10 to-neutral-9/5" />
    57→      <span className="block h-4 w-10/12 animate-pulse rounded-md bg-gradient-to-r from-neutral-9/10 via-accent/10 to-neutral-9/5" />
    58→    </div>
    59→
    60→    {/* 底部装饰线 */}
    61→    <div className="flex justify-start pt-2">
    62→      <div className="h-px w-6 animate-pulse bg-gradient-to-r from-accent/30 to-transparent" />
    63→    </div>
    64→  </div>
    65→)
    66→
    67→const SummaryContainer: Component<{
    68→  isLoading: boolean
    69→  summary?: string
    70→}> = (props) => {
    71→  const { className, isLoading, summary } = props
    72→  const t = useTranslations('common')
    73→
    74→  return (
    75→    <div
    76→      data-hide-print
    77→      className={clsxm(
    78→        'relative my-8 -mx-4 lg:-mx-8 overflow-hidden -mb-36',
    79→        '[mask-image:linear-gradient(to_right,black_calc(100%-2rem),transparent)]',
    80→        className,
    81→      )}
    82→    >
    83→      {/* 斜角丝带背景 */}
    84→      <div className="relative -skew-x-2 transform bg-gradient-to-b from-accent/10 via-accent/5 to-transparent px-8 py-6 pb-32 transition-all duration-300">
    85→        <div className="skew-x-2 transform">
    86→          {/* 右上角浮动metadata */}
    87→          {!isLoading && (
    88→            <div className="absolute right-8 top-3 flex items-center gap-2 text-xs text-neutral-9/40">
    89→              <span className="size-2 animate-pulse rounded-full bg-accent/60" />
    90→              <span className="font-mono">AI·GEN</span>
    91→            </div>
    92→          )}
    93→
    94→          {/* 主要内容区域 */}
    95→          <div className="max-w-4xl pt-3">
    96→            {/* 动态标题 */}
    97→            <h3 className="mb-3 flex items-center gap-2 text-base font-medium leading-tight text-accent">
    98→              <i className="i-mingcute-ai-fill text-lg" />
    99→              {t('ai_key_insights')}
   100→            </h3>
   101→
   102→            {/* 内容区域 */}
   103→            <AutoResizeHeight spring>
   104→              <div
   105→                className="space-y-2 text-sm leading-relaxed text-neutral-9/80"
   106→                style={{
   107→                  textAutospace: 'normal',
   108→                }}
   109→              >
   110→                {isLoading ? (
   111→                  SummaryLoadingSkeleton
   112→                ) : (
   113→                  <Markdown disableParsingRawHTML removeWrapper>
   114→                    {summary || ''}
   115→                  </Markdown>
   116→                )}
   117→              </div>
   118→            </AutoResizeHeight>
   119→          </div>
   120→        </div>
   121→      </div>
   122→    </div>
   123→  )
   124→}
   125→
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./apps/web/src/components/modules/ai/AIGenBadge.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
     4→import type { FC } from 'react'
     5→
     6→import { FloatPopover } from '~/components/ui/float-popover'
     7→import { clsxm } from '~/lib/helper'
     8→
     9→import type { AiGenValue, AiGenValueOrArray } from './ai-gen'
    10→import { getAiGenDescription, getAiGenLabel, isAiGenPreset } from './ai-gen'
    11→
    12→const SingleBadge: FC<{
    13→  value: AiGenValueOrArray
    14→  className?: string
    15→}> = (props) => {
    16→  const { value, className } = props
    17→  const t = useTranslations('ai')
    18→
    19→  const label = isAiGenPreset(value) ? getAiGenLabel(t, value) : String(value)
    20→
    21→  const desc = isAiGenPreset(value)
    22→    ? getAiGenDescription(t, value)
    23→    : t('disclosure_fallback', { label })
    24→
    25→  return (
    26→    <FloatPopover
    27→      asChild
    28→      mobileAsSheet
    29→      type="tooltip"
    30→      triggerElement={
    31→        <span
    32→          data-hide-print
    33→          className={clsxm(
    34→            'inline-flex items-center gap-1 text-xs font-medium',
    35→            className,
    36→          )}
    37→        >
    38→          <i className="i-mingcute-ai-fill text-sm" />
    39→          <span className="max-w-64 truncate">{label}</span>
    40→        </span>
    41→      }
    42→    >
    43→      {desc}
    44→    </FloatPopover>
    45→  )
    46→}
    47→
    48→const MultiBadge: FC<{
    49→  values: AiGenValue[]
    50→  className?: string
    51→}> = ({ values, className }) => {
    52→  const t = useTranslations('ai')
    53→  const items = values.map((v) => ({
    54→    value: v,
    55→    label: isAiGenPreset(v) ? getAiGenLabel(t, v) : String(v),
    56→    description: isAiGenPreset(v)
    57→      ? getAiGenDescription(t, v)
    58→      : t('disclosure_fallback', { label: String(v) }),
    59→  }))
    60→
    61→  if (items.length === 0) return null
    62→
    63→  return (
    64→    <FloatPopover
    65→      asChild
    66→      mobileAsSheet
    67→      type="tooltip"
    68→      triggerElement={
    69→        <span
    70→          data-hide-print
    71→          className={clsxm(
    72→            'inline-flex items-center gap-1 text-xs font-medium',
    73→            className,
    74→          )}
    75→        >
    76→          <i className="i-mingcute-ai-fill text-sm" />
    77→          <span className="max-w-64 truncate">
    78→            {items.map((item) => item.label).join(' · ')}
    79→          </span>
    80→        </span>
    81→      }
    82→    >
    83→      <div className="flex flex-col gap-2">
    84→        {items.map((item) => (
    85→          <div className="flex flex-col gap-1" key={item.value}>
    86→            <span className="font-medium">{item.label}</span>
    87→            <span className="text-sm opacity-80">{item.description}</span>
    88→          </div>
    89→        ))}
    90→      </div>
    91→    </FloatPopover>
    92→  )
    93→}
    94→
    95→export const AIGenBadge: FC<{
    96→  value?: AiGenValueOrArray | AiGenValueOrArray[]
    97→  className?: string
    98→}> = ({ value, className }) => {
    99→  if (value === undefined || value === null) return null
   100→
   101→  // Flatten and normalize the value to an array of AiGenValue
   102→  const normalizeToArray = (
   103→    val: AiGenValueOrArray | AiGenValueOrArray[],
   104→  ): AiGenValue[] => {
   105→    if (Array.isArray(val)) {
   106→      return val.flatMap((v) => (Array.isArray(v) ? v : [v]))
   107→    }
   108→    return [val]
   109→  }
   110→
   111→  const normalized = normalizeToArray(value)
   112→
   113→  if (normalized.length === 0) return null
   114→
   115→  // Merge into single badge when 2+ items
   116→  if (normalized.length >= 2) {
   117→    return <MultiBadge className={className} values={normalized} />
   118→  }
   119→
   120→  return (
   121→    <span className={clsxm('inline-flex gap-1', className)}>
   122→      {normalized.map((v) => (
   123→        <SingleBadge key={v} value={v} />
   124→      ))}
   125→    </span>
   126→  )
   127→}
   128→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import { m } from 'motion/react'
     4→import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
     5→import type { PropsWithChildren } from 'react'
     6→import { useEffect } from 'react'
     7→
     8→import { ImpressionView } from '~/components/common/ImpressionTracker'
     9→import { useModalStack } from '~/components/ui/modal'
    10→import { microReboundPreset } from '~/constants/spring'
    11→import { TrackerAction } from '~/constants/tracker'
    12→import { Link } from '~/i18n/navigation'
    13→
    14→export const PeekModal = (
    15→  props: PropsWithChildren<{
    16→    to?: string
    17→  }>,
    18→) => {
    19→  const t = useTranslations('common')
    20→  const { dismissAll, dismissTop } = useModalStack()
    21→  const { to, children } = props
    22→
    23→  useEffect(() => {
    24→    if (!to) return
    25→    history.replaceState({}, '', `?peek-to=${to}`)
    26→
    27→    return () => {
    28→      history.replaceState({}, '', location.pathname)
    29→    }
    30→  }, [to])
    31→  return (
    32→    <div className="scrollbar-none relative mx-auto mt-[10vh] max-w-full px-2 lg:max-w-[65rem] lg:p-0">
    33→      <ImpressionView
    34→        action={TrackerAction.Impression}
    35→        trackerMessage="Peek Modal"
    36→      />
    37→      <m.div
    38→        animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
    39→        className="scrollbar-none"
    40→        exit={{ opacity: 0, y: 50 }}
    41→        initial={{ opacity: 0.5, y: 50 }}
    42→        transition={microReboundPreset}
    43→      >
    44→        {children}
    45→      </m.div>
    46→
    47→      <m.div
    48→        className="fixed right-2 top-2 flex items-center gap-4"
    49→        initial={true}
    50→        exit={{
    51→          opacity: 0,
    52→        }}
    53→      >
    54→        {to && (
    55→          <Link
    56→            className="center flex size-8 rounded-full p-1 shadow-xs ring-1 ring-neutral-3"
    57→            href={to}
    58→            onClick={dismissAll}
    59→          >
    60→            <i className="i-mingcute-fullscreen-2-line text-lg" />
    61→            <span className="sr-only">{t('aria_open_link')}</span>
    62→          </Link>
    63→        )}
    64→
    65→        <button
    66→          className="center flex size-8 rounded-full p-1 shadow-xs ring-1 ring-neutral-3"
    67→          onClick={dismissTop}
    68→        >
    69→          <i className="i-mingcute-close-line text-lg" />
    70→          <span className="sr-only">{t('actions_close')}</span>
    71→        </button>
    72→      </m.div>
    73→    </div>
    74→  )
    75→}
    76→
```

```text
     5→import Markdown from 'markdown-to-jsx'
     6→import { m } from 'motion/react'
     7→import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
     8→import { memo, useMemo } from 'react'
     9→import Masonry from 'react-responsive-masonry'
    10→
    11→import { useIsOwnerLogged } from '~/atoms/hooks/owner'
    12→import { useIsMobile } from '~/atoms/hooks/viewport'
    13→import { LoadMoreIndicator } from '~/components/modules/shared/LoadMoreIndicator'
    14→import { RelativeTime } from '~/components/ui/relative-time'
    15→import {

    18→} from '~/components/ui/transition'
    19→import { useIsDark } from '~/hooks/common/use-is-dark'

    24→
    25→export const SayMasonry = () => {
    26→  const { fetchNextPage, hasNextPage, data } = useSayListQuery()
    27→
    28→  const isMobile = useIsMobile()
    29→
    30→  if (!data) return null
    31→
    32→  const list = data.pages
    33→    .flatMap((page) => page.data)
    34→    .map((say) => ({
    35→      text: say.text,
    36→      item: say,
    37→      id: say.id,
    38→    }))
    39→
    40→  return (
    41→    <>
    42→      <Masonry columnsCount={isMobile ? 1 : 2} gutter="1rem">
    43→        {list.map((item, index) => (
    44→          <Item index={index} item={item.item} key={item.id} />
    45→        ))}
    46→      </Masonry>
    47→      {hasNextPage && (
    48→        <LoadMoreIndicator className="mt-12" onLoading={fetchNextPage}>
    49→          <BottomToUpSoftScaleTransitionView>
    50→            <Masonry columnsCount={isMobile ? 1 : 2}>
    51→              {placeholderData.map((item) => (
    52→                <SaySkeleton key={item.id} />
    53→              ))}
    54→            </Masonry>
    55→          </BottomToUpSoftScaleTransitionView>
    56→        </LoadMoreIndicator>
    57→      )}
    58→    </>
    59→  )
    60→}
    61→
    62→const placeholderData = Array.from({ length: 10 }).map((_, index) => ({
    63→  index,
    64→  text: '',
    65→  id: index.toFixed(0),
    66→  item: {} as SayModel,
    67→}))
    68→const SaySkeleton = memo(() => (
    69→  <div className="relative border-l-[3px] border-l-neutral-6 bg-neutral-3/50 px-4 py-3">
    70→    <div className="mb-2 h-6 w-full rounded bg-neutral-4/80" />
    71→    <div className="flex text-sm text-neutral-9/60 md:justify-between">
    72→      <div className="mb-2 h-4 w-14 rounded bg-neutral-4/80 md:mb-0" />
    73→      <div className="ml-auto text-right">
    74→        <div className="h-4 w-1/4 rounded bg-neutral-4/80" />
    75→      </div>
    76→    </div>
    77→  </div>
    78→))
    79→SaySkeleton.displayName = 'SaySkeleton'
    80→
    81→const options = {
    82→  disableParsingRawHTML: true,
    83→  forceBlock: true,
    84→} satisfies MarkdownToJSX.Options
    85→
    86→const Item = memo<{
    87→  item: SayModel
    88→  index: number
    89→}>(({ item: say, index: i }) => {
    90→  const t = useTranslations('says')
    91→  const tCommon = useTranslations('common')
    92→  const hasSource = !!say.source
    93→  const hasAuthor = !!say.author
    94→  // const color = colorsMap.get(say.id)
    95→  const { dark: darkColors, light: lightColors } = useMemo(
    96→    () => getColorScheme(stringToHue(say.id)),
    97→    [say.id],
    98→  )
    99→  const isDark = useIsDark()
   100→
   101→  const isLogged = useIsOwnerLogged()
   102→  const present = useSayModal()
   103→
   104→  return (
   105→    <BottomToUpTransitionView className="w-full" delay={i * 50} key={say.id}>
   106→      <m.blockquote
   107→        layout
   108→        className="group relative border-l-[3px] px-4 py-3"
   109→        key={say.id}
   110→        style={{
   111→          borderLeftColor: isDark ? darkColors.accent : lightColors.accent,
   112→          backgroundColor: addAlphaToHSL(
   113→            isDark ? darkColors.background : lightColors.background,
   114→            0.15,
   115→          ),
   116→        }}
   117→      >
   118→        <Markdown className="mb-2" options={options}>{`${say.text}`}</Markdown>
   119→        <div className="flex flex-wrap text-sm text-neutral-9/60 md:justify-between">
   120→          <div className="mb-2 w-full md:mb-0 md:w-auto">
   121→            <span className="mr-2">{tCommon('published_at')}</span>
   122→            <RelativeTime date={say.created} />
   123→          </div>
   124→          <div className="w-full text-right md:ml-auto md:w-auto">
   125→            <div>
   126→              {hasSource && `出自“${say.source}”`}
   127→              {hasSource && hasAuthor && ', '}
   128→              {hasAuthor && t('author_label', { author: say.author! })}
   129→              {!hasAuthor && !hasSource && t('owner_says')}
   130→            </div>
   131→          </div>
   132→        </div>
   133→        {isLogged && (
   134→          <button
   135→            className={clsxm(
   136→              'absolute right-0 top-0 -translate-y-1/3 translate-x-1/3 bg-neutral-1',
   137→              'center flex size-6 rounded-full text-accent opacity-0 ring-1 ring-neutral-3 duration-200 group-hover:opacity-100',
   138→            )}
   139→            onClick={() => present(say)}
   140→          >
   141→            <i className="i-mingcute-quill-pen-line" />
   142→            <span className="sr-only">编辑</span>
   143→          </button>
   144→        )}
   145→      </m.blockquote>
   146→    </BottomToUpTransitionView>
   147→  )
   148→})
   149→Item.displayName = 'Item'
   150→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
    15→  type: string
    16→  variant?: 'default' | 'mono'
    17→}
    18→
    19→const iconSet: Record<
    20→  string,

    22→> = {

    24→    'Github',
    25→    <i className="i-mingcute-github-line" />,

    28→  ],

    32→    '#1DA1F2',
    33→    (id) => `https://twitter.com/${id}`,
    34→  ],

    37→    'Telegram',
    38→    <i className="i-mingcute-telegram-line" />,
    39→    '#0088cc',
    40→    (id) => `https://t.me/${id}`,
    41→  ],
    42→  mail: [

    44→    <i className="i-mingcute-mail-line" />,
    45→    '#D44638',
    46→    (id) => `mailto:${id}`,
    47→  ],
    48→  get email() {
    49→    return this.mail
    50→  },
    51→  get feed() {
    52→    return this.rss
    53→  },
    54→  rss: ['RSS', <i className="i-mingcute-rss-line" />, '#FFA500', (id) => id],
    55→  bilibili: [
    56→    '哔哩哔哩',
    57→    <BilibiliIcon />,
    58→    '#00A1D6',
    59→    (id) => `https://space.bilibili.com/${id}`,
    60→  ],
    61→  netease: [
    62→    '网易云音乐',
    63→    <NeteaseCloudMusicIcon />,
    64→    '#C20C0C',
    65→    (id) => `https://music.163.com/#/user/home?id=${id}`,
    66→  ],
    67→  qq: [
    68→    'QQ',
    69→    <i className="i-mingcute-qq-fill" />,
    70→    '#1e6fff',
    71→    (id) => `https://wpa.qq.com/msgrd?v=3&uin=${id}&site=qq&menu=yes`,
    72→  ],
    73→  wechat: [
    74→    '微信',
    75→    <i className="i-mingcute-wechat-fill" />,
    76→    '#2DC100',
    77→    (id) => id,
    78→  ],
    79→  weibo: [
    80→    '微博',
    81→    <i className="i-mingcute-weibo-line" />,
    82→    '#E6162D',
    83→    (id) => `https://weibo.com/${id}`,
    84→  ],
    85→  discord: [
    86→    'Discord',
    87→    <i className="i-mingcute-discord-fill" />,
    88→    '#7289DA',
    89→    (id) => `https://discord.gg/${id}`,
    90→  ],
    91→  bluesky: [
    92→    'Bluesky',
    93→    <BlueskyIcon />,
    94→    '#0085FF',
    95→    (id) => `https://bsky.app/profile/${id}`,
    96→  ],
    97→  steam: [
    98→    'Steam',
    99→    <SteamIcon />,
   100→    '#0F1C30',
   101→    (id) => `https://steamcommunity.com/id/${id}`,
   102→  ],
   103→}
   104→const icons = Object.keys(iconSet)
   105→
   106→export const isSupportIcon = (icon: string) => icons.includes(icon)
   107→export const SocialIcon = memo((props: SocialIconProps) => {
   108→  const { id, type, variant = 'default' } = props
   109→
   110→  const [name, Icon, iconBg, hrefFn] = useMemo(() => {
   111→    const [name, Icon, iconBg, hrefFn] = (iconSet as any)[type as any] || []
   112→    return [name, Icon, iconBg, hrefFn]
   113→  }, [type])
   114→
   115→  if (!name) return null
   116→  const href = hrefFn(id)
   117→
   118→  if (variant === 'mono') {
   119→    return (
   120→      <FloatPopover
   121→        type="tooltip"
   122→        triggerElement={
   123→          <a
   124→            aria-label={name}
   125→            className="center flex size-9 rounded-full border border-neutral-4 text-neutral-6 transition-colors duration-300"
   126→            href={href}
   127→            rel="noreferrer"
   128→            target="_blank"
   129→            style={
   130→              {
   131→                '--hover-color': iconBg,
   132→              } as React.CSSProperties
   133→            }
   134→            onMouseEnter={(e) => {
   135→              e.currentTarget.style.borderColor = iconBg
   136→              e.currentTarget.style.color = iconBg
   137→            }}
   138→            onMouseLeave={(e) => {
   139→              e.currentTarget.style.borderColor = ''
   140→              e.currentTarget.style.color = ''
   141→            }}
   142→          >
   143→            <span className="flex items-center justify-center [&_svg]:size-4 [&_i]:text-base">
   144→              {Icon}
   145→            </span>
   146→          </a>
   147→        }
   148→      >
   149→        {name}
   150→      </FloatPopover>
   151→    )
   152→  }
   153→
   154→  return (
   155→    <FloatPopover
   156→      type="tooltip"
   157→      triggerElement={
   158→        <MotionButtonBase
   159→          className="center flex aspect-square size-10 rounded-full text-2xl text-white"
   160→          style={{
   161→            background: iconBg,
   162→          }}
   163→        >
   164→          <a
   165→            className="center flex"
   166→            href={href}
   167→            rel="noreferrer"
   168→            target="_blank"
   169→          >
   170→            {Icon}
   171→          </a>
   172→        </MotionButtonBase>
   173→      }
   174→    >
   175→      {name}
   176→    </FloatPopover>
   177→  )
   178→})
   179→SocialIcon.displayName = 'SocialIcon'
   180→
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./apps/web/src/components/layout/header/internal/HeaderDrawerButton.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
     4→import type { CSSProperties } from 'react'
     5→
     6→import { useIsMobile } from '~/atoms/hooks/viewport'
     7→import { PresentSheet } from '~/components/ui/sheet'
     8→import { useIsClient } from '~/hooks/common/use-is-client'
     9→
    10→import { HeaderActionButton } from './HeaderActionButton'
    11→import { HeaderDrawerContent } from './HeaderDrawerContent'
    12→import { useMenuOpacity } from './hooks'
    13→
    14→export const HeaderDrawerButton = () => {
    15→  const t = useTranslations('common')
    16→  const isClient = useIsClient()
    17→  const isMobile = useIsMobile()
    18→  const menuOpacity = useMenuOpacity()
    19→  const opacityStyle: CSSProperties | undefined =
    20→    isMobile && menuOpacity !== undefined
    21→      ? {
    22→          opacity: menuOpacity,
    23→          visibility: menuOpacity === 0 ? 'hidden' : 'visible',
    24→        }
    25→      : undefined
    26→
    27→  const ButtonElement = (
    28→    <HeaderActionButton
    29→      aria-label={t('aria_header_drawer')}
    30→      style={opacityStyle}
    31→    >
    32→      <i className="i-mingcute-menu-line" />
    33→    </HeaderActionButton>
    34→  )
    35→  if (!isClient) return ButtonElement
    36→
    37→  return (
    38→    <PresentSheet content={<HeaderDrawerContent />}>
    39→      {ButtonElement}
    40→    </PresentSheet>
    41→  )
    42→}
    43→
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./apps/web/src/components/layout/header/internal/OwnerStatus.tsx`

```text
     1→import { useQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query'
     2→import clsx from 'clsx'
     3→import dynamic from 'next/dynamic'
     4→import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
     5→import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react'
     6→
     7→import { useIsOwnerLogged } from '~/atoms/hooks/owner'
     8→import { setOwnerStatus, useOwnerStatus } from '~/atoms/hooks/status'
     9→import type { OwnerStatus as TOwnerStatus } from '~/atoms/status'
    10→import { StyledButton } from '~/components/ui/button'
    11→import { FloatPopover } from '~/components/ui/float-popover'
    12→import type { FormContextType, InputFieldProps } from '~/components/ui/form'
    13→import { Form, FormInput } from '~/components/ui/form'
    14→import { useCurrentModal, useModalStack } from '~/components/ui/modal'
    15→import { Select } from '~/components/ui/select'
    16→import { usePageIsActive } from '~/hooks/common/use-is-active'
    17→import { stopPropagation } from '~/lib/dom'
    18→import { apiClient } from '~/lib/request'
    19→import { toast } from '~/lib/toast'
    20→
    21→const EmojiPicker = dynamic(() =>
    22→  import('~/components/modules/shared/EmojiPicker').then(
    23→    (mod) => mod.EmojiPicker,
    24→  ),
    25→)
    26→
    27→export const OwnerStatus = () => {
    28→  const t = useTranslations('common')
    29→  const pageIsActive = usePageIsActive()
    30→  const { data: statusFromRequest, isLoading: statusLoading } = useQuery({
    31→    queryKey: ['shiro-status'],
    32→    queryFn: () => apiClient.proxy.fn.shiro.status.get<TOwnerStatus | null>(),
    33→    refetchOnWindowFocus: 'always',
    34→    refetchOnMount: 'always',
    35→    enabled: pageIsActive,
    36→    meta: {
    37→      persist: false,
    38→    },
    39→  })
    40→
    41→  useEffect(() => {
    42→    if (statusLoading) return
    43→    if (!statusFromRequest) {
    44→      setOwnerStatus(null)
    45→    } else setOwnerStatus({ ...statusFromRequest })
    46→  }, [statusFromRequest, statusLoading])
    47→
    48→  const ownerStatus = useOwnerStatus()
    49→  const isLogged = useIsOwnerLogged()
    50→
    51→  const [mouseEnter, setMouseEnter] = useState(false)
    52→  const { present } = useModalStack()
    53→  const triggerElement = (
    54→    <div
    55→      role={isLogged ? 'button' : 'img'}
    56→      tabIndex={isLogged ? 0 : -1}
    57→      className={clsx(
    58→        'pointer-events-auto absolute bottom-0 right-0 z-10 flex size-4 cursor-default items-center justify-center rounded-full text-accent duration-200',
    59→        isLogged && mouseEnter && !ownerStatus
    60→          ? 'size-6 rounded-full bg-neutral-1'
    61→          : '',
    62→        isLogged && mouseEnter && 'cursor-pointer',
    63→      )}
    64→      onClick={
    65→        isLogged
    66→          ? (e) => {
    67→              e.stopPropagation()
    68→              present({
    69→                title: t('status_set'),
    70→                content: SettingStatusModalContent,
    71→              })
    72→            }
    73→          : stopPropagation
    74→      }
    75→      onMouseEnter={() => {
    76→        setMouseEnter(true)
    77→      }}
    78→      onMouseLeave={() => {
    79→        setMouseEnter(false)
    80→      }}
    81→    >
    82→      {isLogged && mouseEnter ? (
    83→        <i className="i-mingcute-emoji-line" />
    84→      ) : (
    85→        ownerStatus?.emoji
    86→      )}
    87→    </div>
    88→  )
    89→
    90→  if (!isLogged && !ownerStatus) return null
    91→  return (
    92→    <FloatPopover
    93→      asChild
    94→      mobileAsSheet
    95→      placement="bottom"
    96→      triggerElement={triggerElement}
    97→      type="tooltip"
    98→    >
    99→      <div className="flex flex-col gap-1 text-lg">
   100→        {ownerStatus && (
   101→          <>
   102→            <p className="font-bold">
   103→              {t('status_current')}
   104→              {ownerStatus?.emoji} {ownerStatus?.desc}
   105→            </p>
   106→            {!!ownerStatus.untilAt && (
   107→              <p className="text-sm text-neutral-7">
   108→                {t('status_until')} {formatDatetime(ownerStatus.untilAt)}
   109→              </p>
   110→            )}
   111→          </>
   112→        )}
   113→
   114→        {!ownerStatus && isLogged && <p>{t('status_click_to_set')}</p>}
   115→      </div>
   116→    </FloatPopover>
   117→  )
   118→}
   119→const formatDatetime = (ts: number) => {
   120→  const date = new Date(ts)
   121→  // 如果在明天
   122→  if (new Date().getDate() !== date.getDate()) {
   123→    return `${date.toLocaleDateString()} ${date.toLocaleTimeString()}`
   124→  }
   125→
   126→  return date.toLocaleTimeString()
   127→}
   128→
   129→const SettingStatusModalContent = () => {
   130→  const t = useTranslations('common')
   131→  const ownerStatus = useOwnerStatus()
   132→  const inputs = [
   133→    {
   134→      name: 'emoji',
   135→      placeholder: 'Emoji *',
   136→      defaultValue: ownerStatus?.emoji,
   137→      rules: [
   138→        {
   139→          validator: (value: string) => !!value,
   140→          message: t('status_emoji_required'),
   141→        },
   142→      ],
   143→    },
   144→    {
   145→      name: 'desc',
   146→      placeholder: t('status_desc_placeholder'),
   147→      defaultValue: ownerStatus?.desc,
   148→      rules: [
   149→        {
   150→          validator: (value: string) => !!value,
   151→          message: t('status_desc_required'),
   152→        },
   153→      ],
   154→    },
   155→    {
   156→      name: 'ttl',
   157→      placeholder: t('status_duration_placeholder'),
   158→      type: 'number',
   159→      defaultValue: 1,
   160→      rules: [
   161→        {
   162→          validator: (value: string) => !Number.isNaN(Number(value)),
   163→          message: t('status_duration_number'),
   164→        },
   165→      ],
   166→      transform(value) {
   167→        return +value
   168→      },
   169→    },
   170→  ] as InputFieldProps[]
   171→  const formRef = useRef<FormContextType>(null)
   172→  const { dismiss } = useCurrentModal()
   173→  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false)
   174→  const [timeType, setTimeType] = useState<'m' | 's' | 'h' | 'd'>('m')
   175→
   176→  const handleSubmit = useCallback(async () => {
   177→    if (!formRef.current) return
   178→    const currentValues = formRef.current.getCurrentValues()
   179→    setIsLoading(true)
   180→
   181→    await apiClient.serverless.proxy.shiro.status
   182→      .post({
   183→        data: {
   184→          ...currentValues,
   185→          ttl:
   186→            currentValues.ttl *
   187→            {
   188→              m: 60,
   189→              s: 1,
   190→              h: 60 * 60,
   191→              d: 60 * 60 * 24,
   192→            }[timeType],
   193→        },
   194→      })
   195→      .finally(() => {
   196→        setIsLoading(false)
   197→      })
   198→    toast.success(t('status_set_success'))
   199→
   200→    dismiss()
   201→  }, [dismiss, timeType, t])
   202→
   203→  const handleReset = useCallback(async () => {
   204→    setIsLoading(true)
   205→    await apiClient.serverless.proxy.shiro.status.delete().finally(() => {
   206→      setIsLoading(false)
   207→    })
   208→    toast.success(t('status_set_success'))
   209→
   210→    dismiss()
   211→  }, [dismiss, t])
   212→
   213→  const wrapperRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
   214→
   215→  return (
   216→    <Form className="flex flex-col gap-2" ref={formRef} onSubmit={handleSubmit}>
   217→      <div className="relative flex flex-col gap-1" ref={wrapperRef}>
   218→        <FormInput {...inputs[0]} />
   219→        <FloatPopover
   220→          headless
   221→          mobileAsSheet
   222→          popoverWrapperClassNames="z-[999]"
   223→          trigger="click"
   224→          triggerElement={
   225→            <div
   226→              className="center absolute right-2 top-3 flex"
   227→              role="button"
   228→              tabIndex={0}
   229→            >
   230→              <i className="i-mingcute-emoji-line" />
   231→              <span className="sr-only">{t('emoji_label')}</span>
   232→            </div>
   233→          }
   234→        >
   235→          <EmojiPicker
   236→            onEmojiSelect={(val) => {
   237→              formRef.current?.setValue('emoji', val)
   238→            }}
   239→          />
   240→        </FloatPopover>
   241→      </div>
   242→      {inputs.slice(1, -1).map((input) => (
   243→        <FormInput key={input.name} {...input} />
   244→      ))}
   245→
   246→      <div className="mb-4 flex gap-2">
   247→        <FormInput {...(inputs.at(-1) as InputFieldProps)} />
   248→        <Select
   249→          value={timeType}
   250→          values={[
   251→            { label: t('time_minute'), value: 'm' },
   252→            { label: t('time_second'), value: 's' },
   253→            { label: t('time_hour'), value: 'h' },
   254→            { label: t('time_day'), value: 'd' },
   255→          ]}
   256→          onChange={setTimeType}
   257→        />
   258→      </div>
   259→
   260→      <div className="center flex w-full gap-2">
   261→        <StyledButton
   262→          className="rounded-md"
   263→          isLoading={isLoading}
   264→          variant="secondary"
   265→          onClick={handleReset}
   266→        >
   267→          {t('actions_reset')}
   268→        </StyledButton>
   269→        <StyledButton isLoading={isLoading} type="submit" variant="primary">
   270→          {t('actions_submit')}
   271→        </StyledButton>
   272→      </div>
   273→    </Form>
   274→  )
   275→}
   276→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import { AnimatePresence } from 'motion/react'
     4→import Image from 'next/image'
     5→import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
     6→import type { CSSProperties } from 'react'
     7→import { Fragment } from 'react'
     8→
     9→import { getAdminUrl } from '~/atoms'
    10→import { useIsOwnerLogged } from '~/atoms/hooks/owner'
    11→import { useSessionReader } from '~/atoms/hooks/reader'
    12→import { useIsMobile } from '~/atoms/hooks/viewport'
    13→import { UserArrowLeftIcon } from '~/components/icons/user-arrow-left'
    14→import {
    15→  DropdownMenu,
    16→  DropdownMenuContent,
    17→  DropdownMenuGroup,
    18→  DropdownMenuItem,
    19→  DropdownMenuLabel,
    20→  DropdownMenuSeparator,
    21→  DropdownMenuTrigger,
    22→} from '~/components/ui/dropdown-menu'
    23→import { EllipsisHorizontalTextWithTooltip } from '~/components/ui/typography'
    24→import { useIsClient } from '~/hooks/common/use-is-client'
    25→import { authClient } from '~/lib/authjs'
    26→import { apiClient } from '~/lib/request'
    27→import { useAggregationSelector } from '~/providers/root/aggregation-data-provider'
    28→import { useHasProviders, useOauthLoginModal } from '~/queries/hooks/authjs'
    29→
    30→import { HeaderActionButton } from './HeaderActionButton'
    31→import { useMenuOpacity } from './hooks'
    32→import { UserAuthFromIcon } from './UserAuthFromIcon'
    33→
    34→const OwnerAvatar = () => {
    35→  const ownerAvatar = useAggregationSelector((s) => s.user.avatar)!
    36→
    37→  return (
    38→    <div className="pointer-events-auto relative flex items-center justify-center">
    39→      <Image
    40→        alt="site owner"
    41→        className="rounded-full"
    42→        height={36}
    43→        src={ownerAvatar}
    44→        width={36}
    45→      />
    46→      <UserAuthFromIcon className="absolute -bottom-1 right-0" />
    47→    </div>
    48→  )
    49→}
    50→export function UserAuth() {
    51→  const t = useTranslations('common')
    52→  const isOwner = useIsOwnerLogged()
    53→  const isClient = useIsClient()
    54→  const session = useSessionReader()
    55→  const isMobile = useIsMobile()
    56→  const menuOpacity = useMenuOpacity()
    57→  const opacityStyle: CSSProperties | undefined =
    58→    isMobile && menuOpacity !== undefined
    59→      ? {
    60→          opacity: menuOpacity,
    61→          visibility: menuOpacity === 0 ? 'hidden' : 'visible',
    62→        }
    63→      : undefined
    64→  const hasProviders = useHasProviders()
    65→
    66→  const presentOauthModal = useOauthLoginModal()
    67→
    68→  const hoverOnly = !isMobile
    69→
    70→  if (!isClient) return null
    71→
    72→  return (
    73→    <AnimatePresence>
    74→      <div style={opacityStyle}>
    75→        <DropdownMenu modal={false}>
    76→          <DropdownMenuTrigger nativeButton={false} openOnHover={hoverOnly}>
    77→            {isOwner ? (
    78→              <OwnerAvatar />
    79→            ) : session ? (
    80→              <ReaderAvatar />
    81→            ) : (
    82→              hasProviders && (
    83→                <HeaderActionButton
    84→                  aria-label={t('aria_login')}
    85→                  onClick={() => {
    86→                    presentOauthModal()
    87→                  }}
    88→                >
    89→                  <UserArrowLeftIcon className="size-4" />
    90→                </HeaderActionButton>
    91→              )
    92→            )}
    93→          </DropdownMenuTrigger>
    94→
    95→          {(session || isOwner) && (
    96→            <DropdownMenuContent
    97→              keepMounted
    98→              align="end"
    99→              className="relative flex max-w-[30ch] flex-col"
   100→              positionMethod="fixed"
   101→              sideOffset={8}
   102→            >
   103→              {session && (
   104→                <Fragment>
   105→                  <DropdownMenuGroup>
   106→                    <DropdownMenuLabel className="text-xs text-neutral-9/60">
   107→                      {t('auth_account')}
   108→                    </DropdownMenuLabel>
   109→                    <DropdownMenuLabel className="min-w-0">
   110→                      <div className="-mt-1 flex min-w-0 items-center gap-2">
   111→                        <img
   112→                          className="size-8 rounded-full"
   113→                          src={session.image}
   114→                        />
   115→                        <div className="min-w-0 max-w-40 leading-none">
   116→                          <div className="truncate">{session.name}</div>
   117→                          <EllipsisHorizontalTextWithTooltip className="min-w-0 truncate text-xs text-neutral-9/60">
   118→                            {session?.handle
   119→                              ? `@${session.handle}`
   120→                              : session?.email}
   121→                          </EllipsisHorizontalTextWithTooltip>
   122→                        </div>
   123→                      </div>
   124→                    </DropdownMenuLabel>
   125→                  </DropdownMenuGroup>
   126→                  <DropdownMenuSeparator />
   127→                </Fragment>
   128→              )}
   129→
   130→              {isOwner && (
   131→                <Fragment>
   132→                  <DropdownMenuItem
   133→                    icon={<i className="i-mingcute-dashboard-3-line size-4" />}
   134→                    onClick={() => {
   135→                      window.open('/dashboard', '_blank')
   136→                    }}
   137→                  >
   138→                    {t('auth_dashboard')}
   139→                  </DropdownMenuItem>
   140→                  <DropdownMenuItem
   141→                    icon={<i className="i-mingcute-dashboard-2-line size-4" />}
   142→                    onClick={() => {
   143→                      const adminUrl = getAdminUrl()
   144→                      if (adminUrl) {
   145→                        window.open(adminUrl, '_blank')
   146→                      }
   147→                    }}
   148→                  >
   149→                    {t('auth_console')}
   150→                  </DropdownMenuItem>
   151→                  <DropdownMenuSeparator />
   152→                </Fragment>
   153→              )}
   154→              <DropdownMenuItem
   155→                icon={<i className="i-mingcute-exit-line size-4" />}
   156→                onClick={async () => {
   157→                  await apiClient.owner.logout().catch(() => {})
   158→                  await authClient.signOut().then((res) => {
   159→                    if (res.data?.success) window.location.reload()
   160→                  })
   161→                }}
   162→              >
   163→                {t('auth_logout')}
   164→              </DropdownMenuItem>
   165→            </DropdownMenuContent>
   166→          )}
   167→        </DropdownMenu>
   168→      </div>
   169→    </AnimatePresence>
   170→  )
   171→}
   172→
   173→const ReaderAvatar = () => {
   174→  const session = useSessionReader()!
   175→
   176→  return (
   177→    <div className="pointer-events-auto relative flex items-center justify-center">
   178→      <Image
   179→        alt={session.name}
   180→        className="rounded-full"
   181→        height={36}
   182→        src={session.image}
   183→        width={36}
   184→      />
   185→      <UserAuthFromIcon className="absolute -bottom-1 right-0" />
   186→    </div>
   187→  )
   188→}
   189→
```

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import { atom, useAtom, useSetAtom } from 'jotai'
     4→import { m } from 'motion/react'
     5→import Image from 'next/image'
     6→import NextLink from 'next/link'
     7→import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation'
     8→import type { MouseEventHandler, ReactNode } from 'react'
     9→import { use, useCallback } from 'react'
    10→import { Link, useLocation } from 'react-router-dom'
    11→
    12→import type { RouteItem } from '~/app/(dashboard)/dashboard/[[...catch_all]]/router'
    13→import { useIsMobile } from '~/atoms/hooks/viewport'
    14→import { DashboardLayoutContext } from '~/components/modules/dashboard/utils/context'
    15→import { Avatar } from '~/components/ui/avatar'
    16→import { MotionButtonBase } from '~/components/ui/button'
    17→import { BreadcrumbDivider } from '~/components/ui/divider'
    18→import { PresentSheet } from '~/components/ui/sheet'
    19→import { preventDefault } from '~/lib/dom'
    20→import { clsxm } from '~/lib/helper'
    21→import { useAggregationSelector } from '~/providers/root/aggregation-data-provider'
    22→
    23→import { ThemeToggle } from './ThemeToggle'
    24→
    25→export const LayoutHeader = () => {
    26→  const title = useAggregationSelector((s) => s.seo.title)
    27→  const router = useRouter()
    28→
    29→  const ownerAvatar = useAggregationSelector((s) => s.user?.avatar)
    30→  return (
    31→    <header className="fixed inset-x-0 top-0 z-[19] border-b-[0.5px] border-neutral-3 bg-neutral-1/80 pl-6 backdrop-blur">
    32→      <nav className="flex h-16 items-center">
    33→        <div className="flex items-center space-x-1 lg:space-x-3">
    34→          <MotionButtonBase
    35→            className="p-2 text-2xl"
    36→            onClick={() => {
    37→              router.push('/')
    38→            }}
    39→          >
    40→            {ownerAvatar ? (
    41→              <Image
    42→                alt="Owner Avatar"
    43→                className="rounded-full"
    44→                height={28}
    45→                src={ownerAvatar}
    46→                width={28}
    47→              />
    48→            ) : (
    49→              '𝕄'
    50→            )}
    51→          </MotionButtonBase>
    52→          <BreadcrumbDivider className="opacity-20" />
    53→          <NextLink className="font-bold opacity-90 md:text-base" href="/">
    54→            {title}
    55→          </NextLink>
    56→          <BreadcrumbDivider className="opacity-0 lg:opacity-20" />
    57→        </div>
    58→
    59→        <div className="relative flex min-w-0 grow items-center justify-between">
    60→          <HeaderMenu className="hidden lg:flex" />
    61→
    62→          <RightBar />
    63→        </div>
    64→      </nav>
    65→      <SecondaryNavLine />
    66→    </header>
    67→  )
    68→}
    69→
    70→const RightBar = () => {
    71→  const user = useAggregationSelector((s) => s.user)
    72→  return (
    73→    <div className="relative mr-2 flex grow items-center justify-end space-x-2 lg:mr-4 lg:grow-0">
    74→      <ThemeToggle />
    75→      <MobileMenuDrawerButton />
    76→      <Avatar
    77→        className="size-9 select-none rounded-full bg-neutral-3 ring-2 ring-neutral-3"
    78→        height={24}
    79→        imageUrl={user?.avatar || ''}
    80→        width={24}
    81→      />
    82→    </div>
    83→  )
    84→}
    85→
    86→const headerDrawerAtom = atom(false)
    87→
    88→const MobileMenuDrawerButton = () => {
    89→  const isMobile = useIsMobile()
    90→
    91→  const [isDrawerOpen, setIsDrawerOpen] = useAtom(headerDrawerAtom)
    92→  if (!isMobile) return null
    93→
    94→  return (
    95→    <PresentSheet
    96→      content={HeaderMenu}
    97→      open={isDrawerOpen}
    98→      onOpenChange={setIsDrawerOpen}
    99→    >
   100→      <MotionButtonBase
   101→        className="mr-2! rounded-full p-2"
   102→        onClick={() => {
   103→          setIsDrawerOpen(!isDrawerOpen)
   104→        }}
   105→      >
   106→        <i className="i-mingcute-menu-line" />
   107→      </MotionButtonBase>
   108→    </PresentSheet>
   109→  )
   110→}
   111→
   112→const HeaderMenu: Component = ({ className }) => {
   113→  const setHeaderDrawer = useSetAtom(headerDrawerAtom)
   114→
   115→  const routes = use(DashboardLayoutContext)
   116→  const firstLevelMenu = routes
   117→    .map((route) => {
   118→      const { title, icon, redirect } = route.config
   119→      if (!title) return null
   120→
   121→      return {
   122→        title,
   123→        path: route.path,
   124→        icon,
   125→        redirect,
   126→      }
   127→    })
   128→    .filter(Boolean) as {
   129→    title: string
   130→    path: string
   131→    icon?: ReactNode
   132→    redirect?: string
   133→  }[]
   134→
   135→  const { pathname } = useLocation()
   136→
   137→  const onNav: MouseEventHandler<HTMLAnchorElement> = useCallback(() => {
   138→    setHeaderDrawer(false)
   139→  }, [])
   140→
   141→  return (
   142→    <ul
   143→      className={clsxm('ml-2 items-center gap-2 [&_*]:text-[14px]', className)}
   144→    >
   145→      {firstLevelMenu.map((menu) => {
   146→        const dashboardPath = `/dashboard${menu.redirect || menu.path}`
   147→
   148→        const isActive =
   149→          menu.path === '/'
   150→            ? pathname === '/dashboard/' || pathname === '/dashboard'
   151→            : pathname.startsWith(dashboardPath)
   152→
   153→        return (
   154→          <li key={dashboardPath}>
   155→            <Link
   156→              className="relative flex items-center gap-1 rounded-xl p-2 duration-200 hover:bg-accent/40"
   157→              to={dashboardPath}
   158→              onClick={isActive ? preventDefault : onNav}
   159→            >
   160→              {isActive && (
   161→                <m.span
   162→                  className="absolute inset-0 z-[-1] rounded-xl bg-accent/20"
   163→                  layoutId="header"
   164→                />
   165→              )}
   166→              {menu.icon}
   167→              <span>{menu.title}</span>
   168→            </Link>
   169→          </li>
   170→        )
   171→      })}
   172→    </ul>
   173→  )
   174→}
   175→
   176→const SecondaryNavLine = () => {
   177→  const { pathname: fullPathname } = useLocation()
   178→  const pathname = fullPathname.replace('/dashboard', '')
   179→
   180→  const routes = use(DashboardLayoutContext)
   181→
   182→  const parent = routes.findLast((route) => {
   183→    return pathname.startsWith(route.path)
   184→  })
   185→
   186→  if (!parent?.children?.length) return null
   187→  return (
   188→    <nav className="flex h-12 items-center justify-between overflow-auto lg:overflow-visible">
   189→      <SecondaryLevelMenu menus={parent.children} />
   190→    </nav>
   191→  )
   192→}
   193→
   194→const SecondaryLevelMenu = ({ menus }: { menus: RouteItem[] }) => {
   195→  const { pathname } = useLocation()
   196→  return (
   197→    <ul className="flex w-full space-x-4">
   198→      {menus.map((route) => {
   199→        const fullPath = `/dashboard${route.path!}`
   200→
   201→        const isActive = pathname.startsWith(fullPath)
   202→
   203→        return (
   204→          <li key={route.path}>
   205→            <Link
   206→              className="relative flex items-center gap-1 rounded-lg px-2 py-1 duration-200 hover:bg-accent/40"
   207→              to={fullPath}
   208→              onClick={isActive ? preventDefault : undefined}
   209→            >
   210→              {isActive && (
   211→                <m.span
   212→                  className="absolute inset-0 z-[-1] rounded-xl bg-accent/20"
   213→                  layoutId="sub"
   214→                />
   215→              )}
   216→              {route.config.icon}
   217→              <span>{route.config.title}</span>
   218→            </Link>
   219→          </li>
   220→        )
   221→      })}
   222→    </ul>
   223→  )
   224→}
   225→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     5→
     6→export const ThemeToggle = () => {

    18→      }
    19→    }
    20→  }, [theme])
    21→
    22→  return (
    23→    <MotionButtonBase
    24→      className="p-2"
    25→      onClick={() => {
    26→        switch (theme) {
    27→          case 'light': {
    28→            setTheme('dark')
    29→            break
    30→          }
    31→          case 'dark': {
    32→            setTheme('system')
    33→            break
    34→          }
    35→          case 'system': {
    36→            setTheme('light')
    37→            break
    38→          }
    39→        }
    40→      }}
    41→    >
    42→      {currentThemeIcon}
    43→    </MotionButtonBase>
    44→  )
    45→}
    46→
```

```text
    50→
    51→const ConnectedIndicator = () => {
    52→  const connected = useSocketIsConnect()
    53→
    54→  return (
    55→    <div className="inline-flex items-center">
    56→      <ImpressionView
    57→        action={TrackerAction.Impression}
    58→        trackerMessage="socket_status"
    59→      />
    60→      <ConnectionStatus isConnected={connected} />
    61→    </div>
    62→  )
    63→}
    64→
    65→function ConnectionStatus({ isConnected }: { isConnected: boolean }) {
    66→  const t = useTranslations('gateway')
    67→  const color = isConnected ? '#00FC47' : '#FC0000'
    68→  const secondaryColor = isConnected
    69→    ? 'rgba(174, 244, 194, 0.46)'
    70→    : 'rgba(244, 174, 174, 0.46)'
    71→  const text = isConnected ? t('connected') : t('disconnected')
    72→
    73→  const backgroundStyle = {
    74→    background: `radial-gradient(45.91% 45.91% at 49.81% 54.09%, ${color} 7.13%, ${secondaryColor} 65.83%, rgba(252, 252, 252, 0.00) 100%)`,
    75→  }
    76→
    77→  return (
    78→    <>
    79→      <span className="absolute size-5" style={backgroundStyle} />
    80→      <span className="ml-6">{text}</span>
    81→    </>
    82→  )
    83→}
    84→
    85→export const GatewayInfo = () => {
    86→  const t = useTranslations('gateway')
    87→  const isActive = usePageIsActive()
    88→  const count = useOnlineCount()
    89→
    90→  if (!isActive) return null
    91→  return (
    92→    <div className="inline-flex items-center gap-2">
    93→      <FloatPopover
    94→        asChild
    95→        mobileAsSheet
    96→        offset={10}
    97→        placement="top"
    98→        trigger="both"
    99→        triggerElement={
   100→          <span className="cursor-pointer" key={count}>
   101→            {t('being_viewed')}
   102→            <span>
   103→              <NumberFlow
   104→                value={count}
   105→                style={{
   106→                  fontVariantNumeric: 'tabular-nums',
   107→                  verticalAlign: 'middle',
   108→                }}
   109→              />
   110→            </span>
   111→            {t('viewers')}
   112→          </span>
   113→        }
   114→      >
   115→        <RoomsInfo />
   116→      </FloatPopover>
   117→      <Help />
   118→    </div>
   119→  )
   120→}
   121→
   122→const RoomsInfo = () => {
   123→  const t = useTranslations('gateway')
   124→  const { data } = useQuery({
   125→    queryKey: ['rooms'],
   126→    refetchOnMount: true,
   127→    staleTime: 1000 * 10,
   128→    queryFn: async () => {
   129→      await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, 1000))
   130→      const res = await apiClient.activity.getRoomsInfo()
   131→      const data = res.$serialized
   132→      const result = [] as {
   133→        path: string
   134→        title: string
   135→        count: number
   136→      }[]
   137→      const morphArticleIdToRoomName = (id: string) => `article_${id}`
   138→      data.objects.notes.forEach((note) => {
   139→        result.push({
   140→          path: routeBuilder(Routes.Note, {
   141→            ...getNoteRouteParams(note),
   142→          }),
   143→          title: note.title,
   144→          count: data.roomCount[morphArticleIdToRoomName(note.id)],
   145→        })
   146→      })
   147→      data.objects.posts.forEach((post) => {
   148→        result.push({
   149→          path: routeBuilder(Routes.Post, {
   150→            category: post.category.slug,
   151→            slug: post.slug,
   152→          }),
   153→          title: post.title,
   154→          count: data.roomCount[morphArticleIdToRoomName(post.id)],
   155→        })
   156→      })
   157→      data.objects.pages.forEach((page) => {
   158→        result.push({
   159→          path: routeBuilder(Routes.Page, {
   160→            slug: page.slug,
   161→          }),
   162→          title: page.title,
   163→          count: data.roomCount[morphArticleIdToRoomName(page.id)],
   164→        })
   165→      })
   166→      return result.sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count)
   167→    },
   168→  })
   169→
   170→  if (!data)
   171→    return (
   172→      <div className="center flex size-6">
   173→        <div className="loading loading-spinner" />
   174→      </div>
   175→    )
   176→  if (data.length === 0)
   177→    return <div className="text-neutral-7">{t('no_readers')}</div>
   178→  return (
   179→    <div className="lg:max-w-[400px]">
   180→      <div className="mb-2 text-sm font-medium">{t('popular_content')}</div>
   181→      <ul className="flex flex-col justify-between gap-2">
   182→        {data.map((room) => (
   183→          <li className="flex items-center justify-between" key={room.path}>
   184→            <PeekLink className="hover:underline" href={room.path}>
   185→              {room.title}
   186→            </PeekLink>
   187→            {!!room.count && (
   188→              <span className="ml-5 inline-flex items-center text-sm text-neutral-7">
   189→                <i className="i-mingcute-user-visible-line" /> {room.count}
   190→              </span>
   191→            )}
   192→          </li>
   193→        ))}
   194→      </ul>
   195→    </div>
   196→  )
   197→}
   198→
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent - sidechain (2026-03-15 11:56:33Z)**_

You are migrating icons in the Shiroi project from mingcute/material-symbols CSS classes to lucide-react + lucide-animated components.

## MIGRATION RULES

### Pattern 1: Static icon
```tsx
// BEFORE
<i className="i-mingcute-rss-line size-4" />
// AFTER
import { Rss } from 'lucide-react'
<Rss className="size-4" />
```

### Pattern 2: Animated icon (interactive: buttons, links, toggles)
```tsx
import { SearchIcon } from '@/components/icons/animated/search'
<SearchIcon className="size-4" size={16} />
```

### Pattern 3: Loading spinner
```tsx
import { Loader2 } from 'lucide-react'
<Loader2 className="animate-spin size-4" />
```

### Icon mapping (mingcute → lucide-react):
- add-circle-line → CirclePlus, add-line → Plus, ai-fill → Sparkles
- alert-fill/line → TriangleAlert, arrow-left-line → ArrowLeft, arrow-right-line → ArrowRight
- arrow-right-up-line → ArrowUpRight, book-6-line → BookText, camera-line → Camera
- cat-line → Cat, chat-3-line → MessageCircle, check-circle-line → CircleCheck
- check-fill/line → Check, close-fill/line → X, code-line → Code
- comment-2-line → MessageSquare, comment-line → MessageCircle, computer-line → Monitor
- copy-line/fill → Copy, dashboard-*-line → LayoutDashboard, delete-line → Trash
- document-line → FileText, down-line → ChevronDown, download-2-line/fill → Download
- edit-line → SquarePen, emoji-line → Smile, exit-line → LogOut
- external-link-line → ExternalLink, eye-line → Eye, eye-close-line → EyeOff
- fullscreen-2-line/fill → Maximize, fullscreen-exit-fill → Minimize
- github-line → Github, hashtag-line → Hash, heart-fill/line → Heart
- heart-crack-line → HeartCrack, information-fill/line → Info, key-1-line → Key
- left-fill → ChevronLeft, link-3-line → Link, loading-* → Loader2
- mail-line → Mail, menu-line → Menu, moon-line → Moon, pause-fill → Pause
- pen-line → Pen, pin-line → Pin, play-fill → Play, question-line → CircleHelp
- quill-pen-line → Feather, refresh-2-line → RefreshCw, right-fill → ChevronRight
- rss-line/fill → Rss, search-line → Search, send-plane-line → Send
- settings-5/6-line → Settings, share-forward-line → Share, sparkles-line → Sparkles
- star-line → Star, sun-line → Sun, table-2-line → Table, thumb-up-line → ThumbsUp
- time-line → Clock, translate-2-line → Languages, up-line → ChevronUp
- user-4-line → User, user-visible-line → UserCheck, volume-fill → Volume2
- volume-mute-fill → VolumeX, warning-line → TriangleAlert

Material Symbols:
- notifications-active-outline → Bell, dynamic-form-outline → SquarePen
- arrow-circle-right-outline-rounded → CircleArrowRight

### Animated icons: `@/components/icons/animated/{name}`, export `{PascalName}Icon`

### Brand icons:
```tsx
import { SimpleIcon } from '@/components/icons/SimpleIcon'
import { siGithub } from 'simple-icons'
<SimpleIcon icon={siGithub} className="size-4" />
```

### When to use animated vs static:
- Animated: Buttons, toggles, FABs, interactive actions
- Static: Metadata, list items, status indicators

## FILES TO MIGRATE (Batch 4 - Routes and App pages)

```text
     1→import type { PostModel } from '@mx-space/api-client'
     2→import { useInfiniteQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query'
     3→import { Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'
     4→import RemoveMarkdown from 'remove-markdown'
     5→
     6→import { MdiClockOutline } from '~/components/icons/clock'
     7→import { FeHash } from '~/components/icons/fa-hash'
     8→import { PageLoading } from '~/components/layout/dashboard/PageLoading'
     9→import { OffsetHeaderLayout } from '~/components/modules/dashboard/layouts'
    10→import { defineRouteConfig } from '~/components/modules/dashboard/utils/helper'
    11→import type { CardProps } from '~/components/modules/dashboard/writing/CardMasonry'
    12→import {
    13→  Card,
    14→  CardMasonry,
    15→} from '~/components/modules/dashboard/writing/CardMasonry'
    16→import { LoadMoreIndicator } from '~/components/modules/shared/LoadMoreIndicator'
    17→import { PhPushPinFill } from '~/components/modules/shared/PinIconToggle'
    18→import { RoundedIconButton } from '~/components/ui/button'
    19→import { FloatPopover } from '~/components/ui/float-popover'
    20→import { RelativeTime } from '~/components/ui/relative-time'
    21→import { Tag } from '~/components/ui/tag/Tag'
    22→import { adminQueries } from '~/queries/definition'
    23→
    24→export const config = defineRouteConfig({
    25→  priority: 1,
    26→  title: '列表',
    27→  icon: <i className="i-mingcute-list-collapse-line" />,
    28→})
    29→export function Component() {
    30→  const {
    31→    data: result,
    32→    isLoading,
    33→    fetchNextPage,
    34→    hasNextPage,
    35→    // @ts-expect-error
    36→  } = useInfiniteQuery({
    37→    ...adminQueries.post.paginate(),
    38→    initialPageParam: 1,
    39→    getNextPageParam: (lastPage) =>
    40→      lastPage.pagination.hasNextPage
    41→        ? lastPage.pagination.currentPage + 1
    42→        : undefined,
    43→  })
    44→
    45→  const navigate = useNavigate()
    46→  if (isLoading) return <PageLoading />
    47→
    48→  const data = result?.pages.flatMap((page) => page.data) ?? []
    49→  return (
    50→    <div className="relative mt-8">
    51→      <CardMasonry data={data}>
    52→        {(data) => {
    53→          const isPin = !!data?.pin
    54→          return (
    55→            <Card
    56→              data={data}
    57→              description={RemoveMarkdown(data.summary || data.text || '')}
    58→              key={data.id}
    59→              slots={cardSlot}
    60→              title={data.title}
    61→              className={
    62→                isPin ? 'ring-1! ring-yellow-400! dark:ring-orange-600!' : ''
    63→              }
    64→            />
    65→          )
    66→        }}
    67→      </CardMasonry>
    68→
    69→      {hasNextPage && (
    70→        <LoadMoreIndicator
    71→          onLoading={() => {
    72→            fetchNextPage()
    73→          }}
    74→        />
    75→      )}
    76→
    77→      <OffsetHeaderLayout>
    78→        <RoundedIconButton
    79→          className="card-shadow"
    80→          onClick={() => {
    81→            navigate('/dashboard/posts/edit')
    82→          }}
    83→        >
    84→          <i className="i-mingcute-add-line text-white" />
    85→        </RoundedIconButton>
    86→      </OffsetHeaderLayout>
    87→    </div>
    88→  )
    89→}
    90→
    91→const cardSlot: CardProps<PostModel>['slots'] = {
    92→  footer(data) {
    93→    if (!data) return null
    94→    return (
    95→      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
    96→        <MdiClockOutline />
    97→        <RelativeTime date={data.created} />
    98→        {data.modified && (
    99→          <FloatPopover
   100→            mobileAsSheet
   101→            as="span"
   102→            triggerElement="(已编辑)"
   103→            type="tooltip"
   104→            wrapperClassName="text-xs"
   105→          >
   106→            编辑于 <RelativeTime date={data.modified} />
   107→          </FloatPopover>
   108→        )}
   109→        <FloatPopover
   110→          mobileAsSheet
   111→          triggerElement={
   112→            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   113→              <FeHash className="translate-y-[0.5px]" />
   114→              <div>{data.category.name}</div>
   115→            </div>
   116→          }
   117→        >
   118→          <div className="flex flex-col gap-1">
   119→            <div>分类：{data.category.name}</div>
   120→            {data.tags.length > 0 && (
   121→              <div className="flex items-center">
   122→                <span>标签：</span>
   123→                <div className="flex gap-2">
   124→                  {data.tags.map((tag) => (
   125→                    <Tag className="px-2 py-1" key={tag} text={tag} />
   126→                  ))}
   127→                </div>
   128→              </div>
   129→            )}
   130→          </div>
   131→        </FloatPopover>
   132→      </div>
   133→    )
   134→  },
   135→
   136→  right(data) {
   137→    if (!data) return null
   138→    return (
   139→      <>
   140→        {!!data.pin && (
   141→          <div className="absolute -right-3 -top-3 rounded-full border border-current bg-red-200/80 p-1 text-red-500 dark:bg-red-500/30 dark:text-red-400">
   142→            <PhPushPinFill />
   143→          </div>
   144→        )}
   145→        <Link
   146→          className="absolute inset-0 bottom-8 z-[1]"
   147→          to={`/dashboard/posts/edit?id=${data.id}`}
```

```text
     1→import { useQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query'
     2→import { produce } from 'immer'
     3→import { atom, useStore } from 'jotai'
     4→import type { FC } from 'react'
     5→import { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react'
     6→import { useNavigate, useSearchParams } from 'react-router-dom'
     7→
     8→import { useIsMobile } from '~/atoms/hooks/viewport'
     9→import { PageLoading } from '~/components/layout/dashboard/PageLoading'
    10→import {
    11→  PostEditorSidebar,
    12→  PostModelDataAtomProvider,
    13→  SlugInput,
    14→  usePostModelGetModelData,
    15→  usePostModelSetModelData,
    16→} from '~/components/modules/dashboard/post-editing'
    17→import { defineRouteConfig } from '~/components/modules/dashboard/utils/helper'
    18→import {
    19→  BaseWritingProvider,
    20→  useAutoSaver,
    21→} from '~/components/modules/dashboard/writing/BaseWritingProvider'
    22→import { EditorLayer } from '~/components/modules/dashboard/writing/EditorLayer'
    23→import { ImportMarkdownButton } from '~/components/modules/dashboard/writing/ImportMarkdownButton'
    24→import { PreviewButton } from '~/components/modules/dashboard/writing/PreviewButton'
    25→import {
    26→  useEditorRef,
    27→  Writing,
    28→} from '~/components/modules/dashboard/writing/Writing'
    29→import { StyledButton } from '~/components/ui/button'
    30→import { PublishEvent, WriteEditEvent } from '~/events'
    31→import { useRefetchData } from '~/hooks/biz/use-refetch-data'
    32→import { useEventCallback } from '~/hooks/common/use-event-callback'
    33→import { cloneDeep } from '~/lib/lodash'
    34→import { toast } from '~/lib/toast'
    35→import type { PostDto } from '~/models/writing'
    36→import { adminQueries } from '~/queries/definition'
    37→import { useCreatePost, useUpdatePost } from '~/queries/definition/post'
    38→
    39→export const config = defineRouteConfig({
    40→  priority: 2,
    41→  title: '编辑',
    42→  icon: <i className="i-mingcute-pen-line" />,
    43→})
    44→export function Component() {
    45→  const [search] = useSearchParams()
    46→  const id = search.get('id')
    47→
    48→  const { data, isLoading, refetch } = useQuery({
    49→    ...adminQueries.post.getPost(id!),
    50→    enabled: !!id,
    51→  })
    52→
    53→  const [key] = useRefetchData(refetch)
    54→
    55→  if (id) {
    56→    if (isLoading) return <PageLoading />
    57→
    58→    return <EditPage initialData={data} key={key} />
    59→  }
    60→  return <EditPage />
    61→}
    62→
    63→const createInitialEditingData = (): PostDto => ({
    64→  title: '',
    65→  allowComment: true,
    66→
    67→  copyright: true,
    68→
    69→  categoryId: '',
    70→  id: '',
    71→  images: [],
    72→
    73→  pin: null,
    74→  pinOrder: 0,
    75→  relatedId: [],
    76→  slug: '',
    77→  tags: [],
    78→  text: '',
    79→  meta: {},
    80→  related: [],
    81→
    82→  summary: '',
    83→})
    84→
    85→const EditPage: FC<{
    86→  initialData?: PostDto
    87→}> = (props) => {
    88→  const [editingData, setEditingData] = useState<PostDto>(() =>
    89→    props.initialData
    90→      ? cloneDeep(props.initialData)
    91→      : createInitialEditingData(),
    92→  )
    93→
    94→  const [forceUpdateKey] = useAutoSaver([editingData, setEditingData])
    95→  const editingAtom = useMemo(() => atom(editingData), [editingData])
    96→  const store = useStore()
    97→  useEffect(
    98→    () =>
    99→      store.sub(editingAtom, () => {
   100→        globalThis.dispatchEvent(new WriteEditEvent(store.get(editingAtom)))
   101→      }),
   102→    [editingAtom, store],
   103→  )
   104→
   105→  const isMobile = useIsMobile()
   106→  return (
   107→    <PostModelDataAtomProvider key={forceUpdateKey} overrideAtom={editingAtom}>
   108→      <BaseWritingProvider atom={editingAtom}>
   109→        <EditorLayer>
   110→          {isMobile ? (
   111→            <div />
   112→          ) : (
   113→            <span>
   114→              {props.initialData ? <>编辑「{editingData.title}」</> : '撰写'}
   115→            </span>
   116→          )}
   117→          <ActionButtonGroup initialData={props.initialData} />
   118→          <Writing middleSlot={SlugInput} />
   119→          <PostEditorSidebar />
   120→        </EditorLayer>
   121→      </BaseWritingProvider>
   122→    </PostModelDataAtomProvider>
   123→  )
   124→}
   125→
   126→const ActionButtonGroup = ({ initialData }: { initialData?: PostDto }) => {
   127→  const getData = usePostModelGetModelData()
   128→  const setData = usePostModelSetModelData()
   129→  const editorRef = useEditorRef()
   130→  const handleParsed = useEventCallback(
   131→    (data: {
   132→      title?: string | undefined
   133→      text: string
   134→      meta?: Record<string, any> | undefined
   135→    }): void => {
   136→      setData((prev) =>
   137→        produce(prev, (draft) => {
   138→          const nextData = data
   139→          Reflect.deleteProperty(nextData, 'meta')
   140→          Object.assign(draft, nextData)
   141→          const { meta } = data
   142→
   143→          if (data.text) {
   144→            editorRef!.value = data.text
   145→          }
   146→
   147→          if (meta) {
   148→            const created = meta.created || meta.date
   149→            const parsedCreated = created ? new Date(created) : null
   150→
   151→            if (parsedCreated && !isNaN(parsedCreated.getTime())) {
   152→              draft.created = parsedCreated.toISOString()
   153→            }
   154→
   155→            draft.meta = meta
   156→          }
   157→        }),
   158→      )
   159→    },
   160→  )
   161→
   162→  const { mutateAsync: createPost, isPending: p1 } = useCreatePost()
   163→  const { mutateAsync: updatePost, isPending: p2 } = useUpdatePost()
   164→  const isPending = p1 || p2
   165→
   166→  const navigate = useNavigate()
   167→  return (
   168→    <>
   169→      <div className="shrink grow" />
   170→      <div className="flex grow-0 items-center gap-4">
   171→        <div className="flex gap-2">
   172→          <ImportMarkdownButton onParsedValue={handleParsed} />
   173→          <PreviewButton
   174→            getData={() => ({
   175→              ...getData(),
   176→              id: 'preview',
   177→            })}
   178→          />
   179→        </div>
   180→
   181→        <StyledButton
   182→          isLoading={isPending}
   183→          onClick={() => {
   184→            const currentData = {
   185→              ...getData(),
   186→            }
   187→
   188→            const payload: PostDto & {
   189→              id?: string
   190→            } = {
   191→              ...currentData,
   192→            }
   193→
   194→            // if (
   195→            //   currentData.created === initialData?.created &&
   196→            //   currentData.created
   197→            // ) {
   198→            //   payload.custom_created = new Date(currentData.created)
   199→            // }
   200→
   201→            Reflect.deleteProperty(currentData, 'category')
   202→
   203→            const isCreate = !currentData.id
   204→            const promise = isCreate
   205→              ? createPost(payload).then((res) => {
   206→                  navigate(`/dashboard/posts/edit?id=${res.id}`, {
   207→                    replace: true,
   208→                  })
   209→                  return res
   210→                })
   211→              : updatePost(payload)
   212→
   213→            promise.then((res) => {
   214→              globalThis.dispatchEvent(
   215→                new PublishEvent({
   216→                  ...payload,
   217→                  id: res.id,
   218→                }),
   219→              )
   220→            })
   221→            promise.catch((err) => {
   222→              toast.error(err.message)
   223→            })
   224→          }}
   225→        >
   226→          {initialData ? '保存' : '发布'}
   227→        </StyledButton>
   228→      </div>
   229→    </>
   230→  )
   231→}
   232→
```
</details></tool-use>
