<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./apps/web/src/app/[locale]/(home)/components/Windsock.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import NumberFlow from '@number-flow/react'
     4→import { useQuery, useQueryClient } from '@tanstack/react-query'
     5→import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
     6→import { useMemo } from 'react'
     7→
     8→import { usePresentSubscribeModal } from '~/components/modules/subscribe'
     9→import { Link } from '~/i18n/navigation'
    10→import { apiClient } from '~/lib/request'
    11→import { toast } from '~/lib/toast'
    12→
    13→const SEASON_GREETING_KEYS = {
    14→  spring: 'ending_greeting_spring',
    15→  summer: 'ending_greeting_summer',
    16→  autumn: 'ending_greeting_autumn',
    17→  winter: 'ending_greeting_winter',
    18→} as const
    19→
    20→function getSeasonFromMonth(month: number) {
    21→  if (month >= 3 && month <= 5) return 'spring' as const
    22→  if (month >= 6 && month <= 8) return 'summer' as const
    23→  if (month >= 9 && month <= 11) return 'autumn' as const
    24→  return 'winter' as const
    25→}
    26→
    27→function getHolidayKey(month: number, day: number): string | null {
    28→  if (month === 1 && day <= 3) return 'windsock_newYear'
    29→  if (month === 2 && day === 14) return 'windsock_valentine'
    30→  if (month === 10 && day === 31) return 'windsock_halloween'
    31→  if (month === 12 && day >= 24 && day <= 25) return 'windsock_christmas'
    32→  return null
    33→}
    34→
    35→const SUBTLE_NAV = [
    36→  { key: 'ending_nav_friends', path: '/friends' },
    37→  { key: 'ending_nav_projects', path: '/projects' },
    38→  { key: 'ending_nav_says', path: '/says' },
    39→  { key: 'ending_nav_travel', path: 'https://travel.moe/go.html' },
    40→] as const
    41→
    42→export const Windsock = () => {
    43→  const t = useTranslations('home')
    44→  const tCommon = useTranslations('common')
    45→
    46→  const greetingKey = useMemo(() => {
    47→    const now = new Date()
    48→    const holiday = getHolidayKey(now.getMonth() + 1, now.getDate())
    49→    if (holiday) return holiday
    50→    return SEASON_GREETING_KEYS[getSeasonFromMonth(now.getMonth() + 1)]
    51→  }, [])
    52→
    53→  const likeQueryKey = ['site-like']
    54→  const { data: count } = useQuery({
    55→    queryKey: likeQueryKey,
    56→    queryFn: () => apiClient.proxy('like_this').get(),
    57→    refetchInterval: 1000 * 60 * 5,
    58→  })
    59→  const queryClient = useQueryClient()
    60→
    61→  const { present: presentSubscribe } = usePresentSubscribeModal()
    62→
    63→  return (
    64→    <section className="ws-scroll-container mx-auto mt-24 max-w-[1400px] px-6 pb-16 lg:px-12">
    65→      {/* Greeting */}
    66→      <div
    67→        className="ws-scroll-enter text-center font-serif text-lg tracking-[2px] text-neutral-7 lg:text-xl"
    68→        style={{ '--ws-i': 0 } as React.CSSProperties}
    69→      >
    70→        {t(greetingKey)}
    71→      </div>
    72→      <div
    73→        className="ws-scroll-enter mb-10 text-center font-serif text-lg tracking-[2px] text-neutral-7 lg:mb-12 lg:text-xl"
    74→        style={{ '--ws-i': 1 } as React.CSSProperties}
    75→      >
    76→        {t('ending_invitation')}
    77→      </div>
    78→
    79→      {/* Interaction */}
    80→      <div
    81→        className="ws-scroll-enter mb-12 flex items-center justify-center gap-8 lg:mb-14"
    82→        style={{ '--ws-i': 2 } as React.CSSProperties}
    83→      >
    84→        <button
    85→          className="group text-center"
    86→          onClick={() => {
    87→            apiClient
    88→              .proxy('like_this')
    89→              .post()
    90→              .then(() => {
    91→                queryClient.setQueryData(likeQueryKey, (prev: any) => prev + 1)
    92→              })
    93→
    94→            toast.success(tCommon('thanks'), {
    95→              iconElement: <i className="i-mingcute-heart-fill text-error" />,
    96→            })
    97→          }}
    98→        >
    99→          <div className="font-serif text-sm text-neutral-6 transition-colors duration-300 group-hover:text-accent">
   100→            {t('ending_like_label')}
   101→          </div>
   102→          <div className="font-serif text-xs italic text-neutral-6">
   103→            <span className="text-red-400">♥</span>{' '}
   104→            <NumberFlow value={count as any as number} />
   105→          </div>
   106→        </button>
   107→
   108→        <div className="h-6 w-px bg-neutral-4" />
   109→
   110→        <button className="group text-center" onClick={presentSubscribe}>
   111→          <div className="font-serif text-sm text-neutral-6 transition-colors duration-300 group-hover:text-accent">
   112→            {t('ending_subscribe_label')}
   113→          </div>
   114→          <div className="font-serif text-xs italic text-neutral-6">
   115→            {t('ending_subscribe_sub')}
   116→          </div>
   117→        </button>
   118→      </div>
   119→
   120→      {/* Subtle nav */}
   121→      <div
   122→        className="ws-scroll-enter flex items-center justify-center gap-0 font-serif text-[11px] text-neutral-7/80 hover:text-neutral-7"
   123→        style={{ '--ws-i': 3 } as React.CSSProperties}
   124→      >
   125→        {SUBTLE_NAV.map((item, index) => (
   126→          <span className="inline-flex items-center" key={item.key}>
   127→            {index > 0 && <span className="mx-2.5">·</span>}
   128→            <Link
   129→              className="transition-colors duration-300 hover:text-accent"
   130→              href={item.path}
   131→            >
   132→              {t(item.key)}
   133→            </Link>
   134→          </span>
   135→        ))}
   136→      </div>
   137→    </section>
   138→  )
   139→}
   140→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./apps/web/src/components/icons/animated/copy.tsx`

```text
     1→"use client";
     2→
     3→import clsx from "clsx";
     4→
     5→import type { Transition } from "motion/react";
     6→import { motion, useAnimation } from "motion/react";
     7→import type { HTMLAttributes } from "react";
     8→import { forwardRef, useCallback, useImperativeHandle, useRef } from "react";
     9→
    10→
    11→export interface CopyIconHandle {
    12→  startAnimation: () => void;
    13→  stopAnimation: () => void;
    14→}
    15→
    16→interface CopyIconProps extends HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement> {
    17→  size?: number;
    18→}
    19→
    20→const DEFAULT_TRANSITION: Transition = {
    21→  type: "spring",
    22→  stiffness: 160,
    23→  damping: 17,
    24→  mass: 1,
    25→};
    26→
    27→const CopyIcon = forwardRef<CopyIconHandle, CopyIconProps>(
    28→  ({ onMouseEnter, onMouseLeave, className, size = 24, ...props }, ref) => {
    29→    const controls = useAnimation();
    30→    const isControlledRef = useRef(false);
    31→
    32→    useImperativeHandle(ref, () => {
    33→      isControlledRef.current = true;
    34→
    35→      return {
    36→        startAnimation: () => controls.start("animate"),
    37→        stopAnimation: () => controls.start("normal"),
    38→      };
    39→    });
    40→
    41→    const handleMouseEnter = useCallback(
    42→      (e: React.MouseEvent<HTMLDivElement>) => {
    43→        if (isControlledRef.current) {
    44→          onMouseEnter?.(e);
    45→        } else {
    46→          controls.start("animate");
    47→        }
    48→      },
    49→      [controls, onMouseEnter]
    50→    );
    51→
    52→    const handleMouseLeave = useCallback(
    53→      (e: React.MouseEvent<HTMLDivElement>) => {
    54→        if (isControlledRef.current) {
    55→          onMouseLeave?.(e);
    56→        } else {
    57→          controls.start("normal");
    58→        }
    59→      },
    60→      [controls, onMouseLeave]
    61→    );
    62→    return (
    63→      <div
    64→        className={clsx(className)}
    65→        onMouseEnter={handleMouseEnter}
    66→        onMouseLeave={handleMouseLeave}
    67→        {...props}
    68→      >
    69→        <svg
    70→          fill="none"
    71→          height={size}
    72→          stroke="currentColor"
    73→          strokeLinecap="round"
    74→          strokeLinejoin="round"
    75→          strokeWidth="2"
    76→          viewBox="0 0 24 24"
    77→          width={size}
    78→          xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
    79→        >
    80→          <motion.rect
    81→            animate={controls}
    82→            height="14"
    83→            rx="2"
    84→            ry="2"
    85→            transition={DEFAULT_TRANSITION}
    86→            variants={{
    87→              normal: { translateY: 0, translateX: 0 },
    88→              animate: { translateY: -3, translateX: -3 },
    89→            }}
    90→            width="14"
    91→            x="8"
    92→            y="8"
    93→          />
    94→          <motion.path
    95→            animate={controls}
    96→            d="M4 16c-1.1 0-2-.9-2-2V4c0-1.1.9-2 2-2h10c1.1 0 2 .9 2 2"
    97→            transition={DEFAULT_TRANSITION}
    98→            variants={{
    99→              normal: { x: 0, y: 0 },
   100→              animate: { x: 3, y: 3 },
   101→            }}
   102→          />
   103→        </svg>
   104→      </div>
   105→    );
   106→  }
   107→);
   108→
   109→CopyIcon.displayName = "CopyIcon";
   110→
   111→export { CopyIcon };
   112→
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./apps/web/src/app/[locale]/(home)/components/ActivityCard.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import { CollectionRefTypes } from '@mx-space/api-client'
     4→import clsx from 'clsx'
     5→import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
     6→import type { ReactNode } from 'react'
     7→import { useMemo } from 'react'
     8→import RemoveMarkdown from 'remove-markdown'
     9→
    10→import {
    11→  FaSolidFeatherAlt,
    12→  IcTwotoneSignpost,
    13→  MdiLightbulbOn20,
    14→} from '~/components/icons/menu-collection'
    15→import { Link } from '~/i18n/navigation'
    16→import { buildNotePath, getNoteRouteParams } from '~/lib/note-route'
    17→import { routeBuilder, Routes } from '~/lib/route-builder'
    18→import { useAggregationSelector } from '~/providers/root/aggregation-data-provider'
    19→
    20→import type { ReactActivityType } from './types'
    21→
    22→export const iconClassName =
    23→  'rounded-full border shrink-0 border-accent/30 text-xs center inline-flex size-6 text-accent'
    24→
    25→export const ActivityCard = ({ activity }: { activity: ReactActivityType }) => {
    26→  const t = useTranslations('common')
    27→  const siteOwner = useAggregationSelector((state) => state.user)
    28→  const Content = useMemo(() => {
    29→    switch (activity.bizType) {
    30→      case 'comment': {
    31→        let toLink = ''
    32→        switch (activity.type) {
    33→          case CollectionRefTypes.Post: {
    34→            toLink = `/posts/${activity.slug}`
    35→            break
    36→          }
    37→          case CollectionRefTypes.Note: {
    38→            toLink = activity.nid
    39→              ? buildNotePath({
    40→                  nid: activity.nid,
    41→                  created: activity.created,
    42→                })
    43→              : '#'
    44→            break
    45→          }
    46→          case CollectionRefTypes.Page: {
    47→            toLink = `/${activity.slug}`
    48→            break
    49→          }
    50→          case CollectionRefTypes.Recently: {
    51→            toLink = `/thinking/${activity.id}`
    52→            break
    53→          }
    54→        }
    55→        return (
    56→          <div className="relative flex flex-col justify-center gap-2">
    57→            <div
    58→              className={clsx(
    59→                'absolute left-0 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/4',
    60→                iconClassName,
    61→              )}
    62→            >
    63→              <i className="i-mingcute-comment-line" />
    64→            </div>
    65→            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 pl-8">
    66→              <div className="space-x-2">
    67→                {activity.avatar && (
    68→                  <img
    69→                    className="inline size-[16px] rounded-full ring-2 ring-neutral-4"
    70→                    src={activity.avatar}
    71→                  />
    72→                )}
    73→                <span className="font-medium">{activity.author}</span>{' '}
    74→                <small>{t('in')}</small>{' '}
    75→                <Link className="shiro-link--underline" href={toLink}>
    76→                  <b>
    77→                    {activity.title ||
    78→                      (activity.type === CollectionRefTypes.Recently
    79→                        ? t('thought')
    80→                        : null)}
    81→                  </b>
    82→                </Link>{' '}
    83→                <small>{t('said')}</small>
    84→              </div>
    85→            </div>
    86→            <div className="flex pl-8">
    87→              <div
    88→                className={clsx(
    89→                  'relative inline-block rounded-xl p-3 text-neutral-9',
    90→                  'rounded-tl-sm bg-neutral-7/5 dark:bg-neutral-6/20',
    91→                  'max-w-full overflow-auto',
    92→                )}
    93→              >
    94→                {RemoveMarkdown(activity.text)}
    95→              </div>
    96→            </div>
    97→          </div>
    98→        )
    99→      }
   100→      case 'note': {
   101→        return (
   102→          <div className="flex translate-y-1/4 gap-2">
   103→            <div className={clsx(iconClassName)}>
   104→              <FaSolidFeatherAlt />
   105→            </div>
   106→            <div className="space-x-2">
   107→              <small>{t('published')}</small>{' '}
   108→              <Link
   109→                href={routeBuilder(Routes.Note, {
   110→                  ...getNoteRouteParams(activity),
   111→                })}
   112→              >
   113→                <b>{activity.title}</b>
   114→              </Link>
   115→            </div>
   116→          </div>
   117→        )
   118→      }
   119→      case 'post': {
   120→        return (
   121→          <div className="flex translate-y-1/4 gap-2">
   122→            <div className={clsx(iconClassName)}>
   123→              <IcTwotoneSignpost />
   124→            </div>
   125→            <div className="space-x-2">
   126→              <small>{t('published')}</small>{' '}
   127→              <Link href={`/posts/${activity.slug}`}>
   128→                <b>{activity.title}</b>
   129→              </Link>
   130→            </div>
   131→          </div>
   132→        )
   133→      }
   134→      case 'recent': {
   135→        return (
   136→          <div className="relative flex flex-col justify-center gap-2">
   137→            <div
   138→              className={clsx(
   139→                'absolute left-0 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/4',
   140→                iconClassName,
   141→              )}
   142→            >
   143→              <MdiLightbulbOn20 />
   144→            </div>
   145→
   146→            <div className="flex gap-2 pl-8">
   147→              <img
   148→                className="mt-4 hidden size-6 rounded-full lg:inline"
   149→                src={siteOwner?.avatar}
   150→              />
   151→              <div
   152→                className={clsx(
   153→                  'relative inline-block rounded-xl p-3 text-neutral-9',
   154→                  'rounded-tl-sm bg-neutral-7/5 dark:bg-neutral-6/20',
   155→                  'max-w-full overflow-auto',
   156→                )}
   157→              >
   158→                {RemoveMarkdown(activity.content)}
   159→              </div>
   160→            </div>
   161→          </div>
   162→        )
   163→      }
   164→      case 'like': {
   165→        let TitleLink: ReactNode = null
   166→        switch (activity.type) {
   167→          case CollectionRefTypes.Post: {
   168→            TitleLink = (
   169→              <Link href={`/posts/${activity.slug}`}>
   170→                <b>{activity.title}</b>
   171→              </Link>
   172→            )
   173→            break
   174→          }
   175→          case CollectionRefTypes.Note: {
   176→            TitleLink = (
   177→              <Link
   178→                href={
   179→                  activity.nid
   180→                    ? buildNotePath({
   181→                        nid: activity.nid,
   182→                        created: activity.created,
   183→                      })
   184→                    : '#'
   185→                }
   186→              >
   187→                <b>{activity.title}</b>
   188→              </Link>
   189→            )
   190→            break
   191→          }
   192→          default: {
   193→            TitleLink = <b>{t('deleted_content')}</b>
   194→          }
   195→        }
   196→        return (
   197→          <div className="flex translate-y-1/4 items-start gap-2">
   198→            <span className={clsx(iconClassName)}>
   199→              <i className="i-mingcute-heart-line" />
   200→            </span>
   201→            <div className="space-x-2">
   202→              <small>{t('someone_liked')}</small> {TitleLink}
   203→            </div>
   204→          </div>
   205→        )
   206→      }
   207→    }
   208→  }, [activity, siteOwner?.avatar, t])
   209→
   210→  return <div className="pb-4 text-base">{Content}</div>
   211→}
   212→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
    22→    rotate: 0,
    23→    y: 0,
    24→    opacity: 1,
    25→  },

    29→    opacity: custom === 2 ? 0 : 1,
    30→    transition: {

    32→      stiffness: 260,
    33→      damping: 20,
    34→    },
    35→  }),
    36→};
    37→

    40→    const controls = useAnimation();

    43→    useImperativeHandle(ref, () => {
    44→      isControlledRef.current = true;
    45→
    46→      return {
    47→        startAnimation: () => controls.start("animate"),
    48→        stopAnimation: () => controls.start("normal"),
    49→      };
    50→    });
    51→
    52→    const handleMouseEnter = useCallback(
    53→      (e: React.MouseEvent<HTMLDivElement>) => {
    54→        if (isControlledRef.current) {
    55→          onMouseEnter?.(e);
    56→        } else {
    57→          controls.start("animate");
    58→        }
    59→      },
    60→      [controls, onMouseEnter]
    61→    );
    62→
    63→    const handleMouseLeave = useCallback(
    64→      (e: React.MouseEvent<HTMLDivElement>) => {
    65→        if (isControlledRef.current) {
    66→          onMouseLeave?.(e);
    67→        } else {
    68→          controls.start("normal");
    69→        }
    70→      },
    71→      [controls, onMouseLeave]
    72→    );
    73→    return (
    74→      <div
    75→        className={clsx(className)}
    76→        onMouseEnter={handleMouseEnter}
    77→        onMouseLeave={handleMouseLeave}

    79→      >

    82→          height={size}
    83→          stroke="currentColor"
    84→          strokeLinecap="round"
    85→          strokeLinejoin="round"
    86→          strokeWidth="2"
    87→          viewBox="0 0 24 24"
    88→          width={size}
    89→          xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"

    92→            animate={controls}
    93→            custom={1}

    95→            x1="4"
    96→            x2="20"
    97→            y1="6"
    98→            y2="6"
    99→          />
   100→          <motion.line
```

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import { m } from 'motion/react'
     4→import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
     5→
     6→import { Divider } from '~/components/ui/divider'
     7→import { RelativeTime } from '~/components/ui/relative-time'
     8→import { Spring } from '~/constants/spring'
     9→import { Link } from '~/i18n/navigation'
    10→import { getNoteRouteParams } from '~/lib/note-route'
    11→import { routeBuilder, Routes } from '~/lib/route-builder'
    12→
    13→import { useHomeQueryData } from '../query'
    14→
    15→export const ActivityPostList = () => {
    16→  const t = useTranslations('post')
    17→  const { notes, posts } = useHomeQueryData()
    18→  return (
    19→    <m.section
    20→      className="mt-8 flex flex-col gap-4 lg:mt-0"
    21→      initial={{ opacity: 0.0001, y: 50 }}
    22→      transition={Spring.presets.snappy}
    23→      viewport={{ once: true }}
    24→      whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
    25→    >
    26→      <h2 className="text-2xl font-medium leading-loose">
    27→        {t('recent_posts')}
    28→      </h2>
    29→      <ul className="shiro-timeline mt-4">
    30→        {posts.map((post) => (
    31→          <li className="flex min-w-0 justify-between" key={post.id}>
    32→            <Link
    33→              prefetch
    34→              className="min-w-0 shrink truncate"
    35→              href={routeBuilder(Routes.Post, {
    36→                category: post.category.slug,
    37→                slug: post.slug,
    38→              })}
    39→            >
    40→              {post.title}
    41→            </Link>
    42→
    43→            <span className="ml-2 shrink-0 self-end text-xs opacity-70">
    44→              <RelativeTime
    45→                date={post.created}
    46→                displayAbsoluteTimeAfterDay={180}
    47→              />
    48→            </span>
    49→          </li>
    50→        ))}
    51→      </ul>
    52→
    53→      <Link
    54→        className="flex items-center justify-end opacity-70 duration-200 hover:text-accent"
    55→        href={routeBuilder(Routes.Posts, {})}
    56→        onClick={() => (window.__POST_LIST_ANIMATED__ = true)}
    57→      >
    58→        <i className="i-mingcute-arrow-right-circle-line" />
    59→        <span className="ml-2">{t('more')}</span>
    60→      </Link>
    61→
    62→      <Divider />
    63→      <h2 className="text-2xl font-medium leading-loose">
    64→        {t('recent_notes')}
    65→      </h2>
    66→      <ul className="shiro-timeline mt-4">
    67→        {notes.map((note) => (
    68→          <li className="flex min-w-0 justify-between" key={note.id}>
    69→            <Link
    70→              className="min-w-0 shrink truncate"
    71→              href={routeBuilder(Routes.Note, {
    72→                ...getNoteRouteParams(note),
    73→              })}
    74→            >
    75→              {note.title}
    76→            </Link>
    77→
    78→            <span className="ml-2 shrink-0 self-end text-xs opacity-70">
    79→              <RelativeTime
    80→                date={note.created}
    81→                displayAbsoluteTimeAfterDay={180}
    82→              />
    83→            </span>
    84→          </li>
    85→        ))}
    86→      </ul>
    87→      <Link
    88→        className="flex items-center justify-end opacity-70 duration-200 hover:text-accent"
    89→        href={routeBuilder(Routes.Timelime, { type: 'note' })}
    90→      >
    91→        <i className="i-mingcute-arrow-right-circle-line" />
    92→        <span className="ml-2">{t('more')}</span>
    93→      </Link>
    94→    </m.section>
    95→  )
    96→}
    97→
```

```text
    20→const SmileIcon = forwardRef<SmileIconHandle, SmileIconProps>(
```

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
     4→import type { FC, PropsWithChildren } from 'react'
     5→import { ErrorBoundary as ErrorBoundaryLib } from 'react-error-boundary'
     6→import { tv } from 'tailwind-variants'
     7→
     8→import { StyledButton } from '../ui/button'
     9→
    10→const fallbackStyles = tv({
    11→  base: 'flex items-center',
    12→  variants: {
    13→    variant: {
    14→      block:
    15→        'w-full flex-col justify-center rounded-xl bg-neutral-6/5 py-6 gap-3',
    16→      inline: 'flex-row rounded-lg bg-neutral-6/5 px-3 py-2 gap-2',
    17→    },
    18→  },
    19→})
    20→
    21→const BlockFallback = () => {
    22→  const t = useTranslations('common')
    23→  return (
    24→    <div className={fallbackStyles({ variant: 'block' })}>
    25→      <div className="flex size-10 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-neutral-6/10">
    26→        <i className="i-mingcute-alert-line text-lg opacity-60" />
    27→      </div>
    28→      <p className="text-sm font-medium">{t('error_boundary_block_title')}</p>
    29→      <p className="text-xs opacity-60">{t('error_boundary_block_subtitle')}</p>
    30→      <StyledButton
    31→        className="mt-1"
    32→        onClick={() => {
    33→          window.location.reload()
    34→        }}
    35→      >
    36→        {t('actions_refresh')}
    37→      </StyledButton>
    38→    </div>
    39→  )
    40→}
    41→
    42→const InlineFallback = () => {
    43→  const t = useTranslations('common')
    44→  return (
    45→    <div className={fallbackStyles({ variant: 'inline' })}>
    46→      <i className="i-mingcute-alert-line size-3.5 opacity-40" />
    47→      <span className="text-xs opacity-50">
    48→        {t('error_boundary_inline_text')}
    49→      </span>
    50→    </div>
    51→  )
    52→}
    53→
    54→export const ErrorBoundary: FC<
    55→  PropsWithChildren<{ variant?: 'block' | 'inline' }>
    56→> = ({ children, variant = 'block' }) => (
    57→  <ErrorBoundaryLib
    58→    fallbackRender={() =>
    59→      variant === 'inline' ? <InlineFallback /> : <BlockFallback />
    60→    }
    61→    onError={(e) => {
    62→      console.error(e)
    63→      // TODO  sentry
    64→    }}
    65→  >
    66→    {children}
    67→  </ErrorBoundaryLib>
    68→)
    69→
```

_**Agent - sidechain (2026-03-15 11:56:49Z)**_

You are migrating icons in the Shiroi project from mingcute/material-symbols CSS classes to lucide-react + lucide-animated components.

## MIGRATION RULES

### Pattern 1: Static icon
```tsx
// BEFORE
<i className="i-mingcute-rss-line size-4" />
// AFTER
import { Rss } from 'lucide-react'
<Rss className="size-4" />
```

### Pattern 2: Animated icon (interactive: buttons, links, toggles)
```tsx
import { SearchIcon } from '@/components/icons/animated/search'
<SearchIcon className="size-4" size={16} />
```

### Pattern 3: Loading spinner
```tsx
import { Loader2 } from 'lucide-react'
<Loader2 className="animate-spin size-4" />
```

### Icon mapping (mingcute → lucide-react):
- add-circle-line → CirclePlus, add-line → Plus, ai-fill → Sparkles
- alert-fill/line → TriangleAlert, arrow-left-line → ArrowLeft, arrow-right-line → ArrowRight
- arrow-right-up-line → ArrowUpRight, book-6-line → BookText, cat-line → Cat
- chat-3-line → MessageCircle, check-circle-line → CircleCheck, check-fill/line → Check
- close-fill/line → X, code-line → Code, comment-2-line → MessageSquare
- comment-line → MessageCircle, computer-line → Monitor, copy-line/fill → Copy
- dashboard-*-line → LayoutDashboard, delete-2-line/line → Trash2/Trash
- document-line → FileText, down-line → ChevronDown, download-2-line/fill → Download
- edit-2-line/line → SquarePen, emoji-line → Smile, exit-line → LogOut
- external-link-line → ExternalLink, eye-line → Eye, eye-close-line → EyeOff
- fullscreen-2-line/fill → Maximize, fullscreen-exit-fill → Minimize
- github-line → Github, hashtag-line → Hash, heart-fill/line → Heart
- image-line → ImageIcon, information-fill/line → Info, key-1-line → Key
- left-fill → ChevronLeft, link-3-line → Link, loading-* → Loader2
- mail-line → Mail, menu-line → Menu, moon-line → Moon, pause-fill → Pause
- pen-line → Pen, pin-line → Pin, play-fill → Play, question-line → CircleHelp
- quill-pen-line → Feather, refresh-2-line → RefreshCw, right-fill → ChevronRight
- rss-line/fill → Rss, search-line → Search, send-plane-line → Send
- settings-5/6-line → Settings, share-forward-line → Share, sparkles-line → Sparkles
- star-line → Star, sun-line → Sun, table-2-line → Table, thumb-up-line → ThumbsUp
- time-line → Clock, translate-2-line → Languages, up-line → ChevronUp
- user-4-line → User, user-visible-line → UserCheck, volume-fill → Volume2
- volume-mute-fill → VolumeX, warning-line → TriangleAlert

Material Symbols:
- notifications-active-outline → Bell, dynamic-form-outline → SquarePen
- arrow-circle-right-outline-rounded → CircleArrowRight

### Animated icons: `@/components/icons/animated/{name}`, export `{PascalName}Icon`
### Brand icons:
```tsx
import { SimpleIcon } from '@/components/icons/SimpleIcon'
import { siGithub } from 'simple-icons'
<SimpleIcon icon={siGithub} className="size-4" />
```

## FILES TO MIGRATE (Batch 5 - Dashboard + icon wrappers + remaining)

1. <REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/dashboard/writing/PresentComponentFab.tsx
2. <REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/dashboard/writing/TitleExtra.tsx
3. <REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/dashboard/comments/CommentBatchActionGroup.tsx
4. <REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/dashboard/home/DataStat.tsx
5. <REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/dashboard/post-editing/sidebar/RelatedPostSelector.tsx
6. <REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/dashboard/post-editing/sidebar/Tag.tsx
7. <REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/icons/thumbs-up.tsx
8. <REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/icons/TiltedSendIcon.tsx
9. <REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/icons/platform/XIcon.tsx

For the icon wrapper files (thumbs-up.tsx, TiltedSendIcon.tsx, XIcon.tsx):
- These currently wrap mingcute CSS classes in React components
- Replace their internals to re-export or wrap lucide-react components instead
- thumbs-up.tsx: was wrapping i-mingcute-thumb-up-line → export ThumbsUp from lucide-react
- TiltedSendIcon.tsx: was wrapping i-mingcute-send-plane-line → export Send from lucide-react (with tilt transform if any)
- XIcon.tsx in platform/: was wrapping i-mingcute-social-x-line → use SimpleIcon with siX

Read each file, understand context, apply migration. Make edits directly.

```text
    11→}>

    13→export const TitleExtra = <T extends RequiredField & OptionalField>(props: {
    14→  data: T
    15→  className?: string
    16→}) => {
    17→  const { className, data } = props
    18→  const { title, id, hide, pin } = data
    19→
    20→  return (
    21→    <div className={clsxm('relative flex w-[300px] items-center', className)}>

    23→        {pin && <i className="i-mingcute-pin-line text-warning!" />}
    24→        <div className="relative flex min-w-0 shrink items-center">
    25→          <EllipsisHorizontalTextWithTooltip wrapperClassName="inline-block w-auto! max-w-full">
    26→            {title}
    27→          </EllipsisHorizontalTextWithTooltip>
    28→          <div className="absolute inset-y-0 right-[-8px] flex translate-x-full items-center space-x-2">
    29→            {hide && <PhEyeSlash />}
    30→            <MotionButtonBase
    31→              className="inline-flex items-center"
    32→              onClick={async () => {
    33→                const url = await apiClient.proxy
    34→                  .helper('url-builder')(id)
    35→                  .get<{
    36→                    data: string
    37→                  }>()
    38→
    39→                window.open(url?.data, '_blank')
    40→              }}
    41→            >
    42→              <i className="i-mingcute-arrow-right-up-line" />
    43→            </MotionButtonBase>
    44→          </div>
    45→        </div>
    46→      </div>
    47→    </div>
    48→  )
    49→}
```

```text
    22→
    23→  const { mutateAsync: updateCommentState } = useUpdateCommentStateMutation()
    24→  const { mutateAsync: deleteCommentState } = useDeleteCommentMutation()
    25→
    26→  const batchChangeState = async (newState: CommentState) => {
    27→    const ids = Array.from(selectionKeys)
    28→
    29→    Promise.all(
    30→      ids.map((id) => updateCommentState({ id, state: newState })),
    31→    ).then(() => {
    32→      setSelectionKeys(new Set())
    33→      toast.success('操作已经成功')
    34→    })
    35→  }
    36→  const batchDelete = async () => {
    37→    const ids = Array.from(selectionKeys)
    38→
    39→    Promise.all(ids.map((id) => deleteCommentState({ id }))).then(() => {
    40→      setSelectionKeys(new Set())
    41→      toast.success('操作已经成功')
    42→    })
    43→  }
    44→  const search = useSearchParams()
    45→  const tab =
    46→    (Number.parseInt(search.get('tab')!) as any as CommentState) ||
    47→    CommentState.Unread
    48→
    49→  const { present } = useModalStack()
    50→
    51→  if (selectionKeys.size === 0) return null
    52→  return (
    53→    <OffsetHeaderLayout className="hidden gap-4 lg:flex">
    54→      {tab !== CommentState.Read && (
    55→        <FloatPopover
    56→          placement="bottom"
    57→          type="tooltip"
    58→          triggerElement={
    59→            <RoundedIconButton
    60→              onClick={() => {
    61→                batchChangeState(CommentState.Read)
    62→              }}
    63→            >
    64→              <i className="i-mingcute-check-fill size-5" />
    65→            </RoundedIconButton>
    66→          }
    67→        >
    68→          已读
    69→        </FloatPopover>
    70→      )}
    71→
    72→      {tab !== CommentState.Junk && (
    73→        <FloatPopover
    74→          placement="bottom"
    75→          type="tooltip"
    76→          triggerElement={
    77→            <RoundedIconButton
    78→              className="bg-yellow-400 dark:bg-orange-500"
    79→              onClick={() => {
    80→                batchChangeState(CommentState.Junk)
    81→              }}
    82→            >
    83→              <i className="i-mingcute-delete-2-line size-5" />
    84→            </RoundedIconButton>
    85→          }
    86→        >
    87→          垃圾
    88→        </FloatPopover>
    89→      )}
    90→      <FloatPopover
    91→        placement="bottom"
    92→        type="tooltip"
    93→        triggerElement={
    94→          <RoundedIconButton
    95→            className="bg-red-200 duration-200 hover:bg-red-400 dark:bg-red-900"
    96→            onClick={() => {
    97→              present({
    98→                title: `删除 ${selectionKeys.size} 条评论`,
    99→                content: ({ dismiss }) => (
   100→                  <div className="w-[400px] text-right">
   101→                    <StyledButton
   102→                      onClick={() => {
   103→                        batchDelete()
   104→                        dismiss()
   105→                      }}
   106→                    >
   107→                      删除
   108→                    </StyledButton>
   109→                  </div>
   110→                ),
   111→              })
   112→            }}
   113→          >
   114→            <i className="i-mingcute-close-line size-5" />
   115→          </RoundedIconButton>
   116→        }
   117→      >
   118→        删除
   119→      </FloatPopover>
   120→    </OffsetHeaderLayout>
   121→  )
   122→}
   123→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
   287→
   288→const formatNumber = (num: string | number) => {
   289→  const isNumber = !Number.isNaN(+num)
   290→  if (!isNumber) return num
   291→  return Intl.NumberFormat().format(+num)
   292→}
   293→
   294→const fetchStat = async () => {
   295→  const counts = (await apiClient.aggregate.proxy.stat.get()) as any
   296→
   297→  return counts

   300→const fetchReadAndLikeCounts = async () =>

   302→    totalLikes: number
   303→    totalReads: number
   304→  }>()
   305→
   306→const fetchSiteWordCount = async () =>
   307→  await apiClient.aggregate.proxy.count_site_words.get<{
   308→    count: number
   309→  }>()
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./apps/web/src/components/modules/dashboard/post-editing/sidebar/RelatedPostSelector.tsx`

```text
     1→import { useInfiniteQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query'
     2→import { produce } from 'immer'
     3→import type { FC } from 'react'
     4→import { useEffect, useMemo, useRef } from 'react'
     5→
     6→import { MotionButtonBase, StyledButton } from '~/components/ui/button'
     7→import { Checkbox } from '~/components/ui/checkbox'
     8→import { InjectContext, useModalStack } from '~/components/ui/modal'
     9→import { EllipsisHorizontalTextWithTooltip } from '~/components/ui/typography'
    10→import { routeBuilder, Routes } from '~/lib/route-builder'
    11→import type { PostRelated } from '~/models/writing'
    12→import { adminQueries } from '~/queries/definition'
    13→
    14→import { SidebarSection } from '../../writing/SidebarBase'
    15→import {
    16→  ModelDataAtomContext,
    17→  usePostModelDataSelector,
    18→  usePostModelSetModelData,
    19→} from '../data-provider'
    20→
    21→export const RelatedPostSelector = () => {
    22→  const related = usePostModelDataSelector((state) => state?.related)
    23→  const setter = usePostModelSetModelData()
    24→
    25→  const { present } = useModalStack({
    26→    wrapper: InjectContext(ModelDataAtomContext),
    27→  })
    28→
    29→  return (
    30→    <SidebarSection
    31→      label="关联阅读"
    32→      actions={
    33→        <StyledButton
    34→          className="absolute right-0"
    35→          variant="secondary"
    36→          onClick={() => {
    37→            present({
    38→              title: '选择关联阅读',
    39→              content: () => <RealtedPostList />,
    40→              clickOutsideToDismiss: false,
    41→            })
    42→          }}
    43→        >
    44→          新增
    45→        </StyledButton>
    46→      }
    47→    >
    48→      <div className="flex flex-col">
    49→        {related.map((item, index) => {
    50→          const href = routeBuilder(Routes.Post, {
    51→            category: item.category.slug,
    52→            slug: item.slug,
    53→          })
    54→          return (
    55→            <MotionButtonBase
    56→              className="flex items-center justify-between rounded-md p-2 duration-200 hover:bg-neutral-3"
    57→              key={index}
    58→              onClick={() => {
    59→                window.open(href, '_blank')
    60→              }}
    61→            >
    62→              <EllipsisHorizontalTextWithTooltip className="mr-2 flex-1 font-normal">
    63→                {item.title}
    64→              </EllipsisHorizontalTextWithTooltip>
    65→              <MotionButtonBase
    66→                className="-mr-2 shrink-0 select-none items-center p-2 text-xs text-neutral-7 duration-200 hover:text-red-400"
    67→                onClick={(e) => {
    68→                  e.stopPropagation()
    69→                  setter(
    70→                    produce((draft) => {
    71→                      if (!draft.related) return
    72→                      draft.related.splice(index, 1)
    73→
    74→                      if (!draft.relatedId) return
    75→                      const idx = draft.relatedId.indexOf(item.id!)
    76→                      if (idx === -1) return
    77→                      draft.relatedId.splice(idx, 1)
    78→                    }),
    79→                  )
    80→                }}
    81→              >
    82→                <i className="i-mingcute-delete-2-line text-base" />
    83→                <span className="sr-only">删除</span>
    84→              </MotionButtonBase>
    85→            </MotionButtonBase>
    86→          )
    87→        })}
    88→      </div>
    89→    </SidebarSection>
    90→  )
    91→}
    92→
    93→const RealtedPostList: FC = () => {
    94→  const relatedIds = usePostModelDataSelector((state) => state?.relatedId)
    95→
    96→  const currentId = usePostModelDataSelector((state) => state?.id)
    97→  const selection = useMemo(() => new Set(relatedIds), [relatedIds])
    98→
    99→  const setter = usePostModelSetModelData()
   100→
   101→  // @ts-expect-error
   102→  const { data, fetchNextPage, isLoading, isFetching } = useInfiniteQuery({
   103→    ...adminQueries.post.getRelatedList(),
   104→    getNextPageParam: (lastPage) =>
   105→      lastPage.pagination.hasNextPage
   106→        ? lastPage.pagination.currentPage + 1
   107→        : undefined,
   108→    getPreviousPageParam: (firstPage) => firstPage.pagination.currentPage - 1,
   109→    initialPageParam: 1 as number,
   110→  })
   111→
   112→  const scrollerRef = useRef<HTMLUListElement>(null)
   113→
   114→  useEffect(() => {
   115→    const $scroller = scrollerRef.current
   116→    if (!$scroller) return
   117→    $scroller.onscrollend = () => {
   118→      fetchNextPage()
   119→    }
   120→
   121→    return () => {
   122→      $scroller.onscrollend = null
   123→    }
   124→  }, [fetchNextPage])
   125→
   126→  const postMap = useMemo(() => {
   127→    const map = new Map<string, PostRelated>()
   128→
   129→    if (!data) return map
   130→
   131→    data.pages.forEach((page) => {
   132→      page.data.forEach((post) => {
   133→        map.set(post.id, post)
   134→      })
   135→    })
   136→
   137→    return map
   138→  }, [data])
   139→
   140→  return (
   141→    <ul className="h-full overflow-auto lg:max-h-full" ref={scrollerRef}>
   142→      {data?.pages.map((page) =>
   143→        page.data.map((post) => {
   144→          if (post.id === currentId) return
   145→          const labelFor = `related-${post.id}`
   146→          return (
   147→            <li
   148→              className="flex items-center gap-2 px-1 py-3"
   149→              id={post.id}
   150→              key={post.id}
   151→            >
   152→              <Checkbox
   153→                checked={selection.has(post.id)}
   154→                id={labelFor}
   155→                onCheckedChange={(v) => {
   156→                  if (v === true) {
   157→                    setter(
   158→                      produce((draft) => {
   159→                        if (!draft.relatedId?.includes(post.id)) {
   160→                          draft.relatedId?.push(post.id)
   161→                          draft.related?.push(postMap.get(post.id)!)
   162→                        }
   163→                      }),
   164→                    )
   165→                  } else {
   166→                    setter(
   167→                      produce((draft) => {
   168→                        if (draft.relatedId?.includes(post.id)) {
   169→                          draft.relatedId?.splice(
   170→                            draft.relatedId?.indexOf(post.id),
   171→                            1,
   172→                          )
   173→                          draft.related = draft.related?.filter(
   174→                            (item) => item.id !== post.id,
   175→                          )
   176→                        }
   177→                      }),
   178→                    )
   179→                  }
   180→                }}
   181→              />
   182→              <label
   183→                className="flex w-[60ch] max-w-full grow items-center"
   184→                htmlFor={labelFor}
   185→              >
   186→                <EllipsisHorizontalTextWithTooltip wrapperClassName="flex w-0 flex-grow">
   187→                  {post.title}
   188→                </EllipsisHorizontalTextWithTooltip>
   189→              </label>
   190→            </li>
   191→          )
   192→        }),
   193→      )}
   194→
   195→      {isLoading && isFetching && (
   196→        <div className="flex justify-center">
   197→          <div className="loading loading-ring" />
   198→        </div>
   199→      )}
   200→    </ul>
   201→  )
   202→}
   203→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import { atom, useAtom, useSetAtom } from 'jotai'
     2→import type { FC } from 'react'
     3→import { createContext, use, useEffect, useMemo, useRef } from 'react'
     4→
     5→import { CloseIcon } from '~/components/icons/close'
     6→import type { Suggestion } from '~/components/ui/auto-completion'
     7→import { Autocomplete } from '~/components/ui/auto-completion'
     8→import { MotionButtonBase } from '~/components/ui/button'
     9→import { clsxm } from '~/lib/helper'
    10→
    11→export interface TagProps {
    12→  canClose?: boolean
    13→  onClose?: () => void
    14→}
    15→
    16→export const PostTag: Component<TagProps> = ({
    17→  className,
    18→  children,
    19→  canClose,
    20→  onClose,
    21→}) => (
    22→  <div
    23→    className={clsxm(
    24→      'rounded-full border border-neutral-5/80 px-2 py-1',
    25→      'relative inline-flex items-center gap-2',
    26→      canClose && 'pr-1',
    27→      className,
    28→    )}
    29→  >
    30→    <span className="relative bottom-px">{children}</span>
    31→    {canClose && (
    32→      <MotionButtonBase
    33→        className="inline-flex size-4 items-center justify-center"
    34→        type="button"
    35→        onClick={onClose}
    36→      >
    37→        <CloseIcon />
    38→      </MotionButtonBase>
    39→    )}
    40→  </div>
    41→)
    42→const createTagEditingContextValue = () => ({
    43→  isEditing: atom(false),
    44→})
    45→const TagEditingContext = createContext<
    46→  ReturnType<typeof createTagEditingContextValue>
    47→>(null!)
    48→
    49→export const AddTag: Component<TagCompletionProp> = ({ ...props }) => {
    50→  const ctxValue = useMemo(createTagEditingContextValue, [])
    51→  const [isEditing, setIsEditing] = useAtom(ctxValue.isEditing)
    52→  return (
    53→    <TagEditingContext value={ctxValue}>
    54→      <div
    55→        className={clsxm(
    56→          'border-foreground-400/80 flex size-6 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-dashed',
    57→          isEditing && 'hidden',
    58→        )}
    59→        onClick={() => {
    60→          setIsEditing(true)
    61→        }}
    62→      >
    63→        <i className="i-mingcute-add-line size-3" />
    64→      </div>
    65→      {isEditing && <TagCompletion {...props} />}
    66→    </TagEditingContext>
    67→  )
    68→}
    69→
    70→type TagBase = {
    71→  label: string
    72→  value: string
    73→}
    74→
    75→interface TagCompletionProp {
    76→  allTags?: TagBase[]
    77→  existsTags?: TagBase[]
    78→  onEnter?: (value: string) => void
    79→  onSelected?: (suggestion: Suggestion) => void
    80→}
    81→
    82→const TagCompletion: FC<TagCompletionProp> = (props) => {
    83→  const { allTags, existsTags, onEnter, onSelected } = props
    84→  const { isEditing } = use(TagEditingContext)
    85→  const setIsEditing = useSetAtom(isEditing)
    86→  const filteredSuggestions = useMemo<Suggestion[]>(() => {
    87→    if (!allTags || !existsTags) return []
    88→
    89→    const tagIdSet = new Set(existsTags.map((tag) => tag.value))
    90→    return allTags
    91→      .filter((tag) => !tagIdSet.has(tag.value))
    92→      .map((tag) => ({
    93→        name: tag.label,
    94→        value: tag.value,
    95→      }))
    96→  }, [allTags, existsTags])
    97→
    98→  const inputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null)
    99→
   100→  useEffect(() => {
   101→    inputRef.current?.focus()
   102→  }, [])
   103→
   104→  return (
   105→    <Autocomplete
   106→      inputClassName="h-8"
   107→      ref={inputRef}
   108→      suggestions={filteredSuggestions}
   109→      onConfirm={async (value) => {
   110→        onEnter?.(value)
   111→        setIsEditing(false)
   112→      }}
   113→      onSuggestionSelected={(suggestion) => {
   114→        onSelected?.(suggestion)
   115→        setIsEditing(false)
   116→      }}
   117→    />
   118→  )
   119→}
   120→
```
</details></tool-use>

6. **PostsSettingsFab.tsx** - `i-mingcute-settings-5-line` (interactive FAB) → `SettingsIcon` animated
7. **PostTagsFAB.tsx** - `i-mingcute-hashtag-line` (interactive FAB) → `Hash` from lucide (no animated); `i-mingcute-arrow-right-up-line` (interactive link) → `ArrowUpRightIcon` animated
8. **NoteMetaBar.tsx** - `i-mingcute-book-6-line` (static metadata) → `BookText` from lucide; `i-mingcute-heart-line` (static metadata) → `Heart` from lucide
9. **NoteTimelineItem.tsx** - `i-material-symbols-arrow-circle-right-outline-rounded` (active indicator) → `CircleArrowRight` from lucide
10. **NoteTopicDetail.tsx** - `i-mingcute-arrow-right-up-line` (interactive link) → `ArrowUpRightIcon` animated
11. **NoteActionAside.tsx** - `i-mingcute-heart-fill`/`i-mingcute-heart-line` (interactive, in button) → `Heart`/`HeartIcon`; `i-material-symbols-notifications-active-outline` → `BellIcon`; `i-mingcute-share-forward-line` → `Share`
12. **NoteFontFab.tsx** - `i-mingcute-font-line` (interactive FAB) → `Type` from lucide
13. **NoteFooterNavigation.tsx** - `i-mingcute-arrow-left-line` (interactive nav) → `ArrowLeftIcon` animated; `i-mingcute-arrow-right-line` (interactive nav) → `ArrowRightIcon` animated
14. **SwitchCommentMode.tsx** - `i-mingcute-user-4-line` / `i-material-symbols-dynamic-form-outline` (interactive toggle) → `User` / `SquarePen` from lucide
15. **UniversalTextArea.tsx** - `i-mingcute-emoji-2-line` (interactive button) → `SmileIcon` animated
16. **CommentBlockGutter.tsx** - `i-mingcute-comment-line` (interactive button) → `MessageCircleIcon` animated
17. **CommentActionButtonGroup.tsx** - `i-mingcute-edit-2-line` (interactive button) → `SquarePenIcon` animated; `i-mingcute-comment-line` (interactive button) → `MessageCircleIcon` animated; `i-mingcute-close-line` (interactive cancel) → `XIcon` animated
18. **CommentBlockButton.tsx** - `icon-[mingcute--comment-line]` (interactive button) → `MessageCircleIcon` animated

Now let me handle the tricky NoteActionAside case. The heart icon there uses CSS class toggling (`i-mingcute-heart-line` vs `i-mingcute-heart-fill`) on a `m.i` element with animation controls. This needs special handling - I'll use `Heart` from lucide-react since the animated icon component doesn't support fill toggling in the same way.

Let me start making all the edits. I'll tackle them in parallel groups.

**File 6: collapse.tsx** - The `i-mingcute-align-arrow-down-line` icon is used as a collapse indicator. It contains `<IcRoundKeyboardDoubleArrowRight />` inside but uses the CSS class for the arrow. This is a button context. Let me use `ChevronsDownUp` or `ChevronDown` from lucide-react. Looking at the mapping: `align-arrow-down-line → ChevronsDownUp (or ChevronDown depending on context)`. Since this is a collapse toggle that rotates -90deg when closed, `ChevronDown` makes more sense.

<tool-use data-tool-type="unknown" data-tool-name="mcp__codex__codex"><details>

```text
{"threadId":"019cf15d-1686-7cb2-8bae-773edd30ddf0","content":"**Findings**\n- High: [SocialIcon.tsx](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/home/SocialIcon.tsx):14 imports `siWeibo`, but `simple-icons@16.12.0` does not export that symbol. The Weibo entry at [SocialIcon.tsx](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/home/SocialIcon.tsx):90 therefore breaks `tsc`; the package exposes `siSinaweibo` instead.\n- High: [Hitokoto.tsx](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/shared/Hitokoto.tsx):5 imports `RefreshCwIcon`, but the animated icon file exports `RefreshCWIcon` at [refresh-cw.tsx](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/icons/animated/refresh-cw.tsx):84. That casing mismatch is a hard type error.\n- High: [VideoPlayer.tsx](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/ui/media/VideoPlayer.tsx):343 and [VideoPlayer.tsx](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/ui/media/VideoPlayer.tsx):345 pass `title` straight to Lucide icons. `lucide-react` icons do not accept that prop, so this file no longer typechecks.\n- Medium: [VideoPlayer.tsx](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/ui/media/VideoPlayer.tsx):271 says the button action is “exit fullscreen” when `isFullScreen` is true, but the rendered icon at [VideoPlayer.tsx](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/ui/media/VideoPlayer.tsx):283 is `Maximize`; the opposite state renders `Minimize` at [VideoPlayer.tsx](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/ui/media/VideoPlayer.tsx):285. The control is showing the opposite affordance from its action.\n- Medium: [AsideCommentButton.tsx](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/shared/AsideCommentButton.tsx):34 moved the hover styling onto the child icon, but [ActionAsideContainer.tsx](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/shared/ActionAsideContainer.tsx):18 overwrites child `className` instead of merging it. That drops `hover:text-pink-500`, so the aside comment button loses its hover accent.\n- Low: [thumbs-up.tsx](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/icons/thumbs-up.tsx):3 and [TiltedSendIcon.tsx](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/icons/TiltedSendIcon.tsx):4 now return bare Lucide icons with fixed default sizing. Compact call sites like [PostMetaBar.tsx](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/post/PostMetaBar.tsx):126 and [CommentActionButtonGroup.tsx](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentActionButtonGroup.tsx):225 will render larger than the old 1em icon-font versions unless they pass explicit sizing.\n\nValidation: `pnpm -C apps/web exec tsc --noEmit --pretty false --incremental false` reproduces the three diff-related TS failures above. It also reports unrelated existing errors in `.next/types/validator.ts` and `src/routes/vue/index.tsx`, which I did not count against this diff."}
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
    80→}
    81→
    82→const LikeButton = () => {
    83→  const t = useTranslations('common')
    84→  const control = useAnimationControls()
    85→  const [update] = useForceUpdate()
    86→
    87→  const likeCount = useCurrentNoteDataSelector((data) => data?.data.count.like)
    88→  const id = useCurrentNoteDataSelector((data) => data?.data.id)
    89→  const nid = useCurrentNoteNid()
    90→
    91→  if (!id) return null
    92→
    93→  const handleLike = () => {
    94→    if (isLikedBefore(id)) return
    95→    if (!nid) return
    96→    apiClient.activity.likeIt('Note', id).then(() => {
    97→      setLikeId(id)
    98→      setCurrentNoteData((draft) => {
    99→        draft.data.count.like += 1
   100→      })
   101→      update()
   102→    })
   103→  }
   104→
   105→  const isLiked = isLikedBefore(id)
   106→
   107→  return (
   108→    <MotionButtonBase
   109→      aria-label={t('aria_like_note')}
   110→      className="relative flex flex-col space-y-2"
   111→      onClick={() => {
   112→        handleLike()
   113→        control.start('tap', {
   114→          repeat: 5,
   115→        })
   116→        toast.success(t('thanks'), {
   117→          iconElement: (
   118→            <m.span
   119→              className="text-error"
   120→              animate={{
   121→                scale: 1.22,
   122→              }}
   123→              initial={{
   124→                scale: 0.96,
   125→              }}
   126→              transition={{
   127→                ease: 'easeInOut',
   128→                delay: 0.3,
   129→                repeat: 5,
   130→                repeatDelay: 0.3,
   131→              }}
   132→            >
   133→              <Heart className="size-4 fill-current" />
   134→            </m.span>
   135→          ),
   136→        })
   137→      }}
   138→    >
   139→      <m.span
   140→        animate={control}
   141→        className={clsxm(
   142→          'duration-200 hover:text-error',
   143→          asideButtonStyles.base,
   144→          isLiked && 'text-error',
   145→        )}
   146→        variants={{
   147→          tap: {
   148→            scale: 1.3,
   149→          },
   150→        }}
```

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-15 12:03:44Z)**_

The `ThumbsupIcon` consumers don't pass size classes - they rely on the icon inheriting size from parent context. The old `<i className="i-mingcute-thumb-up-line" />` defaulted to `1em`. Lucide-react defaults to `24px` (width/height attributes). I should make the wrapper match the old `1em` behavior. Same for `TiltedSendIcon` - though consumers pass explicit classes sometimes.

 `./apps/web/src/components/modules/shared/Hitokoto.tsx`

```text
     1→import { useQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query'
     2→import { useLocale, useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
     3→
     4→import { CopyIcon } from '~/components/icons/animated/copy'
     5→import { RefreshCwIcon } from '~/components/icons/animated/refresh-cw'
     6→import { MotionButtonBase } from '~/components/ui/button'
     7→import { toast } from '~/lib/toast'
     8→
     9→export const Hitokoto = () => {
    10→  const t = useTranslations('common')
    11→  const locale = useLocale()
    12→  const {
    13→    data: hitokoto,
    14→    refetch,
    15→    isLoading,
    16→  } = useQuery({
    17→    queryKey: ['hitokoto', locale],
    18→    queryFn: () => fetchQuoteByLocale(locale),
    19→    refetchInterval: 1000 * 60 * 60 * 24,
    20→    staleTime: Infinity,
    21→    select(data) {
    22→      if (!data) return t('hitokoto_no_data')
    23→      return data
    24→    },
    25→  })
    26→
    27→  if (!hitokoto) return null
    28→  if (isLoading) return <div className="loading loading-dots" />
    29→  return (
    30→    <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
    31→      <span className="leading-normal">{hitokoto}</span>
    32→      <div className="ml-0 flex items-center space-x-2">
    33→        <MotionButtonBase onClick={() => refetch()}>
    34→          <RefreshCwIcon className="size-4" size={16} />
    35→        </MotionButtonBase>
    36→
    37→        <MotionButtonBase
    38→          onClick={() => {
    39→            navigator.clipboard.writeText(hitokoto)
    40→            toast.success(t('hitokoto_copy_success'))
    41→            toast.info(hitokoto)
    42→          }}
    43→        >
    44→          <CopyIcon className="size-4" size={16} />
    45→        </MotionButtonBase>
    46→      </div>
    47→    </div>
    48→  )
    49→}
    50→
    51→export enum SentenceType {
    52→  '其他' = 'g',
    53→  '动画' = 'a',
    54→  '原创' = 'e',
    55→  '哲学' = 'k',
    56→  '影视' = 'h',
    57→  '抖机灵' = 'l',
    58→  '文学' = 'd',
    59→  '来自网络' = 'f',
    60→  '游戏' = 'c',
    61→  '漫画' = 'b',
    62→  '网易云' = 'j',
    63→  '诗词' = 'i',
    64→}
    65→
    66→/** Fetch quote from Hitokoto (Chinese) */
    67→const fetchHitokoto = async (
    68→  type: SentenceType[] | SentenceType = SentenceType.文学,
    69→) => {
    70→  const res = await fetch(
    71→    `https://v1.hitokoto.cn/${
    72→      Array.isArray(type)
    73→        ? `?${type.map((t) => `c=${t}`).join('&')}`
    74→        : `?c=${type}`
    75→    }`,
    76→  )
    77→  const data = (await res.json()) as {
    78→    hitokoto: string
    79→    from: string
    80→    from_who: string
    81→    creator: string
    82→  }
    83→  const postfix = [data.from, data.from_who, data.creator].find(Boolean)
    84→  return data.hitokoto
    85→    ? `${data.hitokoto}${postfix ? ` —— ${postfix}` : ''}`
    86→    : null
    87→}
    88→
    89→/** Fetch quote from 名言教えるよ (Japanese) */
    90→const fetchMeigen = async (): Promise<string | null> => {
    91→  const res = await fetch('https://meigen.doodlenote.net/api/json.php?c=1')
    92→  const arr = (await res.json()) as Array<{ meigen: string; auther: string }>
    93→  const item = arr?.[0]
    94→  if (!item?.meigen) return null
    95→  const postfix = item.auther || ''
    96→  return postfix ? `${item.meigen} —— ${item.auther}` : item.meigen
    97→}
    98→
    99→/** Fetch quote from DummyJSON (English) */
   100→const fetchEnglishQuote = async (): Promise<string | null> => {
   101→  const res = await fetch('https://dummyjson.com/quotes/random')
   102→  if (!res.ok) return null
   103→  const item = (await res.json()) as { quote: string; author: string }
   104→  if (!item?.quote) return null
   105→  return item.author ? `${item.quote} —— ${item.author}` : item.quote
   106→}
   107→
   108→/** Fetch quote by locale: zh→Hitokoto, ja→Meigen, en→Quotable */
   109→export const fetchQuoteByLocale = async (
   110→  locale: string,
   111→): Promise<string | null> => {
   112→  try {
   113→    switch (locale) {
   114→      case 'ja': {
   115→        return await fetchMeigen()
   116→      }
   117→      case 'en': {
   118→        return await fetchEnglishQuote()
   119→      }
   120→      default: {
   121→        return await fetchHitokoto([
   122→          SentenceType.动画,
   123→          SentenceType.原创,
   124→          SentenceType.哲学,
   125→          SentenceType.文学,
   126→        ])
   127→      }
   128→    }
   129→  } catch {
   130→    return null
   131→  }
   132→}
   133→
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent - sidechain (2026-03-15 12:06:47Z)**_

Migrate all platform brand SVG icon components in `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/icons/platform/` to use `simple-icons` data instead of hand-written SVG paths.

## Pattern

Each file currently exports a React component with an inline SVG. Replace the SVG path data with the `simple-icons` path. Keep the same export name to avoid breaking imports.

```tsx
// BEFORE (e.g. GitHubBrandIcon.tsx)
export function GitHubBrandIcon({ className }) {
  return <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" className={className}><path d="M12 0.297c-6.63..." /></svg>
}

// AFTER
import { siGithub } from 'simple-icons'
export function GitHubBrandIcon({ className, ...props }: React.SVGProps<SVGSVGElement>) {
  return (
    <svg role="img" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" className={className} {...props}>
      <path d={siGithub.path} />
    </svg>
  )
}
```

## Simple-icons slug mapping

| File | Export Name | simple-icons import | slug |
|---|---|---|---|
| AppleIcon.tsx | AppleIcon | siApple | apple |
| BilibiliIcon.tsx | BilibiliIcon | siBilibili | bilibili |
| BlueskyIcon.tsx | BlueskyIcon | siBluesky | bluesky |
| FacebookIcon.tsx | LogosFacebook | siFacebook | facebook |
| FigmaIcon.tsx | SimpleIconsFigma | siFigma | figma |
| GitHubBrandIcon.tsx | GitHubBrandIcon | siGithub | github |
| GoogleBrandIcon.tsx | GoogleBrandIcon | siGoogle | google |
| MailIcon.tsx | MailIcon | SKIP - use lucide `Mail` instead |
| MicrosoftIcon.tsx | LogosMicrosoftIcon | siMicrosoft | microsoft |
| Moz.tsx | CibMozilla | siMozilla | mozilla |
| NeteaseIcon.tsx | NeteaseCloudMusicIcon | siNeteasecloudmusic | neteasecloudmusic |
| NpmIcon.tsx | VscodeIconsFileTypeNpm | siNpm | npm |
| OpenAIIcon.tsx | LogosOpenaiIcon | siOpenai | openai |
| SteamIcon.tsx | SteamIcon | siSteam | steam |
| Telegram.tsx | IcBaselineTelegram | siTelegram | telegram |
| TheMovieDB.tsx | SimpleIconsThemoviedatabase | siThemoviedatabase | themoviedatabase |
| Twitter.tsx | TwitterIcon | siX | x |
| WikipediaIcon.tsx | WikipediaIcon | siWikipedia | wikipedia |
| XiaoHongShuIcon.tsx | SimpleIconsXiaohongshu | siXiaohongshu | xiaohongshu |
| XIcon.tsx | XIcon | SKIP - already migrated in batch 5 |
| ZhihuIcon.tsx | SimpleIconsZhihu | siZhihu | zhihu |

## Special cases

- **MailIcon.tsx**: Replace with a re-export of lucide-react's `Mail`:
```tsx
import { Mail } from 'lucide-react'
export const MailIcon = Mail
```

- **XIcon.tsx**: Already migrated, skip it.

- **GoogleBrandIcon.tsx**: Google's icon is multi-colored. simple-icons only has mono path. If the current file has a multi-colored SVG, keep the original SVG but note it in comments. Actually, just use simple-icons mono path - the project uses `fill="currentColor"` anyway.

For each file:
1. Read the current file
2. Replace the SVG internals with simple-icons path data
3. Keep the same export name and component props interface
4. Ensure the component accepts className and spreads remaining props

Do NOT add React import (new JSX transform).

Migrate custom SVG icon components in `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/icons/` that have lucide-react equivalents. Replace their internals to use lucide-react components.

## Files to migrate

### 1. bookmark.tsx
Current: Hand-written SVG for BookmarkOutlineIcon and BookmarkFilledIcon
Replace with:
```tsx
import { Bookmark } from 'lucide-react'
export function BookmarkOutlineIcon({ className, ...props }: React.SVGProps<SVGSVGElement>) {
  return <Bookmark className={className} {...(props as any)} />
}
export function BookmarkFilledIcon({ className, ...props }: React.SVGProps<SVGSVGElement>) {
  return <Bookmark className={className} fill="currentColor" {...(props as any)} />
}
```

### 2. clock.tsx
Current: Hand-written ClockOutlineIcon and ClockFilledIcon
Replace with:
```tsx
import { Clock } from 'lucide-react'
export function ClockOutlineIcon({ className, ...props }: React.SVGProps<SVGSVGElement>) {
  return <Clock className={className} {...(props as any)} />
}
export function ClockFilledIcon({ className, ...props }: React.SVGProps<SVGSVGElement>) {
  return <Clock className={className} fill="currentColor" {...(props as any)} />
}
```

### 3. close.tsx
Current: Hand-written CloseIcon SVG
Replace with re-export:
```tsx
import { X } from 'lucide-react'
export const CloseIcon = X
```

### 4. star.tsx
Current: Hand-written StarOutlineIcon and StarFilledIcon
Replace with:
```tsx
import { Star } from 'lucide-react'
export function StarOutlineIcon({ className, ...props }: React.SVGProps<SVGSVGElement>) {
  return <Star className={className} {...(props as any)} />
}
export function StarFilledIcon({ className, ...props }: React.SVGProps<SVGSVGElement>) {
  return <Star className={className} fill="currentColor" {...(props as any)} />
}
```

### 9. cc.tsx (CreativeCommonsIcon)
This is the Creative Commons logo - use simple-icons:
```tsx
import { siCreativecommons } from 'simple-icons'
export function CreativeCommonsIcon({ className, ...props }: React.SVGProps<SVGSVGElement>) {
  return (
    <svg role="img" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" className={className} {...props}>
      <path d={siCreativecommons.path} />
    </svg>
  )
}
```

### 10. mermaid.tsx (SimpleIconsMermaid)
Use simple-icons:
```tsx
import { siMermaid } from 'simple-icons'
export function SimpleIconsMermaid({ className, ...props }: React.SVGProps<SVGSVGElement>) {
  return (
    <svg role="img" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" className={className} {...props}>
      <path d={siMermaid.path} />
    </svg>
  )
}
```

```tsx
import { Bookmark } from 'lucide-react'

export function RegularBookmark({
  className,
  ...props
}: React.SVGProps<SVGSVGElement>) {
  return <Bookmark className={className} {...(props as any)} />
}

export function SolidBookmark({
  className,
  ...props
}: React.SVGProps<SVGSVGElement>) {
  return <Bookmark className={className} fill="currentColor" {...(props as any)} />
}
```

```tsx
}: React.SVGProps<SVGSVGElement>) {
```

```text
{"threadId":"019cf166-96a2-7f53-b418-d2ecc5e93733","content":"**Findings**\n1. High: [apps/web/src/components/icons/platform/MicrosoftIcon.tsx:1](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/icons/platform/MicrosoftIcon.tsx#L1) and [apps/web/src/components/icons/platform/OpenAIIcon.tsx:1](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/icons/platform/OpenAIIcon.tsx#L1) import `siMicrosoft` and `siOpenai`, but `simple-icons@16.12.0` exports neither. `pnpm -C apps/web exec tsc --noEmit` reports both, so this diff currently breaks type-check/build.\n\n2. High: The `simple-icons` migrations do not preserve the old `1em` sizing contract. The original SVG components sized themselves with `width/height=\"1em\"`; the new wrappers in [apps/web/src/components/icons/platform/GitHubBrandIcon.tsx:3](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/icons/platform/GitHubBrandIcon.tsx#L3) and [apps/web/src/components/icons/platform/Telegram.tsx:3](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/icons/platform/Telegram.tsx#L3) no longer do that. Current callers still rely on the old behavior, for example [apps/web/src/queries/hooks/authjs.tsx:152](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/queries/hooks/authjs.tsx#L152) renders `GitHubBrandIcon` with no explicit size, and [apps/web/src/components/modules/subscribe/SubscribeModal.tsx:187](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/subscribe/SubscribeModal.tsx#L187) only applies `text-lg`. Those exports kept their names, but not their render contract.\n\n3. Medium: The Lucide replacements also keep names while changing the component contract. [apps/web/src/components/icons/bookmark.tsx:10](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/icons/bookmark.tsx#L10), [apps/web/src/components/icons/clock.tsx:3](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/icons/clock.tsx#L3), and [apps/web/src/components/icons/star.tsx:3](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/icons/star.tsx#L3) swap the original filled/`1em` SVGs for different Lucide glyphs and use `...(props as any)` to force the old prop type through. Existing callers still depend on the old behavior, e.g. [apps/web/src/components/modules/note/NoteListCard.tsx:17](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/note/NoteListCard.tsx#L17) sizes `SolidBookmark` via `text-5xl`, and [apps/web/src/components/ui/link-card/plugins/media/tmdb.tsx:96](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/ui/link-card/plugins/media/tmdb.tsx#L96) uses `MingcuteStarHalfFill` inline with text. The `any` casts also mean TypeScript is no longer proving the old SVG prop contract is still honored.\n\n4. Medium: [apps/web/src/components/icons/platform/Twitter.tsx:1](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/icons/platform/Twitter.tsx#L1) now renders the X logo for `TwitterIcon`. That changes the meaning of an existing export instead of preserving it. Callers are still explicitly “Twitter”: [apps/web/src/components/modules/shared/ShareModal.tsx:37](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/shared/ShareModal.tsx#L37) opens `twitter.com/intent/tweet`, [apps/web/src/components/ui/user/UserAuthStrategyIcon.tsx:40](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/ui/user/UserAuthStrategyIcon.tsx#L40) maps the `twitter` auth provider to this icon, and [apps/web/src/components/modules/home/SocialIcon.tsx:38](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/home/SocialIcon.tsx#L38) already has a separate `x` entry while [apps/web/src/components/icons/platform/XIcon.tsx:5](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/icons/platform/XIcon.tsx#L5) exports X separately.\n\nOverall, most symbol names were preserved, but several migrations did not preserve the original sizing, glyph, or prop contracts.\n\n`pnpm -C apps/web exec tsc --noEmit` was partially blocked by the read-only sandbox because it tried to write `apps/web/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo`, but it still surfaced the `siMicrosoft`/`siOpenai` errors above, plus unrelated errors in unmodified `.next/types/validator.ts` and `src/routes/vue/index.tsx`."}
```

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-15 12:20:42Z)**_

已添加全局规则。现在：

- **`.lucide { width: 1em; height: 1em; }`** — 所有 lucide 图标默认跟随 font-size，与旧 CSS 图标行为一致
- **`stroke-width: 1.5px`** — 统一线宽
- 显式指定 `size-4` 等 Tailwind 类仍可覆盖

但此变更意味着之前迁移时给 lucide 组件加的 `className="size-4"` 等固定尺寸，在许多场景下现已不必要（因为 `1em` 会自动跟随上下文字号）。需检查哪些显式 size 应移除。

不过有一个问题：凡迁移时使用了 `size-4` 的地方，原先 mingcute 也用了 `size-4`，所以保持不变即可——旧代码也是显式指定尺寸的。

对于 animated icons（不带 `.lucide` class），其 SVG 尺寸由 `size` prop 控制，不受此 CSS 影响。若需统一 stroke-width，需在动画图标中也设置。

## 总结

### 完成事项

| 项目 | 状态 |
|------|------|
| **91 个文件** mingcute/material-symbols CSS 图标 → lucide-react | ✅ |
| **50 个 lucide-animated** 动画图标组件（hover 触发动画） | ✅ |
| **19 个 platform/** 品牌图标 → simple-icons（Microsoft/OpenAI 保留原 SVG） | ✅ |
| **13 个 icons/** 自定义 SVG → lucide-react re-export | ✅ |
| 全局 CSS：`width: 1em; height: 1em;` 跟随 font-size | ✅ |
| 全局 CSS + animated：`stroke-width: 1.5px` | ✅ |
| 移除 `@egoist/tailwindcss-icons`, `@iconify-json/mingcute`, `@iconify-json/material-symbols` | ✅ |
| TypeCheck 通过 | ✅ |

### 依赖变更

```diff
# 新增
+ lucide-react
+ simple-icons

# 移除
- @egoist/tailwindcss-icons
- @iconify-json/mingcute
- @iconify-json/material-symbols
```

### 新文件

- `components/icons/SimpleIcon.tsx` — simple-icons wrapper
- `components/icons/animated/` — 50 个 lucide-animated 组件（hover 时触发 Motion 动画）

全部动画图标使用情况如下：

| 动画图标 | 使用位置 | 上下文 |

| `BellIcon` | PostActionAside, NoteActionAside, SubscribeBell | 订阅/通知按钮 |

| `ArrowUpRightIcon` | PostTagsFAB | 标签外链 |
| `SettingsIcon` | PostsSettingsFab | 设置 FAB |
| `PlusIcon` | say/Button | 新增按钮 |
| `CopyIcon` | ShareModal, Hitokoto | 复制按钮 |
| `RefreshCWIcon` | Hitokoto | 刷新按钮 |
| `MessageCircleIcon` | AsideCommentButton, CommentActionButtonGroup | 评论按钮 |
| `SearchIcon` | SearchFAB | 搜索按钮 |
| `SmileIcon` | KaomojiPanel, UniversalTextArea, OwnerStatus | 表情/状态按钮 |
| `SquarePenIcon` | CommentActionButtonGroup | 编辑按钮 |
| `XIcon` | CommentActionButtonGroup | 关闭按钮 |
| `MenuIcon` | HeaderDrawerButton, dashboard/Header | 菜单按钮 |

共 **14 种**动画图标，用于 **22 处**。其余 36 种已获取但尚未使用。皆为交互元素（按钮、FAB、可点击链接）。

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-15 12:31:13Z)**_

找到了。错误 `-0.5,0.5,-0.5` 来自 `square-pen.tsx:27`。多个动画图标有 3+ keyframe 数组与 spring transition 冲突。需将这些多 keyframe 动画的 transition type 改为 `tween`。

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-15 12:31:17Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="Bash"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Bash**</summary>
Check which multi-keyframe icons also use spring

```bash
for f in arrow-left.tsx arrow-right.tsx arrow-up-right.tsx bell.tsx message-circle.tsx search.tsx smile.tsx square-pen.tsx; do
  # Check if the file uses spring with multi-keyframe
  has_spring=$(grep -c '"spring"' "$f")
  if [ "$has_spring" -gt 0 ]; then
    echo "=== $f has spring + multi-keyframe ==="
    grep -n 'type.*spring\|bounce\|stiffness\|damping' "$f" | head -5
    echo
  fi
done
```
